33/* =========================================================================
34 * INTERNAL HELPERS
35 * ========================================================================= */
36
38static double _clamp(double v, double lo, double hi) {
39 if (v < lo) return lo;
40 if (v > hi) return hi;
41 return v;
42}
43
47static double _slider_snap_value(double val, double min_val, double max_val, double step) {
48 if (step <= 0.0) step = 1.0;
49 double steps = round((val - min_val) / step);
50 double snapped = min_val + steps * step;
51 if (snapped < min_val) snapped = min_val;
52 if (snapped > max_val) snapped = max_val;
53 return snapped;
54}
55
58N_GUI_TEXT_DIMS n_gui_get_text_dims(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, const char* text) {
59 N_GUI_TEXT_DIMS d = {0, 0, 0, 0};
60 if (font && text) al_get_text_dimensions(font, text, &d.x, &d.y, &d.w, &d.h);
61 return d;
62}
63
65static int _is_focusable_type(int type) {
66 return type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA ||
67 type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER ||
68 type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX ||
69 type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX ||
70 type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST ||
71 type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX ||
72 type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR ||
73 type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU;
74}
75
77static N_GUI_WINDOW* _find_focused_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
78 if (ctx->focused_widget_id < 0) return NULL;
79 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
80 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
81 if (!win || !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
82 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
83 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
84 if (w && w->id == ctx->focused_widget_id) return win;
85 }
86 }
87 return NULL;
88}
89
92static float _text_w(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, const char* text) {
93 int bbx = 0, bby = 0, bbw = 0, bbh = 0;
94 if (font && text) al_get_text_dimensions(font, text, &bbx, &bby, &bbw, &bbh);
95 return (float)bbw;
96}
97
99static float _win_tbh(N_GUI_WINDOW* win) {
100 return (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS) ? 0.0f : win->titlebar_h;
101}
102
104static int _point_in_rect(float px, float py, float rx, float ry, float rw, float rh) {
105 return (px >= rx && px <= rx + rw && py >= ry && py <= ry + rh);
106}
107
119static float _scrollbar_calc_scroll(float mouse, float track_start, float track_length, float viewport, float content, float thumb_min) {
120 float ratio = viewport / content;
121 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
122 float thumb = ratio * track_length;
123 if (thumb < thumb_min) thumb = thumb_min;
124 float max_scroll = content - viewport;
125 float track_range = track_length - thumb;
126 if (track_range <= 0 || max_scroll <= 0) return 0;
127 float pos_ratio = (mouse - track_start - thumb / 2.0f) / track_range;
128 if (pos_ratio < 0) pos_ratio = 0;
129 if (pos_ratio > 1) pos_ratio = 1;
130 return pos_ratio * max_scroll;
131}
132
142static int _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(float mouse, float track_start, float track_length, int visible_items, int total_items, float thumb_min) {
143 int max_off = total_items - visible_items;
144 if (max_off <= 0) return 0;
145 float scroll = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(mouse, track_start, track_length,
146 (float)visible_items, (float)total_items, thumb_min);
147 int offset = (int)(scroll + 0.5f);
148 if (offset < 0) offset = 0;
149 if (offset > max_off) offset = max_off;
150 return offset;
151}
152
161static N_GUI_WINDOW* _find_widget_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int wgt_id, float* ox, float* oy) {
162 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
163 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
164 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
165 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
166 if (((N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr)->id == wgt_id) {
167 *ox = win->x - win->scroll_x;
168 *oy = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
169 return win;
170 }
171 }
172 }
173 *ox = 0;
174 *oy = 0;
175 return NULL;
176}
177
179static void _destroy_widget(void* ptr) {
180 if (!ptr) return;
181 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)ptr;
182 if (w->data) {
183 /* free inner allocations for types that have them */
184 if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX) {
185 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
186 FreeNoLog(ld->items);
187 } else if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST) {
188 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data;
189 FreeNoLog(rd->items);
190 } else if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX) {
191 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
192 FreeNoLog(cd->items);
193 } else if (w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU) {
194 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
195 FreeNoLog(dd->entries);
196 }
197 FreeNoLog(w->data);
198 }
199 FreeNoLog(w);
200}
201
203static void _destroy_window(void* ptr) {
204 if (!ptr) return;
205 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)ptr;
206 if (win->widgets) {
207 list_destroy(&win->widgets);
208 }
209 FreeNoLog(win);
210}
211
213static LIST_NODE* _find_window_node(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
214 __n_assert(ctx, return NULL);
215 __n_assert(ctx->windows, return NULL);
216 list_foreach(node, ctx->windows) {
217 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
218 if (win && win->id == window_id) return node;
219 }
220 return NULL;
221}
222
224static void _register_widget(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, N_GUI_WIDGET* w) {
225 __n_assert(ctx, return);
226 __n_assert(w, return);
227 char key[32];
228 snprintf(key, sizeof(key), "%d", w->id);
229 ht_put_ptr(ctx->widgets_by_id, key, w, NULL, NULL);
230}
231
233static int _items_grow(N_GUI_LISTITEM** items, size_t* nb, size_t* cap) {
234 if (*nb >= *cap) {
235 size_t new_cap = (*cap == 0) ? 8 : (*cap) * 2;
236 if (new_cap < *cap) return 0; /* overflow */
237 N_GUI_LISTITEM* tmp = NULL;
238 Malloc(tmp, N_GUI_LISTITEM, new_cap);
239 if (!tmp) return 0;
240 if (*items && *nb > 0) {
241 memcpy(tmp, *items, (*nb) * sizeof(N_GUI_LISTITEM));
242 }
243 FreeNoLog(*items);
244 *items = tmp;
245 *cap = new_cap;
246 }
247 return 1;
248}
249
251static N_GUI_WIDGET* _new_widget(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int type, float x, float y, float w, float h) {
252 __n_assert(ctx, return NULL);
253 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = NULL;
254 Malloc(wgt, N_GUI_WIDGET, 1);
255 __n_assert(wgt, return NULL);
256 wgt->id = ctx->next_widget_id++;
257 wgt->type = type;
258 wgt->x = x;
259 wgt->y = y;
260 wgt->w = w;
261 wgt->h = h;
262 wgt->state = N_GUI_STATE_IDLE;
263 wgt->visible = 1;
264 wgt->enabled = 1;
265 wgt->theme = ctx->default_theme;
266 wgt->font = NULL;
267 wgt->data = NULL;
268 return wgt;
269}

271/* =========================================================================

279N_GUI_THEME n_gui_default_theme(void) {
280 N_GUI_THEME t;
281 t.bg_normal = al_map_rgba(50, 50, 60, 230);
282 t.bg_hover = al_map_rgba(70, 70, 85, 240);
283 t.bg_active = al_map_rgba(90, 90, 110, 250);
284 t.border_normal = al_map_rgba(120, 120, 140, 255);
285 t.border_hover = al_map_rgba(160, 160, 180, 255);
286 t.border_active = al_map_rgba(200, 200, 220, 255);
287 t.text_normal = al_map_rgba(220, 220, 220, 255);
288 t.text_hover = al_map_rgba(255, 255, 255, 255);
289 t.text_active = al_map_rgba(255, 255, 255, 255);
290 t.border_thickness = 1.0f;
291 t.corner_rx = 4.0f;
292 t.corner_ry = 4.0f;
293 t.selection_color = al_map_rgba(50, 100, 200, 120);
294 return t;
295}
296
313N_GUI_THEME n_gui_make_theme(
314 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg,
315 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg_hover,
316 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg_active,
317 ALLEGRO_COLOR border,
318 ALLEGRO_COLOR border_hover,
319 ALLEGRO_COLOR border_active,
320 ALLEGRO_COLOR text,
321 ALLEGRO_COLOR text_hover,
322 ALLEGRO_COLOR text_active,
323 float border_thickness,
324 float corner_rx,
325 float corner_ry) {
326 N_GUI_THEME t;
327 t.bg_normal = bg;
328 t.bg_hover = bg_hover;
329 t.bg_active = bg_active;
330 t.border_normal = border;
331 t.border_hover = border_hover;
332 t.border_active = border_active;
333 t.text_normal = text;
334 t.text_hover = text_hover;
335 t.text_active = text_active;
336 t.border_thickness = border_thickness;
337 t.corner_rx = corner_rx;
338 t.corner_ry = corner_ry;
339 t.selection_color = al_map_rgba(50, 100, 200, 120);
340 return t;
341}

350N_GUI_STYLE n_gui_default_style(void) {
351 N_GUI_STYLE s;
352
353 /* window chrome */
354 s.titlebar_h = 28.0f;
355 s.min_win_w = 120.0f;
356 s.min_win_h = 60.0f;
357 s.title_padding = 8.0f;
358 s.title_max_w_reserve = 16.0f;
359
360 /* window auto-scrollbar */
361 s.scrollbar_size = 12.0f;
362 s.scrollbar_thumb_min = 16.0f;
363 s.scrollbar_thumb_padding = 2.0f;
364 s.scrollbar_thumb_corner_r = 3.0f;
365 s.scrollbar_track_color = al_map_rgba(40, 40, 50, 200);
366 s.scrollbar_thumb_color = al_map_rgba(120, 120, 140, 220);
367
368 /* global display scrollbar */
369 s.global_scrollbar_size = 14.0f;
370 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_min = 20.0f;
371 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding = 2.0f;
372 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r = 4.0f;
373 s.global_scrollbar_border_thickness = 1.0f;
374 s.global_scrollbar_track_color = al_map_rgba(30, 30, 40, 200);
375 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_color = al_map_rgba(100, 100, 120, 220);
376 s.global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color = al_map_rgba(140, 140, 160, 255);
377
378 /* resize grip */
379 s.grip_size = 12.0f;
380 s.grip_line_thickness = 1.0f;
381 s.grip_color = al_map_rgba(160, 160, 180, 200);
382
383 /* slider */
384 s.slider_track_size = 6.0f;
385 s.slider_track_corner_r = 3.0f;
386 s.slider_track_border_thickness = 1.0f;
387 s.slider_handle_min_r = 4.0f;
388 s.slider_handle_edge_offset = 2.0f;
389 s.slider_handle_border_thickness = 1.5f;
390 s.slider_value_label_offset = 8.0f;
391
392 /* text area */
393 s.textarea_padding = 4.0f;
394 s.textarea_cursor_width = 2.0f;
395 s.textarea_cursor_blink_period = 1.0f;
396
397 /* checkbox */
398 s.checkbox_max_size = 20.0f;
399 s.checkbox_mark_margin = 4.0f;
400 s.checkbox_mark_thickness = 2.0f;
401 s.checkbox_label_gap = 10.0f;
402 s.checkbox_label_offset = 6.0f;
403
404 /* radio list */
405 s.radio_circle_min_r = 4.0f;
406 s.radio_circle_border_thickness = 1.5f;
407 s.radio_inner_offset = 3.0f;
408 s.radio_label_gap = 6.0f;
409
410 /* list items */
411 s.listbox_default_item_height = 20.0f;
412 s.radiolist_default_item_height = 22.0f;
413 s.combobox_max_visible = 6;
414 s.dropmenu_max_visible = 12;
415 s.item_text_padding = 6.0f;
416 s.item_selection_inset = 1.0f;
417 s.item_height_pad = 4.0f;
418
419 /* dropdown arrow */
420 s.dropdown_arrow_reserve = 16.0f;
421 s.dropdown_arrow_thickness = 1.5f;
422 s.dropdown_arrow_half_h = 3.0f;
423 s.dropdown_arrow_half_w = 5.0f;
424 s.dropdown_border_thickness = 1.0f;
425
426 /* label */
427 s.label_padding = 4.0f;
428 s.link_underline_thickness = 1.0f;
429 s.link_color_normal = al_map_rgba(80, 140, 220, 255);
430 s.link_color_hover = al_map_rgba(120, 180, 255, 255);
431
432 /* scroll step */
433 s.scroll_step = 20.0f;
434 s.global_scroll_step = 30.0f;
435
436 return s;
437}

439/* =========================================================================
440 * CONTEXT
441 * ========================================================================= */
442
448N_GUI_CTX* n_gui_new_ctx(ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font) {
449 __n_assert(default_font, return NULL);
450 N_GUI_CTX* ctx = NULL;
451 Malloc(ctx, N_GUI_CTX, 1);
452 __n_assert(ctx, return NULL);
453 ctx->windows = new_generic_list(UNLIMITED_LIST_ITEMS);
454 if (!ctx->windows) {
455 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_new_ctx: failed to allocate window list");
456 Free(ctx);
457 return NULL;
458 }
459 ctx->widgets_by_id = new_ht(256);
460 if (!ctx->widgets_by_id) {
461 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_new_ctx: failed to allocate widget hash table");
462 list_destroy(&ctx->windows);
463 Free(ctx);
464 return NULL;
465 }
466 ctx->next_widget_id = 1;
467 ctx->next_window_id = 1;
468 ctx->default_font = default_font;
469 ctx->default_theme = n_gui_default_theme();
470 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
471 ctx->mouse_x = 0;
472 ctx->mouse_y = 0;
473 ctx->mouse_b1 = 0;
474 ctx->mouse_b1_prev = 0;
475 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
476 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = -1;
477 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
478 ctx->display_w = 0;
479 ctx->display_h = 0;
480 ctx->global_scroll_x = 0;
481 ctx->global_scroll_y = 0;
482 ctx->gui_bounds_w = 0;
483 ctx->gui_bounds_h = 0;
484 ctx->dpi_scale = 1.0f;
485 ctx->virtual_w = 0;
486 ctx->virtual_h = 0;
487 ctx->gui_scale = 1.0f;
488 ctx->gui_offset_x = 0;
489 ctx->gui_offset_y = 0;
490 ctx->global_vscroll_drag = 0;
491 ctx->global_hscroll_drag = 0;
492 ctx->style = n_gui_default_style();
493 ctx->display = NULL;
494 ctx->selected_label_id = -1;
495 return ctx;
496}
497
502void n_gui_destroy_ctx(N_GUI_CTX** ctx) {
503 __n_assert(ctx && *ctx, return);
504 if ((*ctx)->windows) {
505 list_destroy(&(*ctx)->windows);
506 }
507 if ((*ctx)->widgets_by_id) {
508 destroy_ht(&(*ctx)->widgets_by_id);
509 }
510 Free((*ctx));
511}
512
513/* =========================================================================
514 * WINDOW MANAGEMENT
515 * ========================================================================= */
516
521int n_gui_add_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* title, float x, float y, float w, float h) {
522 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
523 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = NULL;
524 Malloc(win, N_GUI_WINDOW, 1);
525 __n_assert(win, return -1);
526 win->id = ctx->next_window_id++;
527 if (title) {
528 strncpy(win->title, title, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
529 win->title[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
530 } else {
531 win->title[0] = '\0';
532 }
533 win->x = x;
534 win->y = y;
535 win->w = w;
536 win->h = h;
537 win->titlebar_h = ctx->style.titlebar_h;
538 win->state = N_GUI_WIN_OPEN;
539 win->widgets = new_generic_list(UNLIMITED_LIST_ITEMS);
540 if (!win->widgets) {
541 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_add_window: failed to allocate widget list");
542 Free(win);
543 return -1;
544 }
545 win->theme = ctx->default_theme;
546 win->font = NULL;
547 win->drag_ox = 0;
548 win->drag_oy = 0;
549 win->min_w = ctx->style.min_win_w;
550 win->min_h = ctx->style.min_win_h;
551 win->flags = 0;
552 win->scroll_x = 0.0f;
553 win->scroll_y = 0.0f;
554 win->content_w = 0.0f;
555 win->content_h = 0.0f;
556 win->z_order = N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL;
557 win->z_value = 0;
558 win->autofit_flags = 0;
559 win->autofit_border = 0.0f;
560 win->autofit_origin_x = x;
561 win->autofit_origin_y = y;
562 list_push(ctx->windows, win, _destroy_window);
563 return win->id;
564}
565
569N_GUI_WINDOW* n_gui_get_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
570 LIST_NODE* node = _find_window_node(ctx, window_id);
571 if (node) return (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
572 return NULL;
573}
574
578void n_gui_close_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
579 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
580 if (win) win->state &= ~N_GUI_WIN_OPEN;
581}
582
586void n_gui_open_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
587 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
588 if (win) win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_OPEN;
589}
590
594void n_gui_minimize_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
595 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
596 if (win) win->state ^= N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED;
597}
598
599/* Return the group ordinal for a window's z-order:
600 * 0 = ALWAYS_BEHIND, 1 = FIXED, 2 = NORMAL, 3 = ALWAYS_ON_TOP.
601 * Ordering is ALWAYS_BEHIND -> FIXED -> NORMAL -> ALWAYS_ON_TOP. */
602static int _zorder_group(const N_GUI_WINDOW* w) {
603 if (!w) return 2; /* treat NULL as NORMAL */
604 switch (w->z_order) {
605 case N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_BEHIND:
606 return 0;
607 case N_GUI_ZORDER_FIXED:
608 return 1;
609 case N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_ON_TOP:
610 return 3;
611 default:
612 return 2;
613 }
614}
615
621static void _sort_windows_by_zorder(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
622 if (!ctx || !ctx->windows || ctx->windows->nb_items < 2) return;
623
624 /* Sort by (group, z_value) so that group ordering is always respected:
625 * ALWAYS_BEHIND windows always precede FIXED, which always precede NORMAL,
626 * which always precede ALWAYS_ON_TOP, regardless of z_value magnitude.
627 * Within the FIXED group, windows are ordered by z_value (lower = behind).
628 * Within the same (group, z_value), list order is preserved (stable sort). */
629
630 /* collect into array for stable sort */
631 int n = (int)ctx->windows->nb_items;
632 N_GUI_WINDOW** arr = NULL;
633 Malloc(arr, N_GUI_WINDOW*, (size_t)n);
634 if (!arr) return;
635
636 int idx = 0;
637 list_foreach(node, ctx->windows) {
638 arr[idx++] = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
639 }
640
641 /* stable insertion sort by (group, z_value) */
642 for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) {
643 N_GUI_WINDOW* tmp = arr[i];
644 int gi = _zorder_group(tmp);
645 int j = i - 1;
646 while (j >= 0) {
647 int gj = _zorder_group(arr[j]);
648 /* z_value secondary sort applies only within the FIXED group (ordinal 1) */
649 if (gj > gi || (gj == gi && gi == 1 && arr[j]->z_value > tmp->z_value)) {
650 arr[j + 1] = arr[j];
651 j--;
652 } else {
653 break;
654 }
655 }
656 arr[j + 1] = tmp;
657 }
658
659 /* rebuild list in sorted order */
660 /* detach all nodes without destroying windows */
661 while (ctx->windows->nb_items > 0) {
662 LIST_NODE* node = ctx->windows->start;
663 node->destroy_func = NULL;
664 remove_list_node_f(ctx->windows, node);
665 }
666 for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
667 list_push(ctx->windows, arr[i], _destroy_window);
668 }
669 Free(arr);
670}
671
677void n_gui_raise_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
678 __n_assert(ctx, return);
679 LIST_NODE* node = _find_window_node(ctx, window_id);
680 if (!node) return;
681 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
682 /* only NORMAL windows can be freely raised */
683 if (win->z_order != N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL) return;
684 /* remove from list without destroying, then push to end */
685 node->destroy_func = NULL;
686 remove_list_node_f(ctx->windows, node);
687 list_push(ctx->windows, win, _destroy_window);
688 _sort_windows_by_zorder(ctx);
689}
690
695void n_gui_lower_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
696 __n_assert(ctx, return);
697 LIST_NODE* node = _find_window_node(ctx, window_id);
698 if (!node) return;
699 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr;
700 if (win->z_order != N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL) return;
701 node->destroy_func = NULL;
702 remove_list_node_f(ctx->windows, node);
703 list_unshift(ctx->windows, win, _destroy_window);
704 _sort_windows_by_zorder(ctx);
705}
706
711void n_gui_window_set_zorder(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, int z_mode, int z_value) {
712 __n_assert(ctx, return);
713 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
714 if (!win) return;
715 if (z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL && z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_ON_TOP &&
716 z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_BEHIND && z_mode != N_GUI_ZORDER_FIXED) {
717 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_window_set_zorder: unknown z_mode %d for window %d (expected N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL, N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_ON_TOP, N_GUI_ZORDER_ALWAYS_BEHIND, or N_GUI_ZORDER_FIXED), falling back to N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL", z_mode, window_id);
718 z_mode = N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL;
719 }
720 win->z_order = z_mode;
721 win->z_value = z_value;
722 _sort_windows_by_zorder(ctx);
723}
724
728int n_gui_window_get_zorder(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
729 __n_assert(ctx, return N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL);
730 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
731 if (!win) return N_GUI_ZORDER_NORMAL;
732 return win->z_order;
733}
734
738int n_gui_window_get_zvalue(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
739 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
740 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
741 if (!win) return 0;
742 return win->z_value;
743}
744
749int n_gui_add_window_auto(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* title, float x, float y) {
750 /* start with minimum size, will be expanded by n_gui_window_autosize */
751 return n_gui_add_window(ctx, title, x, y, ctx->style.min_win_w, ctx->style.min_win_h);
752}
753
757void n_gui_toggle_window(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
758 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
759 if (win) win->state ^= N_GUI_WIN_OPEN;
760}
761
766int n_gui_window_is_open(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
767 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
768 if (win) return (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN) ? 1 : 0;
769 return 0;
770}
771
775void n_gui_window_set_flags(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, int flags) {
776 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
777 if (win) win->flags = flags;
778}
779
784int n_gui_window_get_flags(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
785 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
786 if (win) return win->flags;
787 return 0;
788}
789
794void n_gui_window_autosize(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
795 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
796 if (!win || !win->widgets) return;
797
798 float max_right = 0.0f;
799 float max_bottom = 0.0f;
800 float pad = 20.0f;
801
802 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
803 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr;
804 if (!wgt) continue;
805 float r = wgt->x + wgt->w;
806 float b = wgt->y + wgt->h;
807 if (r > max_right) max_right = r;
808 if (b > max_bottom) max_bottom = b;
809 }
810
811 float new_w = max_right + pad;
812 float new_h = max_bottom + pad + _win_tbh(win);
813 if (new_w < win->min_w) new_w = win->min_w;
814 if (new_h < win->min_h) new_h = win->min_h;
815 win->w = new_w;
816 win->h = new_h;
817}
818
823void n_gui_window_set_autofit(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, int autofit_flags, float border) {
824 __n_assert(ctx, return);
825 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
826 if (!win) {
827 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_window_set_autofit: window %d not found", window_id);
828 return;
829 }
830 win->autofit_flags = autofit_flags;
831 win->autofit_border = border;
832 /* capture current position as the insertion point for centering */
833 win->autofit_origin_x = win->x;
834 win->autofit_origin_y = win->y;
835}
836
842void n_gui_window_apply_autofit(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id) {
843 __n_assert(ctx, return);
844 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
845 if (!win) return;
846 if (win->autofit_flags == 0) return;
847 if (!win->widgets) return;
848
849 /* compute content bounding box from visible widgets */
850 float max_right = 0.0f;
851 float max_bottom = 0.0f;
852 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
853 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr;
854 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible) continue;
855 float r = wgt->x + wgt->w;
856 float b = wgt->y + wgt->h;
857 if (r > max_right) max_right = r;
858 if (b > max_bottom) max_bottom = b;
859 }
860
861 float border = win->autofit_border;
862 float tbh = _win_tbh(win);
863
864 int center = (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_CENTER) ? 1 : 0;
865
866 /* apply width adjustment */
867 if (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_W) {
868 float needed_w = max_right + border * 2.0f;
869 if (needed_w < win->min_w) needed_w = win->min_w;
870 if (center) {
871 win->x = win->autofit_origin_x - needed_w / 2.0f;
872 } else if (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_EXPAND_LEFT) {
873 win->x -= (needed_w - win->w);
874 }
875 win->w = needed_w;
876 }
877
878 /* apply height adjustment */
879 if (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_H) {
880 float needed_h = max_bottom + border * 2.0f + tbh;
881 if (needed_h < win->min_h) needed_h = win->min_h;
882 if (center) {
883 win->y = win->autofit_origin_y - needed_h / 2.0f;
884 } else if (win->autofit_flags & N_GUI_AUTOFIT_EXPAND_UP) {
885 win->y -= (needed_h - win->h);
886 }
887 win->h = needed_h;
888 }
889
890 /* update content extents for scrollbar calculations */
891 win->content_w = max_right;
892 win->content_h = max_bottom;
893}
894
896static void _window_update_content_size(N_GUI_WINDOW* win, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font) {
897 if (!win || !win->widgets) return;
898 float max_right = 0.0f;
899 float max_bottom = 0.0f;
900 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
901 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr;
902 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible) continue;
903 float r = wgt->x + wgt->w;
904 float b = wgt->y + wgt->h;
905 /* for labels in auto-scrollbar windows, use actual text pixel width
906 * so that horizontal scrollbar appears when text overflows */
907 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)) {
908 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
909 if (lb && lb->text[0] && lb->align != N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
910 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
911 if (font) {
912 float tw = _text_w(font,lb->text);
913 float text_r = wgt->x + tw + 8.0f; /* small padding */
914 if (text_r > r) r = text_r;
915 }
916 }
917 }
918 if (r > max_right) max_right = r;
919 if (b > max_bottom) max_bottom = b;
920 }
921 win->content_w = max_right;
922 win->content_h = max_bottom;
923}
924
925/* =========================================================================
926 * WIDGET CREATION
927 * ========================================================================= */
928
933int n_gui_add_button(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, int shape, void (*on_click)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
934 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
935 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
936 __n_assert(win, return -1);
937
938 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON, x, y, w, h);
939 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
940
941 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = NULL;
942 Malloc(bd, N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA, 1);
943 __n_assert(bd, Free(wgt); return -1);
944 if (label) {
945 strncpy(bd->label, label, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
946 bd->label[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
947 }
948 bd->bitmap = NULL;
949 bd->bitmap_hover = NULL;
950 bd->bitmap_active = NULL;
951 bd->shape = shape;
952 bd->toggle_mode = 0;
953 bd->toggled = 0;
954 bd->keycode = 0;
955 bd->key_modifiers = 0;
956 bd->on_click = on_click;
957 bd->user_data = user_data;
958 wgt->data = bd;
959
960 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
961 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
962 return wgt->id;
963}
964
969int n_gui_add_button_bitmap(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* normal, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hover, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* active, void (*on_click)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
970 int id = n_gui_add_button(ctx, window_id, label, x, y, w, h, N_GUI_SHAPE_BITMAP, on_click, user_data);
971 if (id < 0) return -1;
972 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, id);
973 if (wgt && wgt->data) {
974 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
975 bd->bitmap = normal;
976 bd->bitmap_hover = hover;
977 bd->bitmap_active = active;
978 }
979 return id;
980}
981
997int n_gui_add_toggle_button(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, int shape, int initial_state, void (*on_click)(int, void*), void* user_data) {
998 int id = n_gui_add_button(ctx, window_id, label, x, y, w, h, shape, on_click, user_data);
999 if (id < 0) return -1;
1000 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, id);
1001 if (wgt && wgt->data) {
1002 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
1003 bd->toggle_mode = 1;
1004 bd->toggled = initial_state ? 1 : 0;
1005 }
1006 return id;
1007}
1008
1013int n_gui_button_is_toggled(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1014 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1015 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1016 return ((N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data)->toggled;
1017 }
1018 return 0;
1019}
1020
1024void n_gui_button_set_toggled(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int toggled) {
1025 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1026 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1027 ((N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data)->toggled = toggled ? 1 : 0;
1028 }
1029}
1030
1037void n_gui_button_set_toggle_mode(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int toggle_mode) {
1038 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1039 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1040 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data;
1041 bd->toggle_mode = toggle_mode ? 1 : 0;
1042 if (!bd->toggle_mode) bd->toggled = 0;
1043 }
1044}
1045
1056void n_gui_button_set_keycode(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int keycode, int modifiers) {
1057 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1058 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON && w->data) {
1059 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)w->data;
1060 bd->keycode = keycode;
1061 bd->key_modifiers = modifiers & N_GUI_KEY_MOD_MASK;
1062 }
1063}
1064
1069int n_gui_add_slider(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float w, float h, double min_val, double max_val, double initial, int mode, void (*on_change)(int, double, void*), void* user_data) {
1070 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
1071 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1072 __n_assert(win, return -1);
1073
1074 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER, x, y, w, h);
1075 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
1076
1077 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = NULL;
1078 Malloc(sd, N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA, 1);
1079 __n_assert(sd, Free(wgt); return -1);
1080 if (mode == N_GUI_SLIDER_PERCENT) {
1081 sd->min_val = 0.0;
1082 sd->max_val = 100.0;
1083 } else {
1084 sd->min_val = min_val;
1085 sd->max_val = max_val;
1086 }
1087 sd->step = 0.0; /* 0 = no step constraint (treated as continuous, snaps with step=1 only when explicitly set) */
1088 sd->value = _clamp(initial, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
1089 sd->mode = mode;
1090 sd->orientation = N_GUI_SLIDER_H;
1091 sd->on_change = on_change;
1092 sd->user_data = user_data;
1093 wgt->data = sd;
1094
1095 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
1096 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1097 return wgt->id;
1098}
1099
1104int n_gui_add_vslider(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float w, float h, double min_val, double max_val, double initial, int mode, void (*on_change)(int, double, void*), void* user_data) {
1105 int id = n_gui_add_slider(ctx, window_id, x, y, w, h, min_val, max_val, initial, mode, on_change, user_data);
1106 if (id < 0) return -1;
1107 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, id);
1108 if (wgt && wgt->data) {
1109 ((N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)wgt->data)->orientation = N_GUI_SLIDER_V;
1110 }
1111 return id;
1112}
1113
1118int n_gui_add_textarea(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float w, float h, int multiline, size_t char_limit, void (*on_change)(int, const char*, void*), void* user_data) {
1119 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
1120 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1121 __n_assert(win, return -1);
1122
1123 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA, x, y, w, h);
1124 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
1125
1126 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = NULL;
1127 Malloc(td, N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA, 1);
1128 __n_assert(td, Free(wgt); return -1);
1129 td->text[0] = '\0';
1130 td->text_len = 0;
1131 td->char_limit = (char_limit > 0 && char_limit < N_GUI_TEXT_MAX) ? char_limit : N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1;
1132 td->multiline = multiline;
1133 td->cursor_pos = 0;
1134 td->sel_start = 0;
1135 td->sel_end = 0;
1136 td->scroll_y = 0;
1137 td->scroll_x = 0.0f;
1138 td->cursor_time = 0.0;
1139 td->bg_bitmap = NULL;
1140 td->mask_char = '\0';
1141 td->on_change = on_change;
1142 td->user_data = user_data;
1143 wgt->data = td;
1144
1145 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
1146 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1147 return wgt->id;
1148}
1149
1154int n_gui_add_checkbox(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, int initial_checked, void (*on_toggle)(int, int, void*), void* user_data) {

1183int n_gui_add_scrollbar(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, float x, float y, float w, float h, int orientation, int shape, double content_size, double viewport_size, void (*on_scroll)(int, double, void*), void* user_data) {

1187

1189 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
1190
1191 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = NULL;
1192 Malloc(sb, N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA, 1);
1193 __n_assert(sb, Free(wgt); return -1);
1194 sb->orientation = orientation;
1195 sb->content_size = content_size > 0 ? content_size : 1;
1196 sb->viewport_size = viewport_size > 0 ? viewport_size : 1;
1197 sb->scroll_pos = 0;
1198 sb->shape = shape;
1199 sb->on_scroll = on_scroll;
1200 sb->user_data = user_data;
1201 wgt->data = sb;
1202
1203 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
1204 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1205 return wgt->id;
1206}

1345int n_gui_add_label(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* text, float x, float y, float w, float h, int align) {
1346 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
1347 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
1348 __n_assert(win, return -1);
1349
1350 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL, x, y, w, h);
1351 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
1352
1353 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = NULL;
1354 Malloc(lb, N_GUI_LABEL_DATA, 1);
1355 __n_assert(lb, Free(wgt); return -1);
1356 lb->text[0] = '\0';
1357 if (text) {
1358 strncpy(lb->text, text, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1);
1359 lb->text[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1] = '\0';
1360 }
1361 lb->link[0] = '\0';
1362 lb->align = align;
1363 lb->scroll_y = 0.0f;
1364 lb->sel_start = -1;
1365 lb->sel_end = -1;
1366 lb->sel_dragging = 0;
1367 lb->on_link_click = NULL;
1368 lb->user_data = NULL;
1369 wgt->data = lb;
1370
1371 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
1372 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
1373 return wgt->id;
1374}
1375
1380int n_gui_add_label_link(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* text, const char* link, float x, float y, float w, float h, int align, void (*on_link_click)(int, const char*, void*), void* user_data) {
1381 int wid = n_gui_add_label(ctx, window_id, text, x, y, w, h, align);
1382 if (wid < 0) return -1;
1383 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, wid);
1384 if (wgt && wgt->data) {
1385 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
1386 if (link) {
1387 strncpy(lb->link, link, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1);
1388 lb->link[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1] = '\0';
1389 }
1390 lb->on_link_click = on_link_click;
1391 lb->user_data = user_data;
1392 }
1393 return wid;
1394}
1395
1396/* =========================================================================
1397 * WIDGET ACCESS
1398 * ========================================================================= */
1399
1403N_GUI_WIDGET* n_gui_get_widget(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1404 __n_assert(ctx, return NULL);
1405 char key[32];
1406 snprintf(key, sizeof(key), "%d", widget_id);
1407 void* ptr = NULL;
1408 if (ht_get_ptr(ctx->widgets_by_id, key, &ptr) == TRUE && ptr) {
1409 return (N_GUI_WIDGET*)ptr;
1410 }
1411 return NULL;
1412}
1413
1417void n_gui_set_widget_theme(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, N_GUI_THEME theme) {
1418 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1419 if (w) w->theme = theme;
1420}
1421
1425void n_gui_set_widget_visible(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int visible) {
1426 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1427 if (w) w->visible = visible;
1428}
1429
1434void n_gui_set_widget_enabled(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int enabled) {
1435 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1436 if (w) w->enabled = enabled;
1437}
1438
1443int n_gui_is_widget_enabled(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1444 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1445 if (w) return w->enabled;
1446 return 0;
1447}
1448
1455void n_gui_set_focus(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1456 __n_assert(ctx, return);
1457
1458 /* clear focus from previously focused widget */
1459 if (ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
1460 N_GUI_WIDGET* prev = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
1461 if (prev) prev->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
1462 }
1463
1464 if (widget_id < 0) {
1465 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
1466 return;
1467 }
1468
1469 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1470 if (!wgt) {
1471 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_set_focus: widget %d not found", widget_id);
1472 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
1473 return;
1474 }
1475
1476 ctx->focused_widget_id = widget_id;
1477 wgt->state |= N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
1478
1479 /* reset cursor blink timer for textareas */
1480 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && wgt->data) {
1481 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
1482 td->cursor_time = al_get_time();
1483 }
1484
1485 /* raise the parent window */
1486 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
1487 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
1488 if (!win || !win->widgets) continue;
1489 list_foreach(wgnode, win->widgets) {
1490 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgnode->ptr;
1491 if (w && w->id == widget_id) {
1492 if (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN) {
1493 n_gui_raise_window(ctx, win->id);
1494 }
1495 return;
1496 }
1497 }
1498 }
1499}
1500
1501/* ---- slider helpers ---- */
1502
1509double n_gui_slider_get_value(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1510 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1511 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER && w->data) {
1512 return ((N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data)->value;
1513 }
1514 return 0.0;
1515}
1516
1523void n_gui_slider_set_value(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double value) {
1524 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1525 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER && w->data) {
1526 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data;
1527 if (sd->step > 0.0)
1528 sd->value = _slider_snap_value(value, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, sd->step);
1529 else
1530 sd->value = _clamp(value, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
1531 }
1532}
1533
1541void n_gui_slider_set_range(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double min_val, double max_val) {
1542 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1543 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER && w->data) {
1544 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data;
1545 sd->min_val = min_val;
1546 sd->max_val = max_val;
1547 if (sd->step > 0.0)
1548 sd->value = _slider_snap_value(sd->value, min_val, max_val, sd->step);
1549 else
1550 sd->value = _clamp(sd->value, min_val, max_val);
1551 }
1552}
1553
1561void n_gui_slider_set_step(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double step) {
1562 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1563 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER && w->data) {
1564 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)w->data;
1565 sd->step = step;
1566 if (step > 0.0) {
1567 sd->value = _slider_snap_value(sd->value, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, step);
1568 }
1569 }
1570}
1571
1572/* ---- textarea helpers ---- */
1573
1580const char* n_gui_textarea_get_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1581 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1582 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && w->data) {
1583 return ((N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data)->text;
1584 }
1585 return "";
1586}
1587
1594void n_gui_textarea_set_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
1595 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1596 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && w->data) {
1597 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)w->data;
1598 if (text) {
1599 strncpy(td->text, text, td->char_limit);
1600 td->text[td->char_limit] = '\0';
1601 td->text_len = strlen(td->text);
1602 td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
1603 } else {
1604 td->text[0] = '\0';
1605 td->text_len = 0;
1606 td->cursor_pos = 0;
1607 }
1608 td->scroll_x = 0.0f;
1609 }
1610}
1611
1612/* ---- checkbox helpers ---- */
1613
1620int n_gui_checkbox_is_checked(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1621 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1622 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX && w->data) {
1623 return ((N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)w->data)->checked;
1624 }
1625 return 0;
1626}
1627
1634void n_gui_checkbox_set_checked(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int checked) {
1635 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1636 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX && w->data) {
1637 ((N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)w->data)->checked = checked ? 1 : 0;
1638 }
1639}
1640
1641/* ---- scrollbar helpers ---- */
1642
1649double n_gui_scrollbar_get_pos(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1650 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1651 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR && w->data) {
1652 return ((N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)w->data)->scroll_pos;
1653 }
1654 return 0.0;
1655}
1656
1663void n_gui_scrollbar_set_pos(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double pos) {
1664 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1665 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR && w->data) {
1666 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)w->data;
1667 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
1668 if (max_scroll < 0) max_scroll = 0;
1669 sb->scroll_pos = _clamp(pos, 0, max_scroll);
1670 }
1671}
1672
1680void n_gui_scrollbar_set_sizes(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, double content_size, double viewport_size) {
1681 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1682 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR && w->data) {
1683 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)w->data;
1684 sb->content_size = content_size > 0 ? content_size : 1;
1685 sb->viewport_size = viewport_size > 0 ? viewport_size : 1;
1686 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
1687 if (max_scroll < 0) max_scroll = 0;
1688 sb->scroll_pos = _clamp(sb->scroll_pos, 0, max_scroll);
1689 }
1690}
1691
1692/* ---- listbox helpers ---- */
1693
1701int n_gui_listbox_add_item(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
1702 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1703 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return -1;
1704 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1705 if (!_items_grow(&ld->items, &ld->nb_items, &ld->items_capacity)) return -1;
1706 N_GUI_LISTITEM* item = &ld->items[ld->nb_items];
1707 item->text[0] = '\0';
1708 if (text) {
1709 strncpy(item->text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
1710 item->text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
1711 }
1712 item->selected = 0;
1713 ld->nb_items++;
1714 return (int)(ld->nb_items - 1);
1715}
1716
1724int n_gui_listbox_remove_item(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
1725 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1726 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return -1;
1727 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1728 if (index < 0 || (size_t)index >= ld->nb_items) return -1;
1729 if ((size_t)index < ld->nb_items - 1) {
1730 memmove(&ld->items[index], &ld->items[index + 1],
1731 (ld->nb_items - (size_t)index - 1) * sizeof(N_GUI_LISTITEM));
1732 }
1733 ld->nb_items--;
1734 /* clamp scroll_offset after removal */
1735 if (ld->nb_items == 0) {
1736 ld->scroll_offset = 0;
1737 } else if (ld->scroll_offset > 0 && (size_t)ld->scroll_offset >= ld->nb_items) {
1738 ld->scroll_offset = (int)(ld->nb_items - 1);
1739 }
1740 return 0;
1741}
1742
1748void n_gui_listbox_clear(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1749 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1750 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
1751 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1752 ld->nb_items = 0;
1753 ld->scroll_offset = 0;
1754 }
1755}
1756
1763int n_gui_listbox_get_count(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1764 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1765 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
1766 return (int)((N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data)->nb_items;
1767 }
1768 return 0;
1769}
1770
1778const char* n_gui_listbox_get_item_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
1779 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1780 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
1781 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1782 if (index >= 0 && (size_t)index < ld->nb_items) {
1783 return ld->items[index].text;
1784 }
1785 }
1786 return "";
1787}
1788
1795int n_gui_listbox_get_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1796 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1797 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
1798 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1799 for (size_t i = 0; i < ld->nb_items; i++) {
1800 if (ld->items[i].selected) return (int)i;
1801 }
1802 }
1803 return -1;
1804}
1805
1813int n_gui_listbox_is_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
1814 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1815 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX && w->data) {
1816 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1817 if (index >= 0 && (size_t)index < ld->nb_items) {
1818 return ld->items[index].selected;
1819 }
1820 }
1821 return 0;
1822}
1823
1831void n_gui_listbox_set_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index, int selected) {
1832 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1833 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return;
1834 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1835 if (index < 0 || (size_t)index >= ld->nb_items) return;
1836 if (ld->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE && selected) {
1837 for (size_t i = 0; i < ld->nb_items; i++) ld->items[i].selected = 0;
1838 }
1839 ld->items[index].selected = selected ? 1 : 0;
1840}
1841
1842int n_gui_listbox_get_scroll_offset(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1843 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1844 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return 0;
1845 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1846 return ld->scroll_offset;
1847}
1848
1849void n_gui_listbox_set_scroll_offset(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int offset) {
1850 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1851 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX || !w->data) return;
1852 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1853 int max_offset = (int)ld->nb_items - (int)(w->h / ld->item_height);
1854 if (max_offset < 0) max_offset = 0;
1855 if (offset < 0) offset = 0;
1856 if (offset > max_offset) offset = max_offset;
1857 ld->scroll_offset = offset;
1858}
1859
1860/* ---- radiolist helpers ---- */
1861
1869int n_gui_radiolist_add_item(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {

1871 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST || !w->data) return -1;
1872 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data;
1873 if (!_items_grow(&rd->items, &rd->nb_items, &rd->items_capacity)) return -1;
1874 N_GUI_LISTITEM* item = &rd->items[rd->nb_items];
1875 item->text[0] = '\0';
1876 if (text) {
1877 strncpy(item->text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
1878 item->text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
1879 }
1880 item->selected = 0;
1881 rd->nb_items++;
1882 return (int)(rd->nb_items - 1);
1883}

1891int n_gui_radiolist_get_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1892 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1893 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST && w->data) {
1894 return ((N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data)->selected_index;
1895 }
1896 return -1;
1897}
1898
1905void n_gui_radiolist_set_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
1906 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1907 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST && w->data) {
1908 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)w->data;
1909 if (index >= -1 && (index == -1 || (size_t)index < rd->nb_items)) {
1910 rd->selected_index = index;
1911 }
1912 }
1913}

1915/* ---- combobox helpers ---- */
1916
1922void n_gui_combobox_clear(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1923 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1924 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX || !w->data) return;
1925 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1926 if (cd->items && cd->nb_items > 0) {
1927 memset(cd->items, 0, cd->nb_items * sizeof(N_GUI_LISTITEM));
1928 }
1929 cd->nb_items = 0;
1930 cd->selected_index = -1;
1931 cd->scroll_offset = 0;
1932 cd->is_open = 0;
1933}
1934
1935int n_gui_combobox_add_item(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text) {
1936 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1937 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX || !w->data) return -1;
1938 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1939 if (!_items_grow(&cd->items, &cd->nb_items, &cd->items_capacity)) return -1;
1940 N_GUI_LISTITEM* item = &cd->items[cd->nb_items];
1941 item->text[0] = '\0';
1942 if (text) {
1943 strncpy(item->text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
1944 item->text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
1945 }
1946 item->selected = 0;
1947 cd->nb_items++;
1948 return (int)(cd->nb_items - 1);
1949}
1950
1957int n_gui_combobox_get_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
1958 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1959 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX && w->data) {
1960 return ((N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data)->selected_index;
1961 }
1962 return -1;
1963}
1964
1971void n_gui_combobox_set_selected(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index) {
1972 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
1973 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX && w->data) {
1974 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)w->data;
1975 if (index >= -1 && (index == -1 || (size_t)index < cd->nb_items)) {
1976 cd->selected_index = index;
1977 }
1978 }
1979}

2010 lb->text[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2011 } else {
2012 lb->text[0] = '\0';
2013 }

2016
2023void n_gui_label_set_link(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* link) {
2024 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2025 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && w->data) {
2026 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)w->data;
2027 if (link) {
2028 strncpy(lb->link, link, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1);

2032 }

2035
2036/* =========================================================================
2037 * DROPDOWN MENU
2038 * ========================================================================= */
2039
2041static int _dropmenu_entries_grow(N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY** entries, size_t* nb, size_t* cap) {
2042 if (*nb >= *cap) {
2043 size_t new_cap = (*cap == 0) ? 8 : (*cap) * 2;
2044 if (new_cap < *cap) return 0; /* overflow */
2045 N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY* tmp = NULL;
2046 Malloc(tmp, N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY, new_cap);
2047 if (!tmp) return 0;
2048 if (*entries && *nb > 0) {
2049 memcpy(tmp, *entries, (*nb) * sizeof(N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY));
2050 }
2051 FreeNoLog(*entries);
2052 *entries = tmp;
2053 *cap = new_cap;
2054 }
2055 return 1;
2056}
2057
2062int n_gui_add_dropmenu(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int window_id, const char* label, float x, float y, float w, float h, void (*on_open)(int, void*), void* on_open_user_data) {
2063 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
2064 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, window_id);
2065 __n_assert(win, return -1);
2066
2067 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = _new_widget(ctx, N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU, x, y, w, h);
2068 __n_assert(wgt, return -1);
2069
2070 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = NULL;
2071 Malloc(dd, N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA, 1);
2072 __n_assert(dd, Free(wgt); return -1);
2073 dd->label[0] = '\0';
2074 if (label) {
2075 strncpy(dd->label, label, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2076 dd->label[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2077 }
2078 dd->entries = NULL;
2079 dd->nb_entries = 0;
2080 dd->entries_capacity = 0;
2081 dd->is_open = 0;
2082 dd->scroll_offset = 0;
2083 dd->max_visible = ctx->style.dropmenu_max_visible;
2084 dd->item_height = h;
2085 dd->on_open = on_open;
2086 dd->on_open_user_data = on_open_user_data;
2087 wgt->data = dd;
2088
2089 list_push(win->widgets, wgt, _destroy_widget);
2090 _register_widget(ctx, wgt);
2091 return wgt->id;
2092}
2093
2098int n_gui_dropmenu_add_entry(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text, int tag, void (*on_click)(int, int, int, void*), void* user_data) {
2099 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2100 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return -1;
2101 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2102 if (!_dropmenu_entries_grow(&dd->entries, &dd->nb_entries, &dd->entries_capacity)) return -1;
2103 N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY* e = &dd->entries[dd->nb_entries];
2104 memset(e, 0, sizeof(*e));
2105 if (text) {
2106 strncpy(e->text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2107 e->text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2108 }
2109 e->is_dynamic = 0;
2110 e->tag = tag;
2111 e->on_click = on_click;
2112 e->user_data = user_data;
2113 dd->nb_entries++;
2114 return (int)(dd->nb_entries - 1);
2115}
2116
2121int n_gui_dropmenu_add_dynamic_entry(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, const char* text, int tag, void (*on_click)(int, int, int, void*), void* user_data) {
2122 int idx = n_gui_dropmenu_add_entry(ctx, widget_id, text, tag, on_click, user_data);
2123 if (idx < 0)
2124 return idx;
2125
2126 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2127 if (!w) {
2128 n_log(LOG_ERR, "Invalid NULL widget for ctx %p widget_id %d", ctx, widget_id);
2129 return -1;
2130 }
2131
2132 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2133 if (!dd) {
2134 n_log(LOG_ERR, "Widget has NULL data for ctx %p widget_id %d", ctx, widget_id);
2135 return -1;
2136 }
2137
2138 dd->entries[idx].is_dynamic = 1;
2139
2140 return idx;
2141}
2142
2146void n_gui_dropmenu_clear_dynamic(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2147 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2148 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return;
2149 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2150 /* compact: keep only non-dynamic entries */
2151 size_t write = 0;
2152 for (size_t i = 0; i < dd->nb_entries; i++) {
2153 if (!dd->entries[i].is_dynamic) {
2154 if (write != i) {
2155 dd->entries[write] = dd->entries[i];
2156 }
2157 write++;
2158 }
2159 }
2160 dd->nb_entries = write;
2161 /* clamp scroll_offset after removal */
2162 if (dd->nb_entries == 0) {
2163 dd->scroll_offset = 0;
2164 } else {
2165 int max_vis = dd->max_visible > 0 ? dd->max_visible : 8;
2166 int dm_max = (int)dd->nb_entries - max_vis;
2167 if (dm_max < 0) dm_max = 0;
2168 if (dd->scroll_offset > dm_max) dd->scroll_offset = dm_max;
2169 }
2170}
2171
2175void n_gui_dropmenu_clear(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2176 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2177 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return;
2178 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2179 dd->nb_entries = 0;
2180 dd->scroll_offset = 0;
2181}
2182
2186void n_gui_dropmenu_set_entry_text(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id, int index, const char* text) {
2187 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2188 if (!w || w->type != N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU || !w->data) return;
2189 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data;
2190 if (index < 0 || (size_t)index >= dd->nb_entries) return;
2191 if (text) {
2192 strncpy(dd->entries[index].text, text, N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1);
2193 dd->entries[index].text[N_GUI_ID_MAX - 1] = '\0';
2194 }
2195}
2196
2200int n_gui_dropmenu_get_count(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, int widget_id) {
2201 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, widget_id);
2202 if (w && w->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU && w->data) {
2203 return (int)((N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)w->data)->nb_entries;
2204 }
2205 return 0;
2206}

2381
2382/* =========================================================================
2383 * DRAWING - individual widget renderers
2384 * ========================================================================= */
2385
2388static void _draw_bitmap_scaled(ALLEGRO_BITMAP* bmp, float dx, float dy, float dw, float dh, int mode) {
2389 float bw = (float)al_get_bitmap_width(bmp);
2390 float bh = (float)al_get_bitmap_height(bmp);
2391 if (mode == N_GUI_IMAGE_STRETCH) {
2392 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(bmp, 0, 0, bw, bh, dx, dy, dw, dh, 0);
2393 } else if (mode == N_GUI_IMAGE_CENTER) {
2394 al_draw_bitmap(bmp, dx + (dw - bw) / 2.0f, dy + (dh - bh) / 2.0f, 0);
2395 } else {
2396 /* N_GUI_IMAGE_FIT: maintain aspect ratio */
2397 float sx = dw / bw;
2398 float sy = dh / bh;
2399 float s = (sx < sy) ? sx : sy;
2400 float rw = bw * s;
2401 float rh = bh * s;
2402 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(bmp, 0, 0, bw, bh, dx + (dw - rw) / 2.0f, dy + (dh - rh) / 2.0f, rw, rh, 0);
2403 }
2404}
2405
2409static ALLEGRO_BITMAP* _select_state_bitmap(int state, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* normal_bmp, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hover_bmp, ALLEGRO_BITMAP* active_bmp) {
2410 if ((state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) && active_bmp) return active_bmp;
2411 if ((state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) && hover_bmp) return hover_bmp;
2412 if (normal_bmp) return normal_bmp;
2413 return NULL;
2414}
2415
2421static void _set_clipping_rect_transformed(int wx, int wy, int ww, int wh) {
2422 /* Transform all 4 corners from world space to screen space so that the
2423 * axis-aligned bounding box is computed correctly for any affine transform
2424 * (including negative scaling, rotation, or shear). */
2425 const ALLEGRO_TRANSFORM* tf = al_get_current_transform();
2426 float cx[4], cy[4];
2427 cx[0] = (float)wx;
2428 cy[0] = (float)wy;
2429 cx[1] = (float)(wx + ww);
2430 cy[1] = (float)wy;
2431 cx[2] = (float)wx;
2432 cy[2] = (float)(wy + wh);
2433 cx[3] = (float)(wx + ww);
2434 cy[3] = (float)(wy + wh);
2435 for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
2436 al_transform_coordinates(tf, &cx[i], &cy[i]);
2437
2438 float min_x = cx[0], max_x = cx[0];
2439 float min_y = cy[0], max_y = cy[0];
2440 for (int i = 1; i < 4; i++) {
2441 if (cx[i] < min_x) min_x = cx[i];
2442 if (cx[i] > max_x) max_x = cx[i];
2443 if (cy[i] < min_y) min_y = cy[i];
2444 if (cy[i] > max_y) max_y = cy[i];
2445 }
2446
2447 int new_x = (int)min_x;
2448 int new_y = (int)min_y;
2449 int new_w = (int)(max_x - min_x);
2450 int new_h = (int)(max_y - min_y);
2451
2452 /* intersect with the current (parent) clipping rectangle */
2453 int pcx, pcy, pcw, pch;
2454 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&pcx, &pcy, &pcw, &pch);
2455
2456 int right = new_x + new_w;
2457 int bottom = new_y + new_h;
2458 int prev_right = pcx + pcw;
2459 int prev_bottom = pcy + pch;
2460
2461 if (new_x < pcx) new_x = pcx;
2462 if (new_y < pcy) new_y = pcy;
2463 if (right > prev_right) right = prev_right;
2464 if (bottom > prev_bottom) bottom = prev_bottom;
2465
2466 new_w = right - new_x;
2467 new_h = bottom - new_y;
2468 if (new_w < 0) new_w = 0;
2469 if (new_h < 0) new_h = 0;
2470
2471 al_set_clipping_rectangle(new_x, new_y, new_w, new_h);
2472}
2473
2476static void _draw_text_truncated(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, ALLEGRO_COLOR color, float x, float y, float max_w, const char* text) {
2477 if (!font || !text || !text[0]) return;
2478 float tw = _text_w(font,text);
2479 if (tw <= max_w) {
2480 al_draw_text(font, color, x, y, 0, text);
2481 return;
2482 }
2483 /* find how many chars fit + "..." */
2484 float ellipsis_w = _text_w(font,"...");
2485 float avail = max_w - ellipsis_w;
2486 if (avail < 0) avail = 0;
2487 size_t len = strlen(text);
2488 char buf[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
2489 size_t fit = 0;
2490 for (size_t i = 0; i < len && i < (size_t)(N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 5); i++) {
2491 buf[i] = text[i];
2492 buf[i + 1] = '\0';
2493 float cw = _text_w(font,buf);
2494 if (cw > avail) break;
2495 fit = i + 1;
2496 }
2497 buf[fit] = '.';
2498 buf[fit + 1] = '.';
2499 buf[fit + 2] = '.';
2500 buf[fit + 3] = '\0';
2501 al_draw_text(font, color, x, y, 0, buf);
2502}
2503
2508static void _draw_text_justified(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, ALLEGRO_COLOR color, float x, float y, float max_w, float max_h, const char* text) {
2509 if (!font || !text || !text[0]) return;
2510
2511 /* split text into words */
2512 char buf[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
2513 snprintf(buf, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX, "%s", text);
2514
2515 char* words[256];
2516 float word_widths[256];
2517 int nwords = 0;
2518 char* tok = strtok(buf, " \t");
2519 while (tok && nwords < 256) {
2520 words[nwords] = tok;
2521 word_widths[nwords] = _text_w(font,tok);
2522 nwords++;
2523 tok = strtok(NULL, " \t");
2524 }
2525 if (nwords == 0) return;
2526 if (nwords == 1) {
2527 _draw_text_truncated(font, color, x, y, max_w, text);
2528 return;
2529 }
2530
2531 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
2532 float space_w = _text_w(font," ");
2533 float cy = y;
2534 int line_start = 0;
2535
2536 while (line_start < nwords) {
2537 /* stop if there is no vertical space for another line */
2538 if (cy + fh > y + max_h + 0.5f) break;
2539
2540 /* pack as many words as fit on this line with minimum (single-space) gaps */
2541 float line_words_w = word_widths[line_start];
2542 int line_end = line_start + 1;
2543 for (int i = line_start + 1; i < nwords; i++) {
2544 float test_w = line_words_w + space_w + word_widths[i];
2545 if (test_w > max_w) break;
2546 line_words_w = test_w;
2547 line_end = i + 1;
2548 }
2549
2550 int words_on_line = line_end - line_start;
2551 int is_last_line = (line_end >= nwords);
2552
2553 if (words_on_line == 1) {
2554 /* single word: truncate with "..." if it exceeds the line width */
2555 if (word_widths[line_start] > max_w) {
2556 _draw_text_truncated(font, color, x, cy, max_w, words[line_start]);
2557 } else {
2558 al_draw_text(font, color, x, cy, 0, words[line_start]);
2559 }
2560 } else if (is_last_line) {
2561 /* last line: left-align with normal spacing */
2562 float cx = x;
2563 for (int i = line_start; i < line_end; i++) {
2564 al_draw_text(font, color, cx, cy, 0, words[i]);
2565 cx += word_widths[i] + space_w;
2566 }
2567 } else {
2568 /* full line: justify by distributing extra space between words */
2569 float total_word_w = 0;
2570 for (int i = line_start; i < line_end; i++) total_word_w += word_widths[i];
2571 float total_space = max_w - total_word_w;
2572 if (total_space < 0) total_space = 0;
2573 float gap = total_space / (float)(words_on_line - 1);
2574 float cx = x;
2575 for (int i = line_start; i < line_end; i++) {
2576 al_draw_text(font, color, cx, cy, 0, words[i]);
2577 cx += word_widths[i] + gap;
2578 }
2579 }
2580
2581 line_start = line_end;
2582 cy += fh;
2583 }
2584}
2585
2587static int _utf8_char_len(unsigned char c) {
2588 if (c < 0x80) return 1;
2589 if ((c & 0xE0) == 0xC0) return 2;
2590 if ((c & 0xF0) == 0xE0) return 3;
2591 if ((c & 0xF8) == 0xF0) return 4;
2592 return 1; /* invalid byte, treat as single byte */
2593}
2594
2597static float _textarea_content_height(N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float widget_w, float pad) {
2598 if (!font || td->text_len == 0) return 0;
2599 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
2600 float cx = 0;
2601 float cy = fh; /* at least one line */
2602 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->text_len;) {
2603 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
2604 cx = 0;
2605 cy += fh;
2606 i++;
2607 continue;
2608 }
2609 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
2610 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
2611 char ch[5];
2612 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
2613 ch[clen] = '\0';
2614 float cw = _text_w(font,ch);
2615 if (cx + cw > widget_w - pad * 2) {
2616 cx = 0;
2617 cy += fh;
2618 }
2619 cx += cw;
2620 i += (size_t)clen;
2621 }
2622 return cy;
2623}
2624
2628static int _justified_char_at_pos(const char* text, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float max_w, float text_x, float text_y, float scroll_y, float click_mx, float click_my) {
2629 if (!font || !text || !text[0]) return -1;
2630
2631 /* split text into words, tracking their byte offsets in original text */
2632 size_t text_len = strlen(text);
2633 char buf[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
2634 snprintf(buf, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX, "%s", text);
2635
2636 /* word start byte offsets in original text */
2637 int word_starts[256];
2638 int word_lens[256]; /* byte lengths */
2639 float word_widths[256];
2640 int nwords = 0;
2641
2642 size_t i = 0;
2643 while (i < text_len && nwords < 256) {
2644 /* skip whitespace */
2645 while (i < text_len && (text[i] == ' ' || text[i] == '\t')) i++;
2646 if (i >= text_len) break;
2647 size_t ws = i;
2648 while (i < text_len && text[i] != ' ' && text[i] != '\t') i++;
2649 int wlen = (int)(i - ws);
2650 word_starts[nwords] = (int)ws;
2651 word_lens[nwords] = wlen;
2652 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
2653 memcpy(tmp, &text[ws], (size_t)wlen);
2654 tmp[wlen] = '\0';
2655 word_widths[nwords] = _text_w(font,tmp);
2656 nwords++;
2657 }
2658 if (nwords == 0) return 0;
2659
2660 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
2661 float space_w = _text_w(font," ");
2662 float cy = text_y - scroll_y;
2663 float click_y_content = click_my;
2664
2665 /* find the target line */
2666 int line_start = 0;
2667 while (line_start < nwords) {
2668 float line_words_w = word_widths[line_start];
2669 int line_end = line_start + 1;
2670 for (int j = line_start + 1; j < nwords; j++) {
2671 float test_w = line_words_w + space_w + word_widths[j];
2672 if (test_w > max_w) break;
2673 line_words_w = test_w;
2674 line_end = j + 1;
2675 }
2676
2677 int words_on_line = line_end - line_start;
2678 int is_last_line = (line_end >= nwords);
2679
2680 if (click_y_content >= cy && click_y_content < cy + fh) {
2681 /* this is the target line - find character */
2682 float click_x_rel = click_mx - text_x;
2683 if (click_x_rel < 0) return word_starts[line_start];
2684
2685 /* compute gap for this line */
2686 float gap = space_w;
2687 if (!is_last_line && words_on_line > 1) {
2688 float total_word_w = 0;
2689 for (int j = line_start; j < line_end; j++) total_word_w += word_widths[j];
2690 float total_space = max_w - total_word_w;
2691 if (total_space < 0) total_space = 0;
2692 gap = total_space / (float)(words_on_line - 1);
2693 }
2694
2695 /* walk through words on this line */
2696 float cx = 0;
2697 for (int j = line_start; j < line_end; j++) {
2698 /* check within this word */
2699 if (click_x_rel >= cx && click_x_rel < cx + word_widths[j]) {
2700 /* find character within word */
2701 float wx = 0;
2702 int best_off = 0;
2703 float best_dist = click_x_rel - cx;
2704 if (best_dist < 0) best_dist = -best_dist;
2705 for (int k = 0; k < word_lens[j];) {
2706 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)text[word_starts[j] + k]);
2707 if (k + clen > word_lens[j]) clen = word_lens[j] - k;
2708 char ch[5];
2709 memcpy(ch, &text[word_starts[j] + k], (size_t)clen);
2710 ch[clen] = '\0';
2711 float cw = _text_w(font,ch);
2712 wx += cw;
2713 float dist = (click_x_rel - cx) - wx;
2714 if (dist < 0) dist = -dist;
2715 if (dist < best_dist) {
2716 best_dist = dist;
2717 best_off = k + clen;
2718 }
2719 k += clen;
2720 }
2721 return word_starts[j] + best_off;
2722 }
2723 /* check in gap between words */
2724 if (j < line_end - 1 && click_x_rel >= cx + word_widths[j] && click_x_rel < cx + word_widths[j] + gap) {
2725 /* in the gap: snap to end of current word or start of next */
2726 float mid = cx + word_widths[j] + gap / 2.0f;
2727 if (click_x_rel < mid)
2728 return word_starts[j] + word_lens[j];
2729 else
2730 return word_starts[j + 1];
2731 }
2732 cx += word_widths[j] + gap;
2733 }
2734 /* past end of line */
2735 return word_starts[line_end - 1] + word_lens[line_end - 1];
2736 }
2737
2738 cy += fh;
2739 line_start = line_end;
2740 }
2741 /* below all text: return end */
2742 return (int)text_len;
2743}
2744
2747static void _draw_justified_selection(ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float x, float y, float max_w, float max_h, const char* text, int sel_start, int sel_end, ALLEGRO_COLOR sel_color) {
2748 if (!font || !text || !text[0] || sel_start == sel_end) return;
2749 int slo = sel_start < sel_end ? sel_start : sel_end;
2750 int shi = sel_start < sel_end ? sel_end : sel_start;
2751 size_t text_len = strlen(text);
2752 if ((size_t)slo > text_len) slo = (int)text_len;
2753 if ((size_t)shi > text_len) shi = (int)text_len;
2754
2755 /* split into words with byte offsets */
2756 int word_starts[256], word_lens[256];
2757 float word_widths[256];
2758 int nwords = 0;
2759 size_t i = 0;
2760 while (i < text_len && nwords < 256) {
2761 while (i < text_len && (text[i] == ' ' || text[i] == '\t')) i++;
2762 if (i >= text_len) break;
2763 size_t ws = i;
2764 while (i < text_len && text[i] != ' ' && text[i] != '\t') i++;
2765 int wlen = (int)(i - ws);
2766 word_starts[nwords] = (int)ws;
2767 word_lens[nwords] = wlen;
2768 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
2769 memcpy(tmp, &text[ws], (size_t)wlen);
2770 tmp[wlen] = '\0';
2771 word_widths[nwords] = _text_w(font,tmp);
2772 nwords++;
2773 }
2774 if (nwords == 0) return;
2775
2776 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
2777 float space_w = _text_w(font," ");
2778 float cy = y;
2779 int line_start = 0;
2780
2781 while (line_start < nwords) {
2782 if (cy + fh > y + max_h + 0.5f) break;
2783 float line_words_w = word_widths[line_start];
2784 int line_end = line_start + 1;
2785 for (int j = line_start + 1; j < nwords; j++) {
2786 float test_w = line_words_w + space_w + word_widths[j];
2787 if (test_w > max_w) break;
2788 line_words_w = test_w;
2789 line_end = j + 1;
2790 }
2791 int words_on_line = line_end - line_start;
2792 int is_last_line = (line_end >= nwords);
2793
2794 /* compute gap for this line */
2795 float gap = space_w;
2796 if (!is_last_line && words_on_line > 1) {
2797 float total_word_w = 0;
2798 for (int j = line_start; j < line_end; j++) total_word_w += word_widths[j];
2799 float total_space = max_w - total_word_w;
2800 if (total_space < 0) total_space = 0;
2801 gap = total_space / (float)(words_on_line - 1);
2802 }
2803
2804 /* walk words and draw selection rects where overlapping */
2805 float cx = x;
2806 for (int j = line_start; j < line_end; j++) {
2807 int ws2 = word_starts[j];
2808 int we = ws2 + word_lens[j];
2809 /* check if selection overlaps this word */
2810 if (slo < we && shi > ws2) {
2811 /* find pixel range within the word */
2812 float sx1 = 0, sx2 = word_widths[j];
2813 if (slo > ws2) {
2814 char tmp2[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
2815 int off = slo - ws2;
2816 memcpy(tmp2, &text[ws2], (size_t)off);
2817 tmp2[off] = '\0';
2818 sx1 = _text_w(font,tmp2);
2819 }
2820 if (shi < we) {
2821 char tmp2[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
2822 int off = shi - ws2;
2823 memcpy(tmp2, &text[ws2], (size_t)off);
2824 tmp2[off] = '\0';
2825 sx2 = _text_w(font,tmp2);
2826 }
2827 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx + sx1, cy, cx + sx2, cy + fh, sel_color);
2828 }
2829 /* also highlight the gap (space) between words if selected */
2830 if (j < line_end - 1) {
2831 int gap_start = we; /* byte after word end */
2832 int gap_end = word_starts[j + 1]; /* byte of next word start */
2833 if (slo < gap_end && shi > gap_start) {
2834 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx + word_widths[j], cy,
2835 cx + word_widths[j] + gap, cy + fh, sel_color);
2836 }
2837 }
2838 cx += word_widths[j] + gap;
2839 }
2840
2841 cy += fh;
2842 line_start = line_end;
2843 }
2844}
2845
2848static float _label_content_height(const char* text, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float max_w) {
2849 if (!font || !text || !text[0]) return 0;
2850 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
2851 float space_w = _text_w(font," ");
2852
2853 char buf[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
2854 snprintf(buf, N_GUI_TEXT_MAX, "%s", text);
2855
2856 float word_widths[256];
2857 int nwords = 0;
2858 char* tok = strtok(buf, " \t");
2859 while (tok && nwords < 256) {
2860 word_widths[nwords] = _text_w(font,tok);
2861 nwords++;
2862 tok = strtok(NULL, " \t");
2863 }
2864 if (nwords == 0) return 0;
2865 if (nwords == 1) return fh;
2866
2867 int line_start = 0;
2868 int nlines = 0;
2869 while (line_start < nwords) {
2870 float line_words_w = word_widths[line_start];
2871 int line_end = line_start + 1;
2872 for (int i = line_start + 1; i < nwords; i++) {
2873 float test_w = line_words_w + space_w + word_widths[i];
2874 if (test_w > max_w) break;
2875 line_words_w = test_w;
2876 line_end = i + 1;
2877 }
2878 nlines++;
2879 line_start = line_end;
2880 }
2881 return (float)nlines * fh;
2882}
2883
2888static void _draw_widget_vscrollbar(float area_x, float area_y, float area_w, float view_h, float content_h, float scroll_y, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
2889 float sb_size = style->scrollbar_size;
2890 float sb_x = area_x + area_w - sb_size;
2891
2892 /* track */
2893 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, area_y, sb_x + sb_size, area_y + view_h,
2894 style->scrollbar_track_color);
2895
2896 /* thumb */
2897 float ratio = view_h / content_h;
2898 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
2899 float thumb_h = ratio * view_h;
2900 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
2901 float max_scroll = content_h - view_h;
2902 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? scroll_y / max_scroll : 0;
2903 float thumb_y = area_y + pos_ratio * (view_h - thumb_h);
2904 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_y,
2905 sb_x + sb_size - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding,
2906 thumb_y + thumb_h,
2907 style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
2908 style->scrollbar_thumb_color);
2909}
2910
2915static float _min_thickness(float requested) {
2916 const ALLEGRO_TRANSFORM* tf = al_get_current_transform();
2917 /* length of each axis basis vector gives the true scale for that axis */
2918 float sx = hypotf(tf->m[0][0], tf->m[0][1]);
2919 float sy = hypotf(tf->m[1][0], tf->m[1][1]);
2920 /* use the larger component to avoid overly thick lines on the minor axis */
2921 float scale = (sx > sy) ? sx : sy;
2922 if (scale < 0.01f) scale = 0.01f;
2923 /* ensure the line is at least 1 physical pixel */
2924 float min_t = 1.0f / scale;
2925 return (requested > min_t) ? requested : min_t;
2926}
2927
2929static ALLEGRO_COLOR _bg_for_state(N_GUI_THEME* t, int state) {
2930 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) return t->bg_active;
2931 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) return t->bg_hover;
2932 return t->bg_normal;
2933}
2934
2935static ALLEGRO_COLOR _border_for_state(N_GUI_THEME* t, int state) {
2936 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) return t->border_active;
2937 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) return t->border_hover;
2938 return t->border_normal;
2939}
2940
2941static ALLEGRO_COLOR _text_for_state(N_GUI_THEME* t, int state) {
2942 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) return t->text_active;
2943 if (state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) return t->text_hover;
2944 return t->text_normal;
2945}
2946
2951static void _draw_themed_rect(N_GUI_THEME* t, int state, float x, float y, float w, float h, int rounded) {
2952 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg = _bg_for_state(t, state);
2953 ALLEGRO_COLOR bd = _border_for_state(t, state);
2954 float thickness = _min_thickness(t->border_thickness);
2955 float ht = thickness * 0.5f;
2956 if (rounded) {
2957 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(x + ht, y + ht, x + w - ht, y + h - ht, t->corner_rx, t->corner_ry, bg);
2958 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(x + ht, y + ht, x + w - ht, y + h - ht, t->corner_rx, t->corner_ry, bd, thickness);
2959 } else {
2960 al_draw_filled_rectangle(x, y, x + w, y + h, bg);
2961 al_draw_rectangle(x + ht, y + ht, x + w - ht, y + h - ht, bd, thickness);
2962 }
2963}
2964
2966static void _draw_button(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
2967 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
2968 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
2969 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
2970 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
2971
2972 /* For toggle buttons, use the active visual state when toggled on */
2973 int draw_state = wgt->state;
2974 if (bd->toggle_mode && bd->toggled) {
2975 draw_state |= N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
2976 }
2977
2978 if (bd->shape == N_GUI_SHAPE_BITMAP && bd->bitmap) {
2979 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* bmp = bd->bitmap;
2980 if ((draw_state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) && bd->bitmap_active)
2981 bmp = bd->bitmap_active;
2982 else if ((draw_state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) && bd->bitmap_hover)
2983 bmp = bd->bitmap_hover;
2984 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(bmp, 0, 0,
2985 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(bmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(bmp),
2986 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
2987 } else {
2988 int rounded = (bd->shape == N_GUI_SHAPE_ROUNDED) ? 1 : 0;
2989 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, draw_state, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, rounded);
2990 }
2991
2992 if (font && bd->label[0]) {
2993 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, draw_state);
2994 int bbx = 0, bby = 0, bbw = 0, bbh = 0;
2995 al_get_text_dimensions(font, bd->label, &bbx, &bby, &bbw, &bbh);
2996 float tw = (float)bbw;
2997 float th = (float)bbh;
2998 float pad = style->label_padding;
2999 float max_text_w = wgt->w - pad * 2.0f;
3000 if (tw > max_text_w) {
3001 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + pad, ay + (wgt->h - th) / 2.0f - (float)bby, max_text_w, bd->label);
3002 } else {
3003 al_draw_text(font, tc, ax + (wgt->w - tw) / 2.0f - (float)bbx, ay + (wgt->h - th) / 2.0f - (float)bby, 0, bd->label);
3004 }
3005 }
3006}
3007
3009static void _draw_slider(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3010 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)wgt->data;
3011 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3012 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3013 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3014
3015 double range = sd->max_val - sd->min_val;
3016 double ratio = (range > 0) ? (sd->value - sd->min_val) / range : 0;
3017
3018 if (sd->orientation == N_GUI_SLIDER_V) {
3019 /* ---- vertical slider ---- */
3020 float track_w = style->slider_track_size;
3021 float track_x = ax + (wgt->w - track_w) / 2.0f;
3022 if (sd->track_bitmap) {
3023 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sd->track_bitmap, 0, 0,
3024 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sd->track_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sd->track_bitmap),
3025 track_x, ay, track_w, wgt->h, 0);
3026 } else {
3027 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(track_x, ay, track_x + track_w, ay + wgt->h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3028 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(track_x, ay, track_x + track_w, ay + wgt->h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.border_normal, _min_thickness(style->slider_track_border_thickness));
3029 }
3030
3031 /* fill from bottom up */
3032 float fill_h = (float)(ratio * (double)wgt->h);
3033 if (sd->fill_bitmap) {
3034 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sd->fill_bitmap, 0, 0,
3035 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sd->fill_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sd->fill_bitmap),
3036 track_x, ay + wgt->h - fill_h, track_w, fill_h, 0);
3037 } else {
3038 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(track_x, ay + wgt->h - fill_h, track_x + track_w, ay + wgt->h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.bg_active);
3039 }
3040
3041 /* handle */
3042 float hy = ay + wgt->h - fill_h;
3043 float handle_r = wgt->w / 2.0f - style->slider_handle_edge_offset;
3044 if (handle_r < style->slider_handle_min_r) handle_r = style->slider_handle_min_r;
3045 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hbmp = _select_state_bitmap(wgt->state, sd->handle_bitmap, sd->handle_hover_bitmap, sd->handle_active_bitmap);
3046 if (hbmp) {
3047 float hd = handle_r * 2.0f;
3048 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(hbmp, 0, 0,
3049 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(hbmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(hbmp),
3050 ax + wgt->w / 2.0f - handle_r, hy - handle_r, hd, hd, 0);
3051 } else {
3052 ALLEGRO_COLOR hc = _bg_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
3053 ALLEGRO_COLOR hb = _border_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
3054 al_draw_filled_circle(ax + wgt->w / 2.0f, hy, handle_r, hc);
3055 al_draw_circle(ax + wgt->w / 2.0f, hy, handle_r, hb, _min_thickness(style->slider_handle_border_thickness));
3056 }
3057
3058 /* value label */
3059 if (font) {
3060 char val_str[32];
3061 if (sd->mode == N_GUI_SLIDER_PERCENT)
3062 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), "%.0f%%", sd->value);
3063 else
3064 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), "%.1f", sd->value);
3065 int vbbx = 0, vbby = 0, vbbw = 0, vbbh = 0;
3066 al_get_text_dimensions(font, val_str, &vbbx, &vbby, &vbbw, &vbbh);
3067 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal, ax + (wgt->w - (float)vbbw) / 2.0f - (float)vbbx, ay + wgt->h + (float)style->slider_value_label_offset, 0, val_str);
3068 }
3069 return;
3070 }
3071
3072 /* ---- horizontal slider (original) ---- */
3073
3074 /* track */
3075 float track_h = style->slider_track_size;
3076 float track_y = ay + (wgt->h - track_h) / 2.0f;
3077 if (sd->track_bitmap) {
3078 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sd->track_bitmap, 0, 0,
3079 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sd->track_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sd->track_bitmap),
3080 ax, track_y, wgt->w, track_h, 0);
3081 } else {
3082 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(ax, track_y, ax + wgt->w, track_y + track_h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3083 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(ax, track_y, ax + wgt->w, track_y + track_h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.border_normal, _min_thickness(style->slider_track_border_thickness));
3084 }
3085
3086 /* fill */
3087 float fill_w = (float)(ratio * (double)wgt->w);
3088 if (sd->fill_bitmap) {
3089 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sd->fill_bitmap, 0, 0,
3090 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sd->fill_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sd->fill_bitmap),
3091 ax, track_y, fill_w, track_h, 0);
3092 } else {
3093 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(ax, track_y, ax + fill_w, track_y + track_h, style->slider_track_corner_r, style->slider_track_corner_r, wgt->theme.bg_active);
3094 }
3095
3096 /* handle */
3097 float hx = ax + fill_w;
3098 float handle_r = wgt->h / 2.0f - style->slider_handle_edge_offset;
3099 if (handle_r < style->slider_handle_min_r) handle_r = style->slider_handle_min_r;
