3100 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* hbmp = _select_state_bitmap(wgt->state, sd->handle_bitmap, sd->handle_hover_bitmap, sd->handle_active_bitmap);
3101 if (hbmp) {
3102 float hd = handle_r * 2.0f;
3103 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(hbmp, 0, 0,
3104 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(hbmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(hbmp),
3105 hx - handle_r, ay + wgt->h / 2.0f - handle_r, hd, hd, 0);
3106 } else {
3107 ALLEGRO_COLOR hc = _bg_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
3108 ALLEGRO_COLOR hb = _border_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
3109 al_draw_filled_circle(hx, ay + wgt->h / 2.0f, handle_r, hc);
3110 al_draw_circle(hx, ay + wgt->h / 2.0f, handle_r, hb, _min_thickness(style->slider_handle_border_thickness));
3111 }
3112
3113 /* value label */
3114 if (font) {
3115 char val_str[32];
3116 if (sd->mode == N_GUI_SLIDER_PERCENT) {
3117 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), "%.0f%%", sd->value);
3118 } else {
3119 snprintf(val_str, sizeof(val_str), "%.1f", sd->value);
3120 }
3121 int sbbx = 0, sbby = 0, sbbw = 0, sbbh = 0;
3122 al_get_text_dimensions(font, val_str, &sbbx, &sbby, &sbbw, &sbbh);
3123 float th = (float)sbbh;
3124 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal, ax + wgt->w + style->slider_value_label_offset, ay + (wgt->h - th) / 2.0f - (float)sbby, 0, val_str);
3125 }
3126}
3127
3131static size_t _textarea_pos_from_mouse(N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float mx, float my, float ax, float ay, float widget_w, float widget_h, float pad, float scrollbar_size) {
3132 if (!font || td->text_len == 0) return 0;
3133 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3134
3135 if (!td->multiline) {
3136 float click_x = mx - (ax + pad) + td->scroll_x;
3137 if (click_x < 0) click_x = 0;
3138 /* build display text for width calculation (masked if mask_char set) */
3139 char display[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3140 if (td->mask_char) {
3141 size_t n = td->text_len;
3142 if (n >= N_GUI_TEXT_MAX) n = N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1;
3143 memset(display, td->mask_char, n);
3144 display[n] = '\0';
3145 } else {
3146 memcpy(display, td->text, td->text_len);
3147 display[td->text_len] = '\0';
3148 }
3149 size_t best = 0;
3150 float best_dist = click_x;
3151 char ctmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3152 for (size_t ci = 0; ci < td->text_len;) {
3153 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[ci]);
3154 if (ci + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - ci);
3155 size_t pos = ci + (size_t)clen;
3156 memcpy(ctmp, display, pos);
3157 ctmp[pos] = '\0';
3158 float tw = _text_w(font,ctmp);
3159 float dist = click_x - tw;
3160 if (dist < 0) dist = -dist;
3161 if (dist < best_dist) {
3162 best_dist = dist;
3163 best = pos;
3164 } else {
3165 break;
3166 }
3167 ci += (size_t)clen;
3168 }
3169 return best;
3170 }
3171
3172 /* multiline */
3173 float view_h = widget_h - pad * 2;
3174 float content_h = _textarea_content_height(td, font, widget_w, pad);
3175 float sb_size = (content_h > view_h) ? scrollbar_size : 0.0f;
3176 float text_area_w = widget_w - sb_size;
3177 float avail_w = text_area_w - pad * 2;
3178 float click_x_rel = mx - (ax + pad);
3179 float click_y_content = my - (ay + pad) + (float)td->scroll_y;
3180 if (click_x_rel < 0) click_x_rel = 0;
3181 if (click_y_content < 0) click_y_content = 0;
3182 int target_line = (int)(click_y_content / fh);
3183
3184 float cur_cx = 0;
3185 int cur_line = 0;
3186 size_t best_pos = 0;
3187 float best_dist = click_x_rel;
3188 int found_line = (target_line == 0) ? 1 : 0;
3189
3190 for (size_t ci = 0; ci < td->text_len;) {
3191 if (cur_line > target_line) break;
3192 if (td->text[ci] == '\n') {
3193 if (cur_line == target_line) break;
3194 cur_cx = 0;
3195 cur_line++;
3196 if (cur_line == target_line) {
3197 found_line = 1;
3198 best_pos = ci + 1;
3199 best_dist = click_x_rel;
3200 }
3201 ci++;
3202 continue;
3203 }
3204 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[ci]);
3205 if (ci + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - ci);
3206 char ch2[5];
3207 memcpy(ch2, &td->text[ci], (size_t)clen);
3208 ch2[clen] = '\0';
3209 float cw = _text_w(font,ch2);
3210 if (cur_cx + cw > avail_w) {
3211 if (cur_line == target_line) break;
3212 cur_cx = 0;
3213 cur_line++;
3214 if (cur_line == target_line) {
3215 found_line = 1;
3216 best_pos = ci;
3217 best_dist = click_x_rel;
3218 }
3219 }
3220 if (cur_line == target_line) {
3221 float dist = click_x_rel - (cur_cx + cw);
3222 if (dist < 0) dist = -dist;
3223 if (dist < best_dist) {
3224 best_dist = dist;
3225 best_pos = ci + (size_t)clen;
3226 }
3227 }
3228 cur_cx += cw;
3229 ci += (size_t)clen;
3230 }
3231 if (!found_line) best_pos = td->text_len;
3232 return best_pos;
3233}
3234
3236static int _textarea_has_selection(N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td) {
3237 return td->sel_start != td->sel_end;
3238}
3239
3241static void _textarea_sel_range(N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td, size_t* lo, size_t* hi) {
3242 if (td->sel_start <= td->sel_end) {
3243 *lo = td->sel_start;
3244 *hi = td->sel_end;
3245 } else {
3246 *lo = td->sel_end;
3247 *hi = td->sel_start;
3248 }
3249}
3250
3252static void _draw_textarea(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3253 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
3254 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3255 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3256 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3257
3258 int focused = (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED) ? 1 : 0;
3259
3260 /* background */
3261 if (td->bg_bitmap) {
3262 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(td->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
3263 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(td->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(td->bg_bitmap),
3264 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
3265 } else {
3266 ALLEGRO_COLOR bg = wgt->theme.bg_normal;
3267 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, bg);
3268 }
3269 ALLEGRO_COLOR bd = focused ? wgt->theme.border_active : wgt->theme.border_normal;
3270 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, bd, _min_thickness(wgt->theme.border_thickness));
3271
3272 if (!font) return;
3273 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3274 float pad = style->textarea_padding;
3275
3276 /* cursor blink: visible during first half of blink period */
3277 int cursor_visible = 0;
3278 if (focused) {
3279 double now = al_get_time();
3280 double elapsed = now - td->cursor_time;
3281 float period = style->textarea_cursor_blink_period;
3282 if (period <= 0.0f) period = 1.0f;
3283 double phase = elapsed - (double)(int)(elapsed / (double)period) * (double)period;
3284 cursor_visible = (phase < (double)period * 0.5) ? 1 : 0;
3285 }
3286 float cursor_w = _min_thickness(style->textarea_cursor_width);
3287
3288 if (td->multiline) {
3289 float view_h = wgt->h - pad * 2;
3290 float content_h = _textarea_content_height(td, font, wgt->w, pad);
3291 int need_scrollbar = (content_h > view_h) ? 1 : 0;
3292 float sb_size = need_scrollbar ? style->scrollbar_size : 0;
3293 float text_area_w = wgt->w - sb_size;
3294
3295 /* auto-scroll to keep cursor visible (skip if user just scrolled with mouse wheel) */
3296 if (focused && !td->scroll_from_wheel) {
3297 /* compute cursor Y position within content */
3298 float cur_cx = 0;
3299 float cur_cy = 0;
3300 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->cursor_pos && i < td->text_len;) {
3301 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
3302 cur_cx = 0;
3303 cur_cy += fh;
3304 i++;
3305 continue;
3306 }
3307 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
3308 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
3309 char ch[5];
3310 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
3311 ch[clen] = '\0';
3312 float cw2 = _text_w(font,ch);
3313 if (cur_cx + cw2 > text_area_w - pad * 2) {
3314 cur_cx = 0;
3315 cur_cy += fh;
3316 }
3317 cur_cx += cw2;
3318 i += (size_t)clen;
3319 }
3320 /* ensure cursor line is within visible region */
3321 if (cur_cy < (float)td->scroll_y) {
3322 td->scroll_y = (int)cur_cy;
3323 }
3324 if (cur_cy + fh > (float)td->scroll_y + view_h) {
3325 td->scroll_y = (int)(cur_cy + fh - view_h);
3326 }
3327 }
3328
3329 /* clamp scroll_y */
3330 if (need_scrollbar) {
3331 float max_sy = content_h - view_h;
3332 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
3333 if ((float)td->scroll_y > max_sy) td->scroll_y = (int)max_sy;
3334 if (td->scroll_y < 0) td->scroll_y = 0;
3335 } else {
3336 td->scroll_y = 0;
3337 }
3338
3339 /* clip to widget bounds (text area only, leaving room for scrollbar) */
3340 int pcx, pcy, pcw, pch;
3341 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&pcx, &pcy, &pcw, &pch);
3342 _set_clipping_rect_transformed((int)ax, (int)ay, (int)text_area_w, (int)wgt->h);
3343 /* selection range */
3344 size_t sel_lo = 0, sel_hi = 0;
3345 int has_sel = _textarea_has_selection(td);
3346 if (has_sel) _textarea_sel_range(td, &sel_lo, &sel_hi);
3347 ALLEGRO_COLOR sel_bg = wgt->theme.selection_color;
3348
3349 /* simple line-wrap drawing with UTF-8 support */
3350 float cx = ax + pad;
3351 float cy = ay + pad - (float)td->scroll_y;
3352 /* cursor position tracked during layout */
3353 float cursor_cx = cx;
3354 float cursor_cy = cy;
3355 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->text_len;) {
3356 if (i == td->cursor_pos) {
3357 cursor_cx = cx;
3358 cursor_cy = cy;
3359 }
3360 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
3361 /* draw selection highlight on newline (small rect at end of line) */
3362 if (has_sel && i >= sel_lo && i < sel_hi && cy + fh > ay && cy < ay + wgt->h) {
3363 float space_w = _text_w(font," ");
3364 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx, cy, cx + space_w, cy + fh, sel_bg);
3365 }
3366 cx = ax + pad;
3367 cy += fh;
3368 i++;
3369 continue;
3370 }
3371 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
3372 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
3373 char ch[5];
3374 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
3375 ch[clen] = '\0';
3376 float cw = _text_w(font,ch);
3377 if (cx + cw > ax + text_area_w - pad) {
3378 cx = ax + pad;
3379 cy += fh;
3380 if (i == td->cursor_pos) {
3381 cursor_cx = cx;
3382 cursor_cy = cy;
3383 }
3384 }
3385 if (cy + fh > ay && cy < ay + wgt->h) {
3386 /* draw selection highlight behind character */
3387 if (has_sel && i >= sel_lo && i < sel_hi) {
3388 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx, cy, cx + cw, cy + fh, sel_bg);
3389 }
3390 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal, cx, cy, 0, ch);
3391 }
3392 cx += cw;
3393 /* check cursor positions within the multi-byte character */
3394 for (int b = 1; b < clen; b++) {
3395 if (i + (size_t)b == td->cursor_pos) {
3396 cursor_cx = cx;
3397 cursor_cy = cy;
3398 }
3399 }
3400 i += (size_t)clen;
3401 }
3402 /* cursor is after all text when cursor_pos >= text_len */
3403 if (td->cursor_pos >= td->text_len) {
3404 cursor_cx = cx;
3405 cursor_cy = cy;
3406 }
3407 /* cursor */
3408 if (cursor_visible) {
3409 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cursor_cx, cursor_cy, cursor_cx + cursor_w, cursor_cy + fh, wgt->theme.text_active);
3410 }
3411 al_set_clipping_rectangle(pcx, pcy, pcw, pch);
3412
3413 /* draw scrollbar outside clipping region */
3414 if (need_scrollbar) {
3415 _draw_widget_vscrollbar(ax, ay + pad, wgt->w, view_h, content_h, (float)td->scroll_y, style);
3416 }
3417 } else {
3418 /* single line with horizontal scrolling */
3419 float ty = ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f;
3420 float inner_w = wgt->w - pad * 2;
3421
3422 /* build display text (masked if mask_char is set) */
3423 char display_text[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3424 if (td->mask_char && td->text_len > 0) {
3425 size_t n = td->text_len;
3426 if (n >= N_GUI_TEXT_MAX) n = N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1;
3427 memset(display_text, td->mask_char, n);
3428 display_text[n] = '\0';
3429 } else {
3430 memcpy(display_text, td->text, td->text_len);
3431 display_text[td->text_len] = '\0';
3432 }
3433
3434 /* compute cursor pixel offset from text start */
3435 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3436 size_t cpos = td->cursor_pos;
3437 if (cpos > td->text_len) cpos = td->text_len;
3438 memcpy(tmp, display_text, cpos);
3439 tmp[cpos] = '\0';
3440 float cursor_px = _text_w(font,tmp);
3441
3442 /* adjust scroll_x so cursor stays visible within the inner area */
3443 if (cursor_px - td->scroll_x < 0) {
3444 td->scroll_x = cursor_px;
3445 }
3446 if (cursor_px - td->scroll_x > inner_w - cursor_w) {
3447 td->scroll_x = cursor_px - inner_w + cursor_w;
3448 }
3449 if (td->scroll_x < 0) td->scroll_x = 0;
3450
3451 /* clip text to widget inner bounds */
3452 int pcx, pcy, pcw, pch;
3453 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&pcx, &pcy, &pcw, &pch);
3454 _set_clipping_rect_transformed((int)(ax + pad), (int)ay, (int)inner_w, (int)wgt->h);
3455 /* draw selection highlight for single-line */
3456 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
3457 size_t sl, sh;
3458 _textarea_sel_range(td, &sl, &sh);
3459 char stmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
3460 memcpy(stmp, display_text, sl);
3461 stmp[sl] = '\0';
3462 float sel_x1 = _text_w(font,stmp);
3463 memcpy(stmp, display_text, sh);
3464 stmp[sh] = '\0';
3465 float sel_x2 = _text_w(font,stmp);
3466 float sx1 = ax + pad + sel_x1 - td->scroll_x;
3467 float sx2 = ax + pad + sel_x2 - td->scroll_x;
3468 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sx1, ty, sx2, ty + fh, wgt->theme.selection_color);
3469 }
3470 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal, ax + pad - td->scroll_x, ty, 0, display_text);
3471 /* cursor */
3472 if (cursor_visible) {
3473 float cx = ax + pad + cursor_px - td->scroll_x;
3474 al_draw_filled_rectangle(cx, ty, cx + cursor_w, ty + fh, wgt->theme.text_active);
3475 }
3476 al_set_clipping_rectangle(pcx, pcy, pcw, pch);
3477 }
3478}
3479
3481static void _draw_checkbox(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3482 N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
3483 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3484 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3485 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3486
3487 float box_size = wgt->h < style->checkbox_max_size ? wgt->h : style->checkbox_max_size;
3488 float box_y = ay + (wgt->h - box_size) / 2.0f;
3489
3490 /* select bitmap: hover > checked/unchecked > color theme */
3491 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* box_bmp = NULL;
3492 if ((wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) && cd->box_hover_bitmap) {
3493 box_bmp = cd->box_hover_bitmap;
3494 } else if (cd->checked && cd->box_checked_bitmap) {
3495 box_bmp = cd->box_checked_bitmap;
3496 } else if (cd->box_bitmap) {
3497 box_bmp = cd->box_bitmap;
3498 }
3499
3500 if (box_bmp) {
3501 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(box_bmp, 0, 0,
3502 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(box_bmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(box_bmp),
3503 ax, box_y, box_size, box_size, 0);
3504 } else {
3505 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, wgt->state, ax, box_y, box_size, box_size, 0);
3506
3507 if (cd->checked) {
3508 /* draw checkmark as two lines */
3509 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = wgt->theme.text_active;
3510 float m = style->checkbox_mark_margin;
3511 al_draw_line(ax + m, box_y + box_size / 2.0f,
3512 ax + box_size / 2.0f, box_y + box_size - m, tc, _min_thickness(style->checkbox_mark_thickness));
3513 al_draw_line(ax + box_size / 2.0f, box_y + box_size - m,
3514 ax + box_size - m, box_y + m, tc, _min_thickness(style->checkbox_mark_thickness));
3515 }
3516 }
3517
3518 if (font && cd->label[0]) {
3519 int cbbx = 0, cbby = 0, cbbw = 0, cbbh = 0;
3520 al_get_text_dimensions(font, cd->label, &cbbx, &cbby, &cbbw, &cbbh);
3521 float fh = (float)cbbh;
3522 float label_max_w = wgt->w - box_size - style->checkbox_label_gap;
3523 _draw_text_truncated(font, _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state),
3524 ax + box_size + style->checkbox_label_offset, ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f - (float)cbby, label_max_w, cd->label);
3525 }
3526}
3527
3529static void _draw_scrollbar(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3530 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)wgt->data;
3531 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3532 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3533 int rounded = (sb->shape == N_GUI_SHAPE_ROUNDED) ? 1 : 0;
3534
3535 /* track */
3536 if (sb->track_bitmap) {
3537 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(sb->track_bitmap, 0, 0,
3538 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(sb->track_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(sb->track_bitmap),
3539 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
3540 } else {
3541 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, N_GUI_STATE_IDLE, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, rounded);
3542 }
3543
3544 /* compute thumb */
3545 double ratio = sb->viewport_size / sb->content_size;
3546 if (ratio > 1.0) ratio = 1.0;
3547 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
3548 if (max_scroll < 0) max_scroll = 0;
3549 double pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? sb->scroll_pos / max_scroll : 0;
3550
3551 float thumb_x, thumb_y, thumb_w, thumb_h;
3552 if (sb->orientation == N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_V) {
3553 thumb_h = (float)(ratio * (double)wgt->h);
3554 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
3555 thumb_w = wgt->w - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding * 2;
3556 thumb_x = ax + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
3557 float track_range = wgt->h - thumb_h;
3558 thumb_y = ay + (float)(pos_ratio * (double)track_range);
3559 } else {
3560 thumb_w = (float)(ratio * (double)wgt->w);
3561 if (thumb_w < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
3562 thumb_h = wgt->h - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding * 2;
3563 thumb_y = ay + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
3564 float track_range = wgt->w - thumb_w;
3565 thumb_x = ax + (float)(pos_ratio * (double)track_range);
3566 }
3567
3568 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* tbmp = _select_state_bitmap(wgt->state, sb->thumb_bitmap, sb->thumb_hover_bitmap, sb->thumb_active_bitmap);
3569 if (tbmp) {
3570 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(tbmp, 0, 0,
3571 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(tbmp), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(tbmp),
3572 thumb_x, thumb_y, thumb_w, thumb_h, 0);
3573 } else {
3574 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, wgt->state, thumb_x, thumb_y, thumb_w, thumb_h, rounded);
3575 }
3576}
3577
3579static void _draw_listbox(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3580 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
3581 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3582 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3583 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3584
3585 /* background */
3586 if (ld->bg_bitmap) {
3587 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(ld->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
3588 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(ld->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(ld->bg_bitmap),
3589 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
3590 } else {
3591 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3592 }
3593 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, wgt->theme.border_thickness);
3594
3595 if (!font) return;
3596 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3597 float ih = ld->item_height > fh ? ld->item_height : fh + style->item_height_pad;
3598 int visible_count = (int)(wgt->h / ih);
3599 float pad = style->item_text_padding;
3600
3601 /* clamp scroll_offset to valid range */
3602 int max_off = (int)ld->nb_items - visible_count;
3603 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
3604 if (ld->scroll_offset > max_off) ld->scroll_offset = max_off;
3605 if (ld->scroll_offset < 0) ld->scroll_offset = 0;
3606
3607 int need_scrollbar = ((int)ld->nb_items > visible_count) ? 1 : 0;
3608 float sb_w = need_scrollbar ? style->scrollbar_size : 0;
3609 float item_area_w = wgt->w - sb_w;
3610
3611 for (int i = 0; i < visible_count && (size_t)(i + ld->scroll_offset) < ld->nb_items; i++) {
3612 int idx = i + ld->scroll_offset;
3613 float iy = ay + (float)i * ih;
3614 N_GUI_LISTITEM* item = &ld->items[idx];
3615
3616 if (item->selected && ld->item_selected_bitmap) {
3617 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(ld->item_selected_bitmap, 0, 0,
3618 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(ld->item_selected_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(ld->item_selected_bitmap),
3619 ax + style->item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - style->item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
3620 } else if (item->selected) {
3621 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + style->item_selection_inset, iy, ax + item_area_w - style->item_selection_inset, iy + ih, wgt->theme.bg_active);
3622 } else if (ld->item_bg_bitmap) {
3623 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(ld->item_bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
3624 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(ld->item_bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(ld->item_bg_bitmap),
3625 ax + style->item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - style->item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
3626 }
3627 float item_max_w = item_area_w - pad * 2.0f;
3628 _draw_text_truncated(font, item->selected ? wgt->theme.text_active : wgt->theme.text_normal,
3629 ax + pad, iy + (ih - fh) / 2.0f, item_max_w, item->text);
3630 }
3631
3632 /* draw scrollbar indicator when items overflow */
3633 if (need_scrollbar) {
3634 float sb_x = ax + wgt->w - sb_w;
3635 /* scrollbar track */
3636 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3637 al_draw_line(sb_x, ay, sb_x, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, 1.0f);
3638 /* thumb */
3639 float ratio = (float)visible_count / (float)ld->nb_items;
3640 float thumb_h = ratio * wgt->h;
3641 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
3642 float track_range = wgt->h - thumb_h;
3643 float pos_ratio = (max_off > 0) ? (float)ld->scroll_offset / (float)max_off : 0;
3644 float thumb_y = ay + pos_ratio * track_range;
3645 float thumb_pad = style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
3646 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + thumb_pad, thumb_y, ax + wgt->w - thumb_pad, thumb_y + thumb_h,
3647 2.0f, 2.0f, wgt->theme.bg_hover);
3648 }
3649}
3650
3652static void _draw_radiolist(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3653 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)wgt->data;
3654 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3655 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3656 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3657
3658 /* background */
3659 if (rd->bg_bitmap) {
3660 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(rd->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
3661 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(rd->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(rd->bg_bitmap),
3662 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
3663 } else {
3664 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3665 }
3666 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, wgt->theme.border_thickness);
3667
3668 if (!font) return;
3669 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3670 float ih = rd->item_height > fh ? rd->item_height : fh + style->item_height_pad;
3671 int visible_count = (int)(wgt->h / ih);
3672 float radio_r = (ih - style->item_height_pad * 2) / 2.0f;
3673 if (radio_r < style->radio_circle_min_r) radio_r = style->radio_circle_min_r;
3674 float pad = style->radio_label_gap;
3675
3676 /* clamp scroll_offset to valid range */
3677 int max_off = (int)rd->nb_items - visible_count;
3678 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
3679 if (rd->scroll_offset > max_off) rd->scroll_offset = max_off;
3680 if (rd->scroll_offset < 0) rd->scroll_offset = 0;
3681
3682 int need_scrollbar = ((int)rd->nb_items > visible_count) ? 1 : 0;
3683
3684 for (int i = 0; i < visible_count && (size_t)(i + rd->scroll_offset) < rd->nb_items; i++) {
3685 int idx = i + rd->scroll_offset;
3686 float iy = ay + (float)i * ih;
3687 float cy = iy + ih / 2.0f;
3688 float cx = ax + pad + radio_r;
3689
3690 /* item background bitmap */
3691 if (idx == rd->selected_index && rd->item_selected_bitmap) {
3692 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(rd->item_selected_bitmap, 0, 0,
3693 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(rd->item_selected_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(rd->item_selected_bitmap),
3694 ax, iy, wgt->w, ih, 0);
3695 } else if (rd->item_bg_bitmap) {
3696 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(rd->item_bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
3697 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(rd->item_bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(rd->item_bg_bitmap),
3698 ax, iy, wgt->w, ih, 0);
3699 }
3700
3701 /* outer circle */
3702 al_draw_circle(cx, cy, radio_r, wgt->theme.border_normal, _min_thickness(style->radio_circle_border_thickness));
3703
3704 /* inner filled circle if selected */
3705 if (idx == rd->selected_index) {
3706 al_draw_filled_circle(cx, cy, radio_r - style->radio_inner_offset, wgt->theme.text_active);
3707 }
3708
3709 /* label */
3710 al_draw_text(font, wgt->theme.text_normal,
3711 cx + radio_r + pad, iy + (ih - fh) / 2.0f, 0, rd->items[idx].text);
3712 }
3713
3714 /* draw scrollbar indicator when items overflow */
3715 if (need_scrollbar) {
3716 float sb_w = style->scrollbar_size;
3717 float sb_x = ax + wgt->w - sb_w;
3718 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3719 al_draw_line(sb_x, ay, sb_x, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, 1.0f);
3720 float ratio = (float)visible_count / (float)rd->nb_items;
3721 float thumb_h = ratio * wgt->h;
3722 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
3723 float track_range = wgt->h - thumb_h;
3724 float pos_ratio = (max_off > 0) ? (float)rd->scroll_offset / (float)max_off : 0;
3725 float thumb_y = ay + pos_ratio * track_range;
3726 float thumb_pad = style->scrollbar_thumb_padding;
3727 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + thumb_pad, thumb_y, ax + wgt->w - thumb_pad, thumb_y + thumb_h,
3728 2.0f, 2.0f, wgt->theme.bg_hover);
3729 }
3730}
3731
3733static void _draw_combobox(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3734 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
3735 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3736 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3737 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3738
3739 if (cd->bg_bitmap) {
3740 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(cd->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
3741 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(cd->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(cd->bg_bitmap),
3742 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
3743 } else {
3744 int rounded = 0;
3745 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, wgt->state, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, rounded);
3746 }
3747
3748 if (!font) return;
3749 float pad = style->item_text_padding;
3750
3751 /* display selected item text (truncated to fit) */
3752 const char* display_text = "";
3753 if (cd->selected_index >= 0 && (size_t)cd->selected_index < cd->nb_items) {
3754 display_text = cd->items[cd->selected_index].text;
3755 }
3756 int cbbbx = 0, cbbby = 0, cbbbw = 0, cbbbh = 0;
3757 al_get_text_dimensions(font, display_text[0] ? display_text : "Ay", &cbbbx, &cbbby, &cbbbw, &cbbbh);
3758 float fh = (float)cbbbh;
3759 float max_text_w = wgt->w - pad - style->dropdown_arrow_reserve;
3760 _draw_text_truncated(font, _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state),
3761 ax + pad, ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f - (float)cbbby, max_text_w, display_text);
3762
3763 /* dropdown arrow */
3764 float arrow_x = ax + wgt->w - style->dropdown_arrow_reserve;
3765 float arrow_y = ay + wgt->h / 2.0f;
3766 ALLEGRO_COLOR ac = wgt->theme.text_normal;
3767 al_draw_line(arrow_x, arrow_y - style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w, arrow_y + style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, ac, _min_thickness(style->dropdown_arrow_thickness));
3768 al_draw_line(arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w, arrow_y + style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w * 2, arrow_y - style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, ac, _min_thickness(style->dropdown_arrow_thickness));
3769}
3770
3772static void _draw_combobox_dropdown(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
3773 if (ctx->open_combobox_id < 0) return;
3774 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_combobox_id);
3775 if (!wgt || !wgt->data) return;
3776 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
3777 if (!cd->is_open || cd->nb_items == 0) return;
3778
3779 /* find the window containing this widget to get absolute position */
3780 float ox = 0, oy = 0;
3781 if (!_find_widget_window(ctx, wgt->id, &ox, &oy)) return;
3782
3783 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
3784 if (!font) return;
3785
3786 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3787 float ay = oy + wgt->y + wgt->h;
3788 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3789 float ih = cd->item_height > fh ? cd->item_height : fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
3790 int vis = (int)cd->nb_items;
3791 if (vis > cd->max_visible) vis = cd->max_visible;
3792 float dropdown_h = (float)vis * ih;
3793 float pad = ctx->style.item_text_padding;
3794
3795 /* scrollbar geometry — only shown when items exceed max_visible */
3796 int need_scrollbar = ((int)cd->nb_items > cd->max_visible);
3797 float sb_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
3798 if (sb_size < 10.0f) sb_size = 10.0f;
3799 float item_area_w = need_scrollbar ? wgt->w - sb_size : wgt->w;
3800
3801 /* dropdown background */
3802 if (cd->bg_bitmap) {
3803 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(cd->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
3804 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(cd->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(cd->bg_bitmap),
3805 ax, ay, wgt->w, dropdown_h, 0);
3806 } else {
3807 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + dropdown_h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3808 }
3809 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + dropdown_h, wgt->theme.border_active, _min_thickness(ctx->style.dropdown_border_thickness));
3810
3811 /* items */
3812 for (int i = 0; i < vis && (size_t)(i + cd->scroll_offset) < cd->nb_items; i++) {
3813 int idx = i + cd->scroll_offset;
3814 float iy = ay + (float)i * ih;
3815 int hovered = _point_in_rect((float)ctx->mouse_x, (float)ctx->mouse_y,
3816 ax, iy, item_area_w, ih);
3817
3818 if (idx == cd->selected_index) {
3819 if (cd->item_selected_bitmap) {
3820 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(cd->item_selected_bitmap, 0, 0,
3821 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(cd->item_selected_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(cd->item_selected_bitmap),
3822 ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
3823 } else {
3824 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, ax + item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy + ih, wgt->theme.bg_active);
3825 }
3826 } else if (hovered) {
3827 if (cd->item_bg_bitmap) {
3828 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(cd->item_bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
3829 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(cd->item_bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(cd->item_bg_bitmap),
3830 ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
3831 } else {
3832 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, ax + item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy + ih, wgt->theme.bg_hover);
3833 }
3834 }
3835
3836 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = (idx == cd->selected_index) ? wgt->theme.text_active : wgt->theme.text_normal;
3837 al_draw_text(font, tc, ax + pad, iy + (ih - fh) / 2.0f, 0, cd->items[idx].text);
3838 }
3839
3840 /* scrollbar */
3841 if (need_scrollbar) {
3842 float sb_x = ax + wgt->w - sb_size;
3843 /* track */
3844 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, ay, sb_x + sb_size, ay + dropdown_h,
3845 ctx->style.scrollbar_track_color);
3846 /* thumb — proportional to visible / total, positioned by scroll_offset */
3847 float ratio = (float)cd->max_visible / (float)cd->nb_items;
3848 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
3849 float thumb_h = ratio * dropdown_h;
3850 float thumb_min = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min;
3851 if (thumb_min < 12.0f) thumb_min = 12.0f;
3852 if (thumb_h < thumb_min) thumb_h = thumb_min;
3853 int max_offset = (int)cd->nb_items - cd->max_visible;
3854 float pos_ratio = (max_offset > 0) ? (float)cd->scroll_offset / (float)max_offset : 0.0f;
3855 float thumb_y = ay + pos_ratio * (dropdown_h - thumb_h);
3856 float thumb_pad = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_padding;
3857 float corner_r = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_corner_r;
3858 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + thumb_pad, thumb_y,
3859 sb_x + sb_size - thumb_pad,
3860 thumb_y + thumb_h,
3861 corner_r, corner_r,
3862 ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_color);
3863 }
3864}
3865
3867static void _draw_dropmenu(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
3868 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)wgt->data;
3869 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3870 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3871 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
3872
3873 int draw_state = wgt->state;
3874 if (dd->is_open) draw_state |= N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
3875
3876 _draw_themed_rect(&wgt->theme, draw_state, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
3877
3878 if (font && dd->label[0]) {
3879 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, draw_state);
3880 int dbbx = 0, dbby = 0, dbbw = 0, dbbh = 0;
3881 al_get_text_dimensions(font, dd->label, &dbbx, &dbby, &dbbw, &dbbh);
3882 float fh = (float)dbbh;
3883 float pad = style->item_text_padding;
3884 float max_text_w = wgt->w - pad - style->dropdown_arrow_reserve;
3885 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + pad, ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f - (float)dbby, max_text_w, dd->label);
3886 }
3887
3888 /* dropdown arrow */
3889 float arrow_x = ax + wgt->w - style->dropdown_arrow_reserve;
3890 float arrow_y = ay + wgt->h / 2.0f;
3891 ALLEGRO_COLOR ac = wgt->theme.text_normal;
3892 al_draw_line(arrow_x, arrow_y - style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w, arrow_y + style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, ac, _min_thickness(style->dropdown_arrow_thickness));
3893 al_draw_line(arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w, arrow_y + style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, arrow_x + style->dropdown_arrow_half_w * 2, arrow_y - style->dropdown_arrow_half_h, ac, _min_thickness(style->dropdown_arrow_thickness));
3894}
3895
3897static void _draw_dropmenu_panel(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
3898 if (ctx->open_dropmenu_id < 0) return;
3899 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_dropmenu_id);
3900 if (!wgt || !wgt->data) return;
3901 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)wgt->data;
3902 if (!dd->is_open || dd->nb_entries == 0) return;
3903
3904 /* find the window containing this widget to get absolute position */
3905 float ox = 0, oy = 0;
3906 if (!_find_widget_window(ctx, wgt->id, &ox, &oy)) return;
3907
3908 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
3909 if (!font) return;
3910
3911 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3912 float ay = oy + wgt->y + wgt->h;
3913 float fh = (float)al_get_font_line_height(font);
3914 float ih = dd->item_height > fh ? dd->item_height : fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
3915 int vis = (int)dd->nb_entries;
3916 if (vis > dd->max_visible) vis = dd->max_visible;
3917 float panel_h = (float)vis * ih;
3918 float pad = ctx->style.item_text_padding;
3919
3920 /* scrollbar geometry — only shown when entries exceed max_visible */
3921 int need_scrollbar = ((int)dd->nb_entries > dd->max_visible);
3922 float sb_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
3923 if (sb_size < 10.0f) sb_size = 10.0f;
3924 float item_area_w = need_scrollbar ? wgt->w - sb_size : wgt->w;
3925
3926 /* panel background */
3927 if (dd->panel_bitmap) {
3928 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(dd->panel_bitmap, 0, 0,
3929 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(dd->panel_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(dd->panel_bitmap),
3930 ax, ay, wgt->w, panel_h, 0);
3931 } else {
3932 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + panel_h, wgt->theme.bg_normal);
3933 }
3934 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + panel_h, wgt->theme.border_active, _min_thickness(ctx->style.dropdown_border_thickness));
3935
3936 /* entries */
3937 float max_text_w = item_area_w - pad * 2.0f;
3938 for (int i = 0; i < vis && (size_t)(i + dd->scroll_offset) < dd->nb_entries; i++) {
3939 int idx = i + dd->scroll_offset;
3940 float iy = ay + (float)i * ih;
3941 int hovered = _point_in_rect((float)ctx->mouse_x, (float)ctx->mouse_y,
3942 ax, iy, item_area_w, ih);
3943
3944 if (hovered) {
3945 if (dd->item_hover_bitmap) {
3946 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(dd->item_hover_bitmap, 0, 0,
3947 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(dd->item_hover_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(dd->item_hover_bitmap),
3948 ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset * 2, ih, 0);
3949 } else {
3950 al_draw_filled_rectangle(ax + ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy, ax + item_area_w - ctx->style.item_selection_inset, iy + ih, wgt->theme.bg_hover);
3951 }
3952 }
3953
3954 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc = hovered ? wgt->theme.text_hover : wgt->theme.text_normal;
3955 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + pad, iy + (ih - fh) / 2.0f, max_text_w, dd->entries[idx].text);
3956 }
3957
3958 /* scrollbar */
3959 if (need_scrollbar) {
3960 float sb_x = ax + wgt->w - sb_size;
3961 /* track */
3962 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, ay, sb_x + sb_size, ay + panel_h,
3963 ctx->style.scrollbar_track_color);
3964 /* thumb — proportional to visible / total, positioned by scroll_offset */
3965 float ratio = (float)dd->max_visible / (float)dd->nb_entries;
3966 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
3967 float thumb_h = ratio * panel_h;
3968 float thumb_min = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min;
3969 if (thumb_min < 12.0f) thumb_min = 12.0f;
3970 if (thumb_h < thumb_min) thumb_h = thumb_min;
3971 int max_offset = (int)dd->nb_entries - dd->max_visible;
3972 float pos_ratio = (max_offset > 0) ? (float)dd->scroll_offset / (float)max_offset : 0.0f;
3973 float thumb_y = ay + pos_ratio * (panel_h - thumb_h);
3974 float thumb_pad = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_padding;
3975 float corner_r = ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_corner_r;
3976 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + thumb_pad, thumb_y,
3977 sb_x + sb_size - thumb_pad,
3978 thumb_y + thumb_h,
3979 corner_r, corner_r,
3980 ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_color);
3981 }
3982}
3983
3985static void _draw_image(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy) {
3986 N_GUI_IMAGE_DATA* id = (N_GUI_IMAGE_DATA*)wgt->data;
3987 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
3988 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
3989
3990 /* border */
3991 al_draw_rectangle(ax, ay, ax + wgt->w, ay + wgt->h, wgt->theme.border_normal, wgt->theme.border_thickness);
3992
3993 if (!id->bitmap) return;
3994 float bw = (float)al_get_bitmap_width(id->bitmap);
3995 float bh = (float)al_get_bitmap_height(id->bitmap);
3996
3997 if (id->scale_mode == N_GUI_IMAGE_STRETCH) {
3998 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(id->bitmap, 0, 0, bw, bh, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
3999 } else if (id->scale_mode == N_GUI_IMAGE_CENTER) {
4000 float dx = ax + (wgt->w - bw) / 2.0f;
4001 float dy = ay + (wgt->h - bh) / 2.0f;
4002 al_draw_bitmap(id->bitmap, dx, dy, 0);
4003 } else {
4004 /* N_GUI_IMAGE_FIT */
4005 float scale_x = wgt->w / bw;
4006 float scale_y = wgt->h / bh;
4007 float scale = (scale_x < scale_y) ? scale_x : scale_y;
4008 float dw = bw * scale;
4009 float dh = bh * scale;
4010 float dx = ax + (wgt->w - dw) / 2.0f;
4011 float dy = ay + (wgt->h - dh) / 2.0f;
4012 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(id->bitmap, 0, 0, bw, bh, dx, dy, dw, dh, 0);
4013 }
4014}
4015
4021static int _label_char_at_x(N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float click_x) {
4022 if (!font || !lb->text[0]) return -1;
4023 if (click_x <= 0) return 0;
4024 size_t len = strlen(lb->text);
4025 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
4026 int best = 0;
4027 float best_dist = click_x;
4028 for (size_t i = 0; i < len;) {
4029 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)lb->text[i]);
4030 if (i + (size_t)clen > len) clen = (int)(len - i);
4031 size_t pos = i + (size_t)clen;
4032 memcpy(tmp, lb->text, pos);
4033 tmp[pos] = '\0';
4034 float tw = _text_w(font,tmp);
4035 float dist = click_x - tw;
4036 if (dist < 0) dist = -dist;
4037 if (dist < best_dist) {
4038 best_dist = dist;
4039 best = (int)pos;
4040 }
4041 if (tw > click_x) break;
4042 i += (size_t)clen;
4043 }
4044 return best;
4045}
4046
4050static float _label_text_origin_x(N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float ax, float wgt_w, float win_w, float wgt_x, float label_padding) {
4051 float effective_w = wgt_w;
4052 if (win_w > 0) {
4053 float max_from_win = win_w - wgt_x;
4054 if (max_from_win > effective_w) effective_w = max_from_win;
4055 }
4056 int lbbx = 0, lbby = 0, lbbw = 0, lbbh = 0;
4057 al_get_text_dimensions(font, lb->text, &lbbx, &lbby, &lbbw, &lbbh);
4058 float tw = (float)lbbw;
4059 float max_text_w = effective_w - label_padding * 2;
4060 if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_CENTER) {
4061 if (tw > max_text_w) return ax + label_padding;
4062 return ax + (effective_w - tw) / 2.0f - (float)lbbx;
4063 }
4064 if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_RIGHT) {
4065 if (tw > max_text_w) return ax + label_padding;
4066 return ax + effective_w - tw - label_padding - (float)lbbx;
4067 }
4068 /* LEFT or JUSTIFIED (justified single-line fallback) */
4069 return ax + label_padding;
4070}
4071
4072static void _draw_label(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, float win_w, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4073 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
4074 float ax = ox + wgt->x;
4075 float ay = oy + wgt->y;
4076 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = wgt->font ? wgt->font : default_font;
4077
4078 /* optional background bitmap */
4079 if (lb->bg_bitmap) {
4080 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(lb->bg_bitmap, 0, 0,
4081 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(lb->bg_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(lb->bg_bitmap),
4082 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h, 0);
4083 }
4084
4085 if (!font || !lb->text[0]) return;
4086
4087 int lbbbx = 0, lbbby = 0, lbbbw = 0, lbbbh = 0;
4088 al_get_text_dimensions(font, lb->text, &lbbbx, &lbbby, &lbbbw, &lbbbh);
4089 float fh = (float)lbbbh;
4090
4091 /* effective widget width: expand into available window space when resizable */
4092 float effective_w = wgt->w;
4093 if (win_w > 0) {
4094 float max_from_win = win_w - wgt->x;
4095 if (max_from_win > effective_w) effective_w = max_from_win;
4096 }
4097
4098 int is_link = (lb->link[0] != '\0') ? 1 : 0;
4099 ALLEGRO_COLOR tc;
4100 if (is_link) {
4101 /* links: show in a distinctive colour, underlined on hover */
4102 if (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER) {
4103 tc = style->link_color_hover;
4104 } else {
4105 tc = style->link_color_normal;
4106 }
4107 } else {
4108 tc = _text_for_state(&wgt->theme, wgt->state);
4109 }
4110
4111 float tw = (float)lbbbw;
4112 float max_text_w = effective_w - style->label_padding * 2; /* padding each side */
4113 float tx;
4114
4115 if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
4116 float lpad = style->label_padding;
4117 float view_h = wgt->h - lpad;
4118 float content_h = _label_content_height(lb->text, font, max_text_w);
4119 int need_scrollbar = (content_h > view_h) ? 1 : 0;
4120 float sb_size = need_scrollbar ? style->scrollbar_size : 0;
4121 float text_w = max_text_w - sb_size;
4122
4123 /* clamp scroll_y */
4124 if (need_scrollbar) {
4125 float max_sy = content_h - view_h;
4126 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
4127 if (lb->scroll_y > max_sy) lb->scroll_y = max_sy;
4128 if (lb->scroll_y < 0) lb->scroll_y = 0;
4129 } else {
4130 lb->scroll_y = 0;
4131 }
4132
4133 /* clip to widget bounds (minus scrollbar) */
4134 int pcx, pcy, pcw, pch;
4135 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&pcx, &pcy, &pcw, &pch);
4136 _set_clipping_rect_transformed((int)ax, (int)ay, (int)(wgt->w - sb_size), (int)wgt->h);
4137
4138 float text_y = ay + lpad / 2.0f - lb->scroll_y;
4139 /* draw selection highlight for justified text */
4140 if (lb->sel_start >= 0 && lb->sel_end >= 0 && lb->sel_start != lb->sel_end) {
4141 _draw_justified_selection(font, ax + lpad, text_y, text_w, content_h + fh,
4142 lb->text, lb->sel_start, lb->sel_end, wgt->theme.selection_color);
4143 }
4144 /* pass a large avail_h so _draw_text_justified doesn't truncate; clipping handles visibility */
4145 _draw_text_justified(font, tc, ax + lpad, text_y, text_w, content_h + fh, lb->text);
4146
4147 /* underline for links on hover */
4148 if (is_link && (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER)) {
4149 float draw_w = tw < text_w ? tw : text_w;
4150 al_draw_line(ax + lpad, text_y + fh, ax + lpad + draw_w, text_y + fh, tc, _min_thickness(style->link_underline_thickness));
4151 }
4152
4153 al_set_clipping_rectangle(pcx, pcy, pcw, pch);
4154
4155 /* draw scrollbar */
4156 if (need_scrollbar) {
4157 _draw_widget_vscrollbar(ax, ay + lpad / 2.0f, wgt->w, view_h, content_h, lb->scroll_y, style);
4158 }
4159 return;
4160 }
4161
4162 float ty = ay + (wgt->h - fh) / 2.0f - (float)lbbby;
4163
4164 if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_CENTER) {
4165 if (tw > max_text_w) {
4166 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + style->label_padding, ty, max_text_w, lb->text);
4167 tx = ax + style->label_padding;
4168 } else {
4169 tx = ax + (effective_w - tw) / 2.0f - (float)lbbbx;
4170 al_draw_text(font, tc, tx, ty, 0, lb->text);
4171 }
4172 } else if (lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_RIGHT) {
4173 if (tw > max_text_w) {
4174 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, ax + style->label_padding, ty, max_text_w, lb->text);
4175 tx = ax + style->label_padding;
4176 } else {
4177 tx = ax + effective_w - tw - style->label_padding - (float)lbbbx;
4178 al_draw_text(font, tc, tx, ty, 0, lb->text);
4179 }
4180 } else {
4181 /* N_GUI_ALIGN_LEFT */
4182 tx = ax + style->label_padding;
4183 if (tw > max_text_w) {
4184 _draw_text_truncated(font, tc, tx, ty, max_text_w, lb->text);
4185 } else {
4186 al_draw_text(font, tc, tx, ty, 0, lb->text);
4187 }
4188 }
4189
4190 /* draw selection highlight for non-justified labels */
4191 if (lb->sel_start >= 0 && lb->sel_end >= 0 && lb->sel_start != lb->sel_end) {
4192 int slo = lb->sel_start < lb->sel_end ? lb->sel_start : lb->sel_end;
4193 int shi = lb->sel_start < lb->sel_end ? lb->sel_end : lb->sel_start;
4194 size_t tlen = strlen(lb->text);
4195 if ((size_t)slo > tlen) slo = (int)tlen;
4196 if ((size_t)shi > tlen) shi = (int)tlen;
4197 char stmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
4198 memcpy(stmp, lb->text, (size_t)slo);
4199 stmp[slo] = '\0';
4200 float sx1 = _text_w(font,stmp);
4201 memcpy(stmp, lb->text, (size_t)shi);
4202 stmp[shi] = '\0';
4203 float sx2 = _text_w(font,stmp);
4204 al_draw_filled_rectangle(tx + sx1, ty, tx + sx2, ty + fh, wgt->theme.selection_color);
4205 }
4206
4207 /* underline for links on hover */
4208 if (is_link && (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_HOVER)) {
4209 float draw_w = tw < max_text_w ? tw : max_text_w;
4210 al_draw_line(tx, ty + fh, tx + draw_w, ty + fh, tc, _min_thickness(style->link_underline_thickness));
4211 }
4212}
4213
4217static void _draw_widget(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float ox, float oy, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, float win_w, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4218 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible) return;
4219
4220 /* disabled widgets: force idle state visually, draw with reduced opacity */
4221 int saved_state = wgt->state;
4222 if (!wgt->enabled) {
4223 wgt->state = N_GUI_STATE_IDLE;
4224 }
4225
4226 switch (wgt->type) {
4227 case N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON:
4228 _draw_button(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
4229 break;
4230 case N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER:
4231 _draw_slider(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
4232 break;
4233 case N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA:
4234 _draw_textarea(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
4235 break;
4236 case N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX:
4237 _draw_checkbox(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
4238 break;
4239 case N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR:
4240 _draw_scrollbar(wgt, ox, oy, style);
4241 break;
4242 case N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX:
4243 _draw_listbox(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
4244 break;
4245 case N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST:
4246 _draw_radiolist(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
4247 break;
4248 case N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX:
4249 _draw_combobox(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
4250 break;
4251 case N_GUI_TYPE_IMAGE:
4252 _draw_image(wgt, ox, oy);
4253 break;
4254 case N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL:
4255 _draw_label(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, win_w, style);
4256 break;
4257 case N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU:
4258 _draw_dropmenu(wgt, ox, oy, default_font, style);
4259 break;
4260 default:
4261 break;
4262 }
4263
4264 /* restore state and draw dimming overlay for disabled widgets */
4265 if (!wgt->enabled) {
4266 wgt->state = saved_state;
4267 float dx = ox + wgt->x;
4268 float dy = oy + wgt->y;
4269 al_draw_filled_rectangle(dx, dy, dx + wgt->w, dy + wgt->h,
4270 al_map_rgba(0, 0, 0, 120));
4271 }
4272}
4273
4275static void _draw_window(N_GUI_WINDOW* win, ALLEGRO_FONT* default_font, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4276 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) return;
4277
4278 ALLEGRO_FONT* font = win->font ? win->font : default_font;
4279 int frameless = (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS) ? 1 : 0;
4280 float tbh = frameless ? 0.0f : win->titlebar_h;
4281
4282 /* title bar (skip for frameless windows) */
4283 if (!frameless) {
4284 if (win->titlebar_bitmap) {
4285 al_draw_scaled_bitmap(win->titlebar_bitmap, 0, 0,
4286 (float)al_get_bitmap_width(win->titlebar_bitmap), (float)al_get_bitmap_height(win->titlebar_bitmap),
4287 win->x, win->y, win->w, tbh, 0);
4288 } else {
4289 ALLEGRO_COLOR tb_bg = win->theme.bg_active;
4290 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(win->x, win->y, win->x + win->w, win->y + tbh,
4291 win->theme.corner_rx, win->theme.corner_ry, tb_bg);
4292 }
4293 if (font && win->title[0]) {
4294 int tbbx = 0, tbby = 0, tbbw = 0, tbbh = 0;
4295 al_get_text_dimensions(font, win->title, &tbbx, &tbby, &tbbw, &tbbh);
4296 float fh = (float)tbbh;
4297 float max_title_w = win->w - style->title_max_w_reserve;
4298 _draw_text_truncated(font, win->theme.text_active,
4299 win->x + style->title_padding, win->y + (tbh - fh) / 2.0f - (float)tbby, max_title_w, win->title);
4300 }
4301 }
4302
4303 ALLEGRO_COLOR tb_bd = win->theme.border_normal;
4304
4305 /* body (if not minimised) */
4306 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) {
4307 float body_y = win->y + tbh;
4308 float body_h = win->h - tbh;
4309
4310 /* determine if scrollbars are needed */
4311 int need_vscroll = 0;
4312 int need_hscroll = 0;
4313 float scrollbar_size = style->scrollbar_size;
4314
4315 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR) {
4316 _window_update_content_size(win, default_font);
4317 if (win->content_h > body_h) need_vscroll = 1;
4318 if (win->content_w > win->w) need_hscroll = 1;
4319 /* adjust for scrollbar space */
4320 if (need_vscroll && win->content_w > (win->w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
4321 if (need_hscroll && win->content_h > (body_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
4322 }
4323
4324 float content_area_w = win->w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
4325 float content_area_h = body_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
4326
4327 /* clamp scroll */
4328 if (need_vscroll) {
4329 float max_sy = win->content_h - content_area_h;
4330 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
4331 if (win->scroll_y > max_sy) win->scroll_y = max_sy;
4332 if (win->scroll_y < 0) win->scroll_y = 0;
4333 } else {
4334 win->scroll_y = 0;
4335 }
4336 if (need_hscroll) {
4337 float max_sx = win->content_w - content_area_w;
4338 if (max_sx < 0) max_sx = 0;
4339 if (win->scroll_x > max_sx) win->scroll_x = max_sx;
4340 if (win->scroll_x < 0) win->scroll_x = 0;
4341 } else {
4342 win->scroll_x = 0;
4343 }
4344
4345 /* body background */
4346 if (win->bg_bitmap) {
4347 _draw_bitmap_scaled(win->bg_bitmap, win->x, body_y, win->w, body_h, win->bg_scale_mode);
4348 } else {
4349 al_draw_filled_rectangle(win->x, body_y, win->x + win->w, win->y + win->h,
4350 win->theme.bg_normal);
4351 }
4352 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(win->x, win->y, win->x + win->w, win->y + win->h,
4353 win->theme.corner_rx, win->theme.corner_ry, tb_bd,
4354 _min_thickness(win->theme.border_thickness));
4355
4356 /* draw widgets with clipping to content area */
4357 float ox = win->x - win->scroll_x;
4358 float oy = body_y - win->scroll_y;
4359
4360 /* set clipping rectangle to window content area */
4361 int prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch;
4362 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&prev_cx, &prev_cy, &prev_cw, &prev_ch);
4363 _set_clipping_rect_transformed((int)win->x + (int)style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, (int)body_y,
4364 (int)content_area_w - (int)style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, (int)content_area_h);
4365
4366 /* pass width hint so labels can adapt:
4367 * - auto-scrollbar windows: use content width so labels are never truncated
4368 * (the clipping rect + scrollbars handle overflow)
4369 * - resizable windows (without auto-scrollbar): use window width so labels expand
4370 * - fixed windows: 0 (use widget's own width) */
4371 float label_win_w = 0;
4372 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
4373 label_win_w = win->content_w + style->title_max_w_reserve + style->label_padding;
4374 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
4375 label_win_w = win->w;
4376 list_foreach(node, win->widgets) {
4377 _draw_widget((N_GUI_WIDGET*)node->ptr, ox, oy, default_font, label_win_w, style);
4378 }
4379
4380 /* restore clipping */
4381 al_set_clipping_rectangle(prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch);
4382
4383 /* draw automatic scrollbars */
4384 if (need_vscroll) {
4385 float sb_x = win->x + win->w - scrollbar_size;
4386 float sb_y = body_y;
4387 float sb_h = content_area_h;
4388 /* leave room for resize corner when no horizontal scrollbar */
4389 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_hscroll) sb_h -= scrollbar_size;
4390
4391 /* track */
4392 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, sb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size, sb_y + sb_h,
4393 style->scrollbar_track_color);
4394
4395 /* thumb */
4396 float ratio = content_area_h / win->content_h;
4397 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
4398 float thumb_h = ratio * sb_h;
4399 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
4400 float max_scroll = win->content_h - content_area_h;
4401 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? win->scroll_y / max_scroll : 0;
4402 float thumb_y = sb_y + pos_ratio * (sb_h - thumb_h);
4403 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding,
4404 thumb_y + thumb_h, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
4405 style->scrollbar_thumb_color);
4406 }
4407 if (need_hscroll) {
4408 float sb_x = win->x;
4409 float sb_y = win->y + win->h - scrollbar_size;
4410 float sb_w = content_area_w;
4411 /* leave room for resize corner when no vertical scrollbar */
4412 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_vscroll) sb_w -= scrollbar_size;
4413
4414 /* track */
4415 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, sb_y, sb_x + sb_w, sb_y + scrollbar_size,
4416 style->scrollbar_track_color);
4417
4418 /* thumb */
4419 float ratio = content_area_w / win->content_w;
4420 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
4421 float thumb_w = ratio * sb_w;
4422 if (thumb_w < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
4423 float max_scroll = win->content_w - content_area_w;
4424 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? win->scroll_x / max_scroll : 0;
4425 float thumb_x = sb_x + pos_ratio * (sb_w - thumb_w);
4426 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(thumb_x, sb_y + style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_x + thumb_w,
4427 sb_y + scrollbar_size - style->scrollbar_thumb_padding, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, style->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
4428 style->scrollbar_thumb_color);
4429 }
4430
4431 /* draw resize handle if window is resizable */
4432 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) {
4433 float rx = win->x + win->w;
4434 float ry = win->y + win->h;
4435 float grip_size = style->grip_size;
4436 ALLEGRO_COLOR grip_color = style->grip_color;
4437 /* three diagonal lines in bottom-right corner */
4438 float grip_thick = _min_thickness(style->grip_line_thickness);
4439 al_draw_line(rx - grip_size, ry - 2, rx - 2, ry - grip_size, grip_color, grip_thick);
4440 al_draw_line(rx - grip_size + 4, ry - 2, rx - 2, ry - grip_size + 4, grip_color, grip_thick);
4441 al_draw_line(rx - grip_size + 8, ry - 2, rx - 2, ry - grip_size + 8, grip_color, grip_thick);
4442 }
4443 } else {
4444 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(win->x, win->y, win->x + win->w, win->y + tbh,
4445 win->theme.corner_rx, win->theme.corner_ry, tb_bd,
4446 _min_thickness(win->theme.border_thickness));
4447 }
4448}
4449
4451static void _compute_gui_bounds(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
4452 float max_r = 0, max_b = 0;
4453 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
4454 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
4455 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
4456 float r = win->x + win->w;
4457 float b = win->y + win->h;
4458 if (r > max_r) max_r = r;
4459 if (b > max_b) max_b = b;
4460 }
4461 ctx->gui_bounds_w = max_r;
4462 ctx->gui_bounds_h = max_b;
4463}
4464
4474void n_gui_draw(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
4475 __n_assert(ctx, return);
4476
4477 /* compute bounds and determine if global scrollbars are needed.
4478 * When virtual canvas is active, compare bounds against virtual dimensions
4479 * (since window positions are in virtual coordinates). */
4480 _compute_gui_bounds(ctx);
4481 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_size;
4482 int need_global_vscroll = 0;
4483 int need_global_hscroll = 0;
4484
4485 /* gate on both dimensions: virtual canvas is only active when both are set */
4486 int virtual_active = (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0);
4487 float eff_w = virtual_active ? ctx->virtual_w : ctx->display_w;
4488 float eff_h = virtual_active ? ctx->virtual_h : ctx->display_h;
4489
4490 if (eff_w > 0 && eff_h > 0) {
4491 if (ctx->gui_bounds_h > eff_h) need_global_vscroll = 1;
4492 if (ctx->gui_bounds_w > eff_w) need_global_hscroll = 1;
4493 /* account for scrollbar space */
4494 if (need_global_vscroll && ctx->gui_bounds_w > (eff_w - scrollbar_size)) need_global_hscroll = 1;
4495 if (need_global_hscroll && ctx->gui_bounds_h > (eff_h - scrollbar_size)) need_global_vscroll = 1;
4496
4497 /* clamp global scroll */
4498 float view_w = eff_w - (need_global_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
4499 float view_h = eff_h - (need_global_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
4500 if (need_global_vscroll) {
4501 float max_sy = ctx->gui_bounds_h - view_h;
4502 if (max_sy < 0) max_sy = 0;
4503 if (ctx->global_scroll_y > max_sy) ctx->global_scroll_y = max_sy;
4504 if (ctx->global_scroll_y < 0) ctx->global_scroll_y = 0;
4505 } else {
4506 ctx->global_scroll_y = 0;
4507 }
4508 if (need_global_hscroll) {
4509 float max_sx = ctx->gui_bounds_w - view_w;
4510 if (max_sx < 0) max_sx = 0;
4511 if (ctx->global_scroll_x > max_sx) ctx->global_scroll_x = max_sx;
4512 if (ctx->global_scroll_x < 0) ctx->global_scroll_x = 0;
4513 } else {
4514 ctx->global_scroll_x = 0;
4515 }
4516 }
4517
4518 /* apply global scroll in virtual units, then scale + offset to physical display */
4519 ALLEGRO_TRANSFORM global_tf, prev_tf;
4520 al_copy_transform(&prev_tf, al_get_current_transform());
4521 al_identity_transform(&global_tf);
4522 al_translate_transform(&global_tf, -ctx->global_scroll_x, -ctx->global_scroll_y);
4523 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
4524 al_scale_transform(&global_tf, ctx->gui_scale, ctx->gui_scale);
4525 al_translate_transform(&global_tf, ctx->gui_offset_x, ctx->gui_offset_y);
4526 }
4527 al_compose_transform(&global_tf, &prev_tf);
4528 al_use_transform(&global_tf);
4529
4530 /* clip to the content area (excluding global scrollbar space) */
4531 int prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch;
4532 int set_clip = 0;
4533 if (need_global_vscroll || need_global_hscroll) {
4534 al_get_clipping_rectangle(&prev_cx, &prev_cy, &prev_cw, &prev_ch);
4535 /* clipping is in physical pixels; map virtual scrollbar area to screen */
4536 float clip_vw = eff_w - (need_global_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
4537 float clip_vh = eff_h - (need_global_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
4538 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
4539 al_set_clipping_rectangle((int)ctx->gui_offset_x, (int)ctx->gui_offset_y,
4540 (int)(clip_vw * ctx->gui_scale),
4541 (int)(clip_vh * ctx->gui_scale));
4542 } else {
4543 al_set_clipping_rectangle(0, 0, (int)clip_vw, (int)clip_vh);
4544 }
4545 set_clip = 1;
4546 }
4547
4548 /* auto-apply autofit for windows that have it configured */
4549 list_foreach(anode, ctx->windows) {
4550 N_GUI_WINDOW* awin = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)anode->ptr;
4551 if (awin && awin->autofit_flags) {
4552 n_gui_window_apply_autofit(ctx, awin->id);
4553 }
4554 }
4555
4556 list_foreach(node, ctx->windows) {
4557 _draw_window((N_GUI_WINDOW*)node->ptr, ctx->default_font, &ctx->style);
4558 }
4559 /* draw combobox dropdown overlay on top of everything */
4560 _draw_combobox_dropdown(ctx);
4561 /* draw dropdown menu panel overlay on top of everything */
4562 _draw_dropmenu_panel(ctx);
4563
4564 /* restore transform and clipping */
4565 if (set_clip) {
4566 al_set_clipping_rectangle(prev_cx, prev_cy, prev_cw, prev_ch);
4567 }
4568
4569 /* draw global scrollbars: apply virtual canvas transform (without scroll)
4570 * so scrollbars appear at the edges of the virtual canvas area */
4571 if (need_global_vscroll || need_global_hscroll) {
4572 ALLEGRO_TRANSFORM sb_tf;
4573 al_identity_transform(&sb_tf);
4574 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
4575 al_scale_transform(&sb_tf, ctx->gui_scale, ctx->gui_scale);
4576 al_translate_transform(&sb_tf, ctx->gui_offset_x, ctx->gui_offset_y);
4577 }
4578 al_compose_transform(&sb_tf, &prev_tf);
4579 al_use_transform(&sb_tf);
4580 }
4581
4582 if (need_global_vscroll) {
4583 float sb_x = eff_w - scrollbar_size;
4584 float sb_y = 0;
4585 float sb_h = eff_h - (need_global_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
4586 float view_h = sb_h;
4587
4588 /* track */
4589 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, sb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size, sb_y + sb_h,
4590 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_track_color);
4591
4592 /* thumb */
4593 float ratio = view_h / ctx->gui_bounds_h;
4594 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
4595 float thumb_h = ratio * sb_h;
4596 if (thumb_h < ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min;
4597 float max_scroll = ctx->gui_bounds_h - view_h;
4598 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? ctx->global_scroll_y / max_scroll : 0;
4599 float thumb_y = sb_y + pos_ratio * (sb_h - thumb_h);
4600 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size - ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding,
4601 thumb_y + thumb_h, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
4602 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_color);
4603 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(sb_x + ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_y, sb_x + scrollbar_size - ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding,
4604 thumb_y + thumb_h, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
4605 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_border_thickness);
4606 }
4607 if (need_global_hscroll) {
4608 float sb_x = 0;
4609 float sb_y = eff_h - scrollbar_size;
4610 float sb_w = eff_w - (need_global_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
4611 float view_w = sb_w;
4612
4613 /* track */
4614 al_draw_filled_rectangle(sb_x, sb_y, sb_x + sb_w, sb_y + scrollbar_size,
4615 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_track_color);
4616
4617 /* thumb */
4618 float ratio = view_w / ctx->gui_bounds_w;
4619 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
4620 float thumb_w = ratio * sb_w;
4621 if (thumb_w < ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min;
4622 float max_scroll = ctx->gui_bounds_w - view_w;
4623 float pos_ratio = (max_scroll > 0) ? ctx->global_scroll_x / max_scroll : 0;
4624 float thumb_x = sb_x + pos_ratio * (sb_w - thumb_w);
4625 al_draw_filled_rounded_rectangle(thumb_x, sb_y + ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_x + thumb_w,
4626 sb_y + scrollbar_size - ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
4627 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_color);
4628 al_draw_rounded_rectangle(thumb_x, sb_y + ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, thumb_x + thumb_w,
4629 sb_y + scrollbar_size - ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_padding, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r,
4630 ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color, ctx->style.global_scrollbar_border_thickness);
4631 }
4632
4633 al_use_transform(&prev_tf);
4634}
4635
4636/* =========================================================================
4637 * VIRTUAL CANVAS / DISPLAY / DPI
4638 * ========================================================================= */
4639
4648void n_gui_set_virtual_size(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float w, float h) {
4649 __n_assert(ctx, return);
4650 if ((w > 0) != (h > 0)) {
4651 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_set_virtual_size: both dimensions must be > 0 (got w=%.1f, h=%.1f); virtual canvas not changed", w, h);
4652 return;
4653 }
4654 ctx->virtual_w = w;
4655 ctx->virtual_h = h;
4656 n_gui_update_transform(ctx);
4657}
4658
4666void n_gui_update_transform(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
4667 __n_assert(ctx, return);
4668
4669 if (ctx->virtual_w <= 0 || ctx->virtual_h <= 0 ||
4670 ctx->display_w <= 0 || ctx->display_h <= 0) {
4671 ctx->gui_scale = 1.0f;
4672 ctx->gui_offset_x = 0.0f;
4673 ctx->gui_offset_y = 0.0f;
4674 return;
4675 }
4676
4677 float sx = ctx->display_w / ctx->virtual_w;
4678 float sy = ctx->display_h / ctx->virtual_h;
4679 ctx->gui_scale = (sx < sy) ? sx : sy;
4680 if (ctx->gui_scale < 0.01f) ctx->gui_scale = 0.01f;
4681
4682 float scaled_w = ctx->virtual_w * ctx->gui_scale;
4683 float scaled_h = ctx->virtual_h * ctx->gui_scale;
4684 ctx->gui_offset_x = (ctx->display_w - scaled_w) * 0.5f;
4685 ctx->gui_offset_y = (ctx->display_h - scaled_h) * 0.5f;
4686}
4687
4693void n_gui_screen_to_virtual(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float sx, float sy, float* vx, float* vy) {
4694 __n_assert(ctx, return);
4695
4696 if (ctx->virtual_w <= 0 || ctx->virtual_h <= 0 || ctx->gui_scale <= 0) {
4697 if (vx) *vx = sx;
4698 if (vy) *vy = sy;
4699 return;
4700 }
4701
4702 float scale = ctx->gui_scale;
4703 if (vx) *vx = (sx - ctx->gui_offset_x) / scale;
4704 if (vy) *vy = (sy - ctx->gui_offset_y) / scale;
4705}
4706
4712void n_gui_set_display_size(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float w, float h) {
4713 __n_assert(ctx, return);
4714 ctx->display_w = w;
4715 ctx->display_h = h;
4716 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0) {
4717 n_gui_update_transform(ctx);
4718 }
4719}
4720
4724void n_gui_set_display(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, ALLEGRO_DISPLAY* display) {
4725 __n_assert(ctx, return);
4726 ctx->display = display;
4727}
4728
4732void n_gui_set_dpi_scale(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, float scale) {
4733 __n_assert(ctx, return);
4734 if (scale < 0.25f) scale = 0.25f;
4735 if (scale > 8.0f) scale = 8.0f;
4736 ctx->dpi_scale = scale;
4737}
4738
4742float n_gui_get_dpi_scale(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
4743 __n_assert(ctx, return 1.0f);
4744 return ctx->dpi_scale;
4745}
4746
4766float n_gui_detect_dpi_scale(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, ALLEGRO_DISPLAY* display) {
4767 __n_assert(ctx, return 1.0f);
4768 __n_assert(display, return 1.0f);
4769
4770 float scale = 1.0f;
4771
4772 /* Method: compare physical pixel size to logical window size.
4773 * On HiDPI displays, al_get_display_width returns the logical size while
4774 * the backbuffer bitmap has the physical pixel size. */
4775 int logical_w = al_get_display_width(display);
4776 int logical_h = al_get_display_height(display);
4777 ALLEGRO_BITMAP* backbuffer = al_get_backbuffer(display);
4778 if (backbuffer && logical_w > 0 && logical_h > 0) {
4779 int physical_w = al_get_bitmap_width(backbuffer);
4780 int physical_h = al_get_bitmap_height(backbuffer);
4781 float scale_x = (float)physical_w / (float)logical_w;
4782 float scale_y = (float)physical_h / (float)logical_h;
4783 scale = (scale_x > scale_y) ? scale_x : scale_y;
4784 if (scale < 0.5f) scale = 1.0f; /* sanity */
4785 }
4786
4787#ifdef ALLEGRO_ANDROID
4788 /* On Android, use the display DPI option if available.
4789 * Android standard baseline is 160 DPI; scale = actual_dpi / 160. */
4790 int dpi = al_get_display_option(display, ALLEGRO_DEFAULT_DISPLAY_ADAPTER);
4791 if (dpi <= 0) {
4792 /* fallback: try the pixel ratio we already computed */
4793 } else {
4794 float android_scale = (float)dpi / 160.0f;
4795 if (android_scale >= 0.5f) scale = android_scale;
4796 }
4797#endif
4798
4799 if (scale < 0.25f) scale = 0.25f;
4800 if (scale > 8.0f) scale = 8.0f;
4801 ctx->dpi_scale = scale;
4802 return scale;
4803}
4804
4805/* =========================================================================
4806 * EVENT PROCESSING
4807 * ========================================================================= */
4808
4810static void _slider_update_from_mouse(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float mx, float my, float win_x, float win_content_y) {
4811 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)wgt->data;
4812 if (wgt->w <= 0) return;
4813 if (wgt->h <= 0) return;
4814 double ratio;
4815
4816 if (sd->orientation == N_GUI_SLIDER_V) {
4817 float ay = win_content_y + wgt->y;
4818 float local_y = my - ay;
4819 /* vertical slider: bottom = max, top = min, so invert */
4820 ratio = 1.0 - (double)local_y / (double)wgt->h;
4821 } else {
4822 float ax = win_x + wgt->x;
4823 float local_x = mx - ax;
4824 ratio = (double)local_x / (double)wgt->w;
4825 }
4826 if (ratio < 0.0) ratio = 0.0;
4827 if (ratio > 1.0) ratio = 1.0;
4828 double new_val = sd->min_val + ratio * (sd->max_val - sd->min_val);
4829 if (sd->step > 0.0)
4830 new_val = _slider_snap_value(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, sd->step);
4831 else
4832 new_val = _clamp(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
4833 if (new_val != sd->value) {
4834 sd->value = new_val;
4835 if (sd->on_change) {
4836 sd->on_change(wgt->id, sd->value, sd->user_data);
4837 }
4838 }
4839}
4840
4842static void _scrollbar_update_from_mouse(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, float mx, float my, float win_x, float win_content_y, N_GUI_STYLE* style) {
4843 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)wgt->data;
4844 float ax = win_x + wgt->x;
4845 float ay = win_content_y + wgt->y;
4846
4847 double ratio_viewport = sb->viewport_size / sb->content_size;
4848 if (ratio_viewport > 1.0) ratio_viewport = 1.0;
4849 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
4850 if (max_scroll < 0) max_scroll = 0;
4851
4852 double pos_ratio;
4853 if (sb->orientation == N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_V) {
4854 float thumb_h = (float)(ratio_viewport * (double)wgt->h);
4855 if (thumb_h < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
4856 float track_range = wgt->h - thumb_h;
4857 if (track_range <= 0) return;
4858 pos_ratio = (double)(my - ay - thumb_h / 2.0f) / (double)track_range;
4859 } else {
4860 float thumb_w = (float)(ratio_viewport * (double)wgt->w);
4861 if (thumb_w < style->scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = style->scrollbar_thumb_min;
4862 float track_range = wgt->w - thumb_w;
4863 if (track_range <= 0) return;
4864 pos_ratio = (double)(mx - ax - thumb_w / 2.0f) / (double)track_range;
4865 }
4866 if (pos_ratio < 0.0) pos_ratio = 0.0;
4867 if (pos_ratio > 1.0) pos_ratio = 1.0;
4868 sb->scroll_pos = pos_ratio * max_scroll;
4869 if (sb->on_scroll) {
4870 sb->on_scroll(wgt->id, sb->scroll_pos, sb->user_data);
4871 }
4872}
4873
4875static int _utf8_encode(int cp, char* out) {
4876 if (cp < 0x80) {
4877 out[0] = (char)cp;
4878 return 1;
4879 }
4880 if (cp < 0x800) {
4881 out[0] = (char)(0xC0 | (cp >> 6));
4882 out[1] = (char)(0x80 | (cp & 0x3F));
4883 return 2;
4884 }
4885 if (cp < 0x10000) {
4886 out[0] = (char)(0xE0 | (cp >> 12));
4887 out[1] = (char)(0x80 | ((cp >> 6) & 0x3F));
4888 out[2] = (char)(0x80 | (cp & 0x3F));
4889 return 3;
4890 }
4891 if (cp < 0x110000) {
4892 out[0] = (char)(0xF0 | (cp >> 18));
4893 out[1] = (char)(0x80 | ((cp >> 12) & 0x3F));
4894 out[2] = (char)(0x80 | ((cp >> 6) & 0x3F));
4895 out[3] = (char)(0x80 | (cp & 0x3F));
4896 return 4;
4897 }
4898 return 0;
4899}
4900
4902static void _textarea_clear_selection(N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td) {
4903 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
4904 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
4905}
4906
4908static void _textarea_delete_selection(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt) {
4909 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
4910 if (!_textarea_has_selection(td)) return;
4911 size_t lo, hi;
4912 _textarea_sel_range(td, &lo, &hi);
4913 size_t del_len = hi - lo;
4914 memmove(&td->text[lo], &td->text[hi], td->text_len - hi + 1);
4915 td->text_len -= del_len;
4916 td->cursor_pos = lo;
4917 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
4918 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
4919}
4920
4922static int _textarea_copy_to_clipboard(N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td, ALLEGRO_DISPLAY* display) {
4923 if (!display || !_textarea_has_selection(td)) return 0;
4924 size_t lo, hi;
4925 _textarea_sel_range(td, &lo, &hi);
4926 char tmp[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
4927 size_t len = hi - lo;
4928 if (len >= N_GUI_TEXT_MAX) len = N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1;
4929 memcpy(tmp, &td->text[lo], len);
4930 tmp[len] = '\0';
4931 al_set_clipboard_text(display, tmp);
4932 return 1;
4933}
4934
4938static int _textarea_handle_key(N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt, ALLEGRO_EVENT* ev, ALLEGRO_FONT* font, float pad, float sb_size, N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
4939 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
4940
4941 /* reset blink timer so cursor stays visible during typing */
4942 td->cursor_time = al_get_time();
4943 /* clear mouse-wheel scroll flag so auto-scroll resumes following the cursor */
4944 td->scroll_from_wheel = 0;
4945
4946 int shift = (ev->keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_SHIFT) ? 1 : 0;
4947 int ctrl = (ev->keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_CTRL) ? 1 : 0;
4948
4949 /* Ctrl+A: select all */
4950 if (ctrl && ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_A) {
4951 td->sel_start = 0;
4952 td->sel_end = td->text_len;
4953 td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
4954 return 1;
4955 }
4956
4957 /* Ctrl+C: copy */
4958 if (ctrl && ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_C) {
4959 if (ctx && ctx->display) {
4960 _textarea_copy_to_clipboard(td, ctx->display);
4961 }
4962 return 1;
4963 }
4964
4965 /* Ctrl+X: cut */
4966 if (ctrl && ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_X) {
4967 if (ctx && ctx->display && _textarea_has_selection(td)) {
4968 _textarea_copy_to_clipboard(td, ctx->display);
4969 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
4970 }
4971 return 1;
4972 }
4973
4974 /* Ctrl+V: paste */
4975 if (ctrl && ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_V) {
4976 if (ctx && ctx->display) {
4977 char* clip = al_get_clipboard_text(ctx->display);
4978 if (clip) {
4979 /* delete selection first if any */
4980 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
4981 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
4982 }
4983 size_t clip_len = strlen(clip);
4984 /* filter out non-printable except newline in multiline mode */
4985 char filtered[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
4986 size_t flen = 0;
4987 for (size_t ci = 0; ci < clip_len && flen < N_GUI_TEXT_MAX - 1; ci++) {
4988 if (clip[ci] == '\n') {
4989 if (td->multiline) filtered[flen++] = '\n';
4990 } else if ((unsigned char)clip[ci] >= 32 || ((unsigned char)clip[ci] & 0xC0) == 0x80) {
4991 filtered[flen++] = clip[ci];
4992 } else if (((unsigned char)clip[ci] & 0xC0) == 0xC0) {
4993 filtered[flen++] = clip[ci]; /* UTF-8 lead byte */
4994 }
4995 }
4996 filtered[flen] = '\0';
4997 if (flen > 0 && td->text_len + flen <= td->char_limit) {
4998 memmove(&td->text[td->cursor_pos + flen], &td->text[td->cursor_pos], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos + 1);
4999 memcpy(&td->text[td->cursor_pos], filtered, flen);
5000 td->cursor_pos += flen;
5001 td->text_len += flen;
5002 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5003 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
5004 }
5005 al_free(clip);
5006 }
5007 }
5008 return 1;
5009 }
5010
5011 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_BACKSPACE) {
5012 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5013 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
5014 } else if (td->cursor_pos > 0 && td->text_len > 0) {
5015 size_t erase_start = td->cursor_pos;
5016 int cont_count = 0;
5017 do {
5018 erase_start--;
5019 cont_count++;
5020 } while (erase_start > 0 && cont_count <= 3 && ((unsigned char)td->text[erase_start] & 0xC0) == 0x80);
5021 size_t erase_len = td->cursor_pos - erase_start;
5022 memmove(&td->text[erase_start], &td->text[td->cursor_pos], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos + 1);
5023 td->cursor_pos = erase_start;
5024 td->text_len -= erase_len;
5025 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5026 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
5027 }
5028 return 1;
5029 }
5030 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_DELETE) {
5031 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5032 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
5033 } else if (td->cursor_pos < td->text_len) {
5034 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[td->cursor_pos]);
5035 if (td->cursor_pos + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - td->cursor_pos);
5036 memmove(&td->text[td->cursor_pos], &td->text[td->cursor_pos + (size_t)clen], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos - (size_t)clen + 1);
5037 td->text_len -= (size_t)clen;
5038 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5039 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
5040 }
5041 return 1;
5042 }
5043 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_LEFT) {
5044 if (!shift && _textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5045 /* collapse selection to left edge */
5046 size_t lo, hi;
5047 _textarea_sel_range(td, &lo, &hi);
5048 td->cursor_pos = lo;
5049 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5050 } else if (td->cursor_pos > 0) {
5051 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5052 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
5053 }
5054 int skip = 0;
5055 do {
5056 td->cursor_pos--;
5057 } while (skip++ < 3 && td->cursor_pos > 0 && ((unsigned char)td->text[td->cursor_pos] & 0xC0) == 0x80);
5058 if (shift)
5059 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
5060 else
5061 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5062 }
5063 return 1;
5064 }
5065 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_RIGHT) {
5066 if (!shift && _textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5067 /* collapse selection to right edge */
5068 size_t lo, hi;
5069 _textarea_sel_range(td, &lo, &hi);
5070 td->cursor_pos = hi;
5071 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5072 } else if (td->cursor_pos < td->text_len) {
5073 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5074 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
5075 }
5076 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[td->cursor_pos]);
5077 td->cursor_pos += (size_t)clen;
5078 if (td->cursor_pos > td->text_len) td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
5079 if (shift)
5080 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
5081 else
5082 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5083 }
5084 return 1;
5085 }
5086 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) {
5087 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5088 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
5089 }
5090 td->cursor_pos = 0;
5091 if (shift)
5092 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
5093 else
5094 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5095 return 1;
5096 }
5097 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) {
5098 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5099 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
5100 }
5101 td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
5102 if (shift)
5103 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
5104 else
5105 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5106 return 1;
5107 }
5108
5109 /* UP/DOWN arrow keys: move cursor to previous/next visual line in multiline mode */
5110 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP || ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN) {
5111 if (!td->multiline || !font) return 1;
5112 if (shift && !_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5113 td->sel_start = td->cursor_pos;
5114 }
5115
5116 /* compute wrap width consistently with rendering: subtract scrollbar
5117 * width when content overflows, then subtract padding. */
5118 float base_wrap_w = wgt->w - pad * 2;
5119 float text_area_h = wgt->h - pad * 2;
5120 float content_h = _textarea_content_height(td, font, wgt->w, pad);
5121 float wrap_w = (content_h > text_area_h)
5122 ? (wgt->w - sb_size - pad * 2)
5123 : base_wrap_w;
5124
5125 /* pass 1: find the cursor's visual line number and x offset */
5126 float cx = 0;
5127 int line = 0;
5128 int cursor_line = 0;
5129 float cursor_x = 0;
5130
5131 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->text_len;) {
5132 if (i == td->cursor_pos) {
5133 cursor_line = line;
5134 cursor_x = cx;
5135 }
5136 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
5137 cx = 0;
5138 line++;
5139 i++;
5140 continue;
5141 }
5142 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
5143 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
5144 char ch[5];
5145 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
5146 ch[clen] = '\0';
5147 float cw = _text_w(font,ch);
5148 if (cx + cw > wrap_w) {
5149 cx = 0;
5150 line++;
5151 if (i == td->cursor_pos) {
5152 cursor_line = line;
5153 cursor_x = cx;
5154 }
5155 }
5156 cx += cw;
5157 i += (size_t)clen;
5158 }
5159 if (td->cursor_pos >= td->text_len) {
5160 cursor_line = line;
5161 cursor_x = cx;
5162 }
5163 int total_lines = line;
5164
5165 /* determine target line */
5166 int target_line;
5167 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP) {
5168 if (cursor_line <= 0) {
5169 td->cursor_pos = 0;
5170 return 1;
5171 }
5172 target_line = cursor_line - 1;
5173 } else {
5174 if (cursor_line >= total_lines) {
5175 td->cursor_pos = td->text_len;
5176 return 1;
5177 }
5178 target_line = cursor_line + 1;
5179 }
5180
5181 /* pass 2: find the byte position on target_line closest to cursor_x */
5182 cx = 0;
5183 line = 0;
5184 size_t best_pos = 0;
5185 float best_dist = 1e9f;
5186
5187 /* check position 0 */
5188 if (line == target_line) {
