5189 best_dist = (cursor_x >= 0) ? cursor_x : -cursor_x;
5190 best_pos = 0;
5191 }
5192
5193 for (size_t i = 0; i < td->text_len;) {
5194 if (td->text[i] == '\n') {
5195 if (line >= target_line) break;
5196 cx = 0;
5197 line++;
5198 if (line == target_line) {
5199 size_t pos = i + 1;
5200 float dist = (cursor_x >= cx) ? (cursor_x - cx) : (cx - cursor_x);
5201 if (dist < best_dist) {
5202 best_dist = dist;
5203 best_pos = pos;
5204 }
5205 }
5206 i++;
5207 continue;
5208 }
5209 int clen = _utf8_char_len((unsigned char)td->text[i]);
5210 if (i + (size_t)clen > td->text_len) clen = (int)(td->text_len - i);
5211 char ch[5];
5212 memcpy(ch, &td->text[i], (size_t)clen);
5213 ch[clen] = '\0';
5214 float cw = _text_w(font,ch);
5215 if (cx + cw > wrap_w) {
5216 if (line >= target_line) break;
5217 cx = 0;
5218 line++;
5219 if (line == target_line) {
5220 float dist = (cursor_x >= cx) ? (cursor_x - cx) : (cx - cursor_x);
5221 if (dist < best_dist) {
5222 best_dist = dist;
5223 best_pos = i;
5224 }
5225 }
5226 }
5227 cx += cw;
5228 /* check position after this character */
5229 if (line == target_line) {
5230 float dist = (cursor_x >= cx) ? (cursor_x - cx) : (cx - cursor_x);
5231 if (dist < best_dist) {
5232 best_dist = dist;
5233 best_pos = i + (size_t)clen;
5234 if (best_pos > td->text_len) best_pos = td->text_len;
5235 }
5236 }
5237 i += (size_t)clen;
5238 }
5239
5240 td->cursor_pos = best_pos;
5241 if (shift)
5242 td->sel_end = td->cursor_pos;
5243 else
5244 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5245 return 1;
5246 }
5247
5248 if (ev->keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_ENTER) {
5249 if (td->multiline) {
5250 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5251 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
5252 }
5253 if (td->text_len < td->char_limit) {
5254 memmove(&td->text[td->cursor_pos + 1], &td->text[td->cursor_pos], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos + 1);
5255 td->text[td->cursor_pos] = '\n';
5256 td->cursor_pos++;
5257 td->text_len++;
5258 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5259 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
5260 }
5261 }
5262 /* in single-line mode, let ENTER pass through to button keybinds */
5263 return td->multiline ? 1 : 0;
5264 }
5265
5266 /* printable character: encode Unicode code point as UTF-8 */
5267 if (ev->keyboard.unichar >= 32) {
5268 /* delete selection first */
5269 if (_textarea_has_selection(td)) {
5270 _textarea_delete_selection(wgt);
5271 }
5272 char utf8[4];
5273 int utf8_len = _utf8_encode(ev->keyboard.unichar, utf8);
5274 if (utf8_len > 0 && td->text_len + (size_t)utf8_len <= td->char_limit) {
5275 memmove(&td->text[td->cursor_pos + (size_t)utf8_len], &td->text[td->cursor_pos], td->text_len - td->cursor_pos + 1);
5276 memcpy(&td->text[td->cursor_pos], utf8, (size_t)utf8_len);
5277 td->cursor_pos += (size_t)utf8_len;
5278 td->text_len += (size_t)utf8_len;
5279 _textarea_clear_selection(td);
5280 if (td->on_change) td->on_change(wgt->id, td->text, td->user_data);
5281 }
5282 }
5283 return 1;
5284}
5285
5295int n_gui_process_event(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, ALLEGRO_EVENT event) {
5296 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
5297
5298 int event_consumed = 0;
5299
5300 /* When the display loses focus (e.g. OS window is moved to another monitor via the
5301 * title bar, or another window steals focus), examples typically call
5302 * al_flush_event_queue() which discards any pending MOUSE_BUTTON_UP events.
5303 * Without resetting our state here, the GUI would keep its drag/resize flags set
5304 * and continue moving/resizing windows on the next MOUSE_AXES event, which is the
5305 * root cause of GUI windows being unintentionally resized when the OS window is
5306 * moved between monitors. */
5307 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_DISPLAY_SWITCH_OUT) {
5308 ctx->mouse_b1 = 0;
5309 ctx->mouse_b1_prev = 0;
5310 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
5311 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
5312 win->state &= ~(N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING | N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING | N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG);
5313 }
5314 ctx->global_vscroll_drag = 0;
5315 ctx->global_hscroll_drag = 0;
5316 return 0;
5317 }
5318
5319 /* track mouse */
5320 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES) {
5321 ctx->mouse_x = event.mouse.x;
5322 ctx->mouse_y = event.mouse.y;
5323 }
5324 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN && event.mouse.button == 1) {
5325 ctx->mouse_b1_prev = ctx->mouse_b1;
5326 ctx->mouse_b1 = 1;
5327 ctx->mouse_x = event.mouse.x;
5328 ctx->mouse_y = event.mouse.y;
5329 }
5330 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_UP && event.mouse.button == 1) {
5331 ctx->mouse_b1_prev = ctx->mouse_b1;
5332 ctx->mouse_b1 = 0;
5333 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = -1;
5334 }
5335
5336 /* Unified widget scrollbar drag: update scroll position while mouse held */
5337 if (ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id >= 0 && ctx->mouse_b1 &&
5338 (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES || event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN)) {
5339 N_GUI_WIDGET* drag_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id);
5340 if (drag_wgt && drag_wgt->data) {
5341 float d_ox = 0, d_oy = 0;
5342 N_GUI_WINDOW* d_win = _find_widget_window(ctx, drag_wgt->id, &d_ox, &d_oy);
5343 if (d_win) {
5344 ALLEGRO_FONT* d_font = drag_wgt->font ? drag_wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
5345 float d_fh = d_font ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(d_font) : 16.0f;
5346 float d_my = (float)ctx->mouse_y;
5347 switch (drag_wgt->type) {
5348 case N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX: {
5349 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
5350 if (cbd->is_open && (int)cbd->nb_items > cbd->max_visible) {
5351 float ih = cbd->item_height > d_fh ? cbd->item_height : d_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
5352 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y + drag_wgt->h;
5353 float dd_h = (float)cbd->max_visible * ih;
5354 cbd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(d_my, d_ay, dd_h, cbd->max_visible, (int)cbd->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5355 }
5356 break;
5357 }
5358 case N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU: {
5359 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
5360 if (dmd->is_open && (int)dmd->nb_entries > dmd->max_visible) {
5361 float ih = dmd->item_height > d_fh ? dmd->item_height : d_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
5362 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y + drag_wgt->h;
5363 float dd_h = (float)dmd->max_visible * ih;
5364 dmd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(d_my, d_ay, dd_h, dmd->max_visible, (int)dmd->nb_entries, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5365 }
5366 break;
5367 }
5368 case N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX: {
5369 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* lbd = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
5370 float ih = lbd->item_height > d_fh ? lbd->item_height : d_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
5371 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y;
5372 int visible = (int)(drag_wgt->h / ih);
5373 lbd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(d_my, d_ay, drag_wgt->h, visible, (int)lbd->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5374 break;
5375 }
5376 case N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST: {
5377 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rld = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)drag_wgt->data;
5378 float ih = rld->item_height > d_fh ? rld->item_height : d_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
5379 float d_ay = d_oy + drag_wgt->y;
5380 int visible = (int)(drag_wgt->h / ih);
5381 rld->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(d_my, d_ay, drag_wgt->h, visible, (int)rld->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5382 break;
5383 }
5384 default:
5385 break;
5386 }
5387 return 1;
5388 }
5389 }
5390 }
5391
5392 /* screen-space mouse (for global scrollbar interaction) */
5393 float screen_mx = (float)ctx->mouse_x;
5394 float screen_my = (float)ctx->mouse_y;
5395 /* virtual-space mouse: reverse the virtual canvas transform first */
5396 float virtual_mx = screen_mx;
5397 float virtual_my = screen_my;
5398 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
5399 virtual_mx = (screen_mx - ctx->gui_offset_x) / ctx->gui_scale;
5400 virtual_my = (screen_my - ctx->gui_offset_y) / ctx->gui_scale;
5401 }
5402 /* GUI-space mouse (offset by global scroll) */
5403 float mx = virtual_mx + ctx->global_scroll_x;
5404 float my = virtual_my + ctx->global_scroll_y;
5405 int just_pressed = (ctx->mouse_b1 == 1 && ctx->mouse_b1_prev == 0 &&
5406 event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN)
5407 ? 1
5408 : 0;
5409 int just_released = (ctx->mouse_b1 == 0 && ctx->mouse_b1_prev == 1 &&
5410 event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_UP)
5411 ? 1
5412 : 0;
5413
5414 /* effective dimensions: gate on both dimensions for virtual canvas */
5415 int virtual_active = (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0);
5416 float eff_w = virtual_active ? ctx->virtual_w : ctx->display_w;
5417 float eff_h = virtual_active ? ctx->virtual_h : ctx->display_h;
5418
5419 /* ---- handle global scrollbar drag ---- */
5420 if (ctx->global_vscroll_drag || ctx->global_hscroll_drag) {
5421 if (ctx->mouse_b1 && (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES || event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN)) {
5422 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_size;
5423 _compute_gui_bounds(ctx);
5424 if (ctx->global_vscroll_drag && eff_h > 0) {
5425 int need_hscroll = (ctx->gui_bounds_w > eff_w) ? 1 : 0;
5426 float sb_h = eff_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5427 float view_h = sb_h;
5428 float ratio = view_h / ctx->gui_bounds_h;
5429 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
5430 float thumb_h = ratio * sb_h;
5431 if (thumb_h < ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_h = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min;
5432 float max_scroll = ctx->gui_bounds_h - view_h;
5433 float track_range = sb_h - thumb_h;
5434 if (track_range > 0 && max_scroll > 0) {
5435 float pos_ratio = (virtual_my - thumb_h / 2.0f) / track_range;
5436 if (pos_ratio < 0) pos_ratio = 0;
5437 if (pos_ratio > 1) pos_ratio = 1;
5438 ctx->global_scroll_y = pos_ratio * max_scroll;
5439 }
5440 }
5441 if (ctx->global_hscroll_drag && eff_w > 0) {
5442 int need_vscroll = (ctx->gui_bounds_h > eff_h) ? 1 : 0;
5443 float sb_w = eff_w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5444 float view_w = sb_w;
5445 float ratio = view_w / ctx->gui_bounds_w;
5446 if (ratio > 1.0f) ratio = 1.0f;
5447 float thumb_w = ratio * sb_w;
5448 if (thumb_w < ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min) thumb_w = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_thumb_min;
5449 float max_scroll = ctx->gui_bounds_w - view_w;
5450 float track_range = sb_w - thumb_w;
5451 if (track_range > 0 && max_scroll > 0) {
5452 float pos_ratio = (virtual_mx - thumb_w / 2.0f) / track_range;
5453 if (pos_ratio < 0) pos_ratio = 0;
5454 if (pos_ratio > 1) pos_ratio = 1;
5455 ctx->global_scroll_x = pos_ratio * max_scroll;
5456 }
5457 }
5458 return 1;
5459 }
5460 if (just_released) {
5461 ctx->global_vscroll_drag = 0;
5462 ctx->global_hscroll_drag = 0;
5463 }
5464 return 1;
5465 }
5466
5467 /* ---- check global scrollbar click ---- */
5468 if (just_pressed && eff_w > 0 && eff_h > 0) {
5469 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.global_scrollbar_size;
5470 _compute_gui_bounds(ctx);
5471 int need_vscroll = (ctx->gui_bounds_h > eff_h) ? 1 : 0;
5472 int need_hscroll = (ctx->gui_bounds_w > eff_w) ? 1 : 0;
5473 if (need_vscroll && ctx->gui_bounds_w > (eff_w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
5474 if (need_hscroll && ctx->gui_bounds_h > (eff_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
5475
5476 if (need_vscroll) {
5477 float sb_x = eff_w - scrollbar_size;
5478 float sb_h = eff_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5479 if (_point_in_rect(virtual_mx, virtual_my, sb_x, 0, scrollbar_size, sb_h)) {
5480 ctx->global_vscroll_drag = 1;
5481 return 1;
5482 }
5483 }
5484 if (need_hscroll) {
5485 float sb_y = eff_h - scrollbar_size;
5486 float sb_w = eff_w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5487 if (_point_in_rect(virtual_mx, virtual_my, 0, sb_y, sb_w, scrollbar_size)) {
5488 ctx->global_hscroll_drag = 1;
5489 return 1;
5490 }
5491 }
5492 }
5493
5494 /* ---- handle open combobox dropdown first (it overlays everything) ---- */
5495 if (just_pressed && ctx->open_combobox_id >= 0) {
5496 N_GUI_WIDGET* cb_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_combobox_id);
5497 if (cb_wgt && cb_wgt->data) {
5498 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)cb_wgt->data;
5499
5500 /* find absolute position of the combobox (account for window scroll) */
5501 float cb_ox = 0, cb_oy = 0;
5502 _find_widget_window(ctx, cb_wgt->id, &cb_ox, &cb_oy);
5503
5504 ALLEGRO_FONT* cb_font = cb_wgt->font ? cb_wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
5505 float cb_fh = cb_font ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(cb_font) : 16.0f;
5506 float cb_ih = cbd->item_height > cb_fh ? cbd->item_height : cb_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
5507 float cb_ax = cb_ox + cb_wgt->x;
5508 float cb_ay = cb_oy + cb_wgt->y + cb_wgt->h;
5509 int cb_vis = (int)cbd->nb_items;
5510 if (cb_vis > cbd->max_visible) cb_vis = cbd->max_visible;
5511 float cb_dd_h = (float)cb_vis * cb_ih;
5512
5513 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, cb_ax, cb_ay, cb_wgt->w, cb_dd_h)) {
5514 /* Check if click is on the scrollbar area (right edge) */
5515 int cb_need_sb = ((int)cbd->nb_items > cbd->max_visible);
5516 float cb_sb_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
5517 if (cb_sb_size < 10.0f) cb_sb_size = 10.0f;
5518 float cb_item_w = cb_need_sb ? cb_wgt->w - cb_sb_size : cb_wgt->w;
5519
5520 if (cb_need_sb && mx >= cb_ax + cb_item_w) {
5521 /* Clicked on scrollbar — scroll to position, start drag */
5522 cbd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(my, cb_ay, cb_dd_h, cbd->max_visible, (int)cbd->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5523 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = cb_wgt->id;
5524 return 1; /* consumed, keep dropdown open */
5525 }
5526
5527 /* Clicked on item area — select item */
5528 int clicked_idx = cbd->scroll_offset + (int)((my - cb_ay) / cb_ih);
5529 if (clicked_idx >= 0 && (size_t)clicked_idx < cbd->nb_items) {
5530 cbd->selected_index = clicked_idx;
5531 if (cbd->on_select) cbd->on_select(cb_wgt->id, clicked_idx, cbd->user_data);
5532 }
5533 cbd->is_open = 0;
5534 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
5535 return 1; /* event consumed by dropdown */
5536 } else {
5537 /* clicked outside dropdown - close it */
5538 cbd->is_open = 0;
5539 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
5540 /* fall through to normal processing */
5541 }
5542 } else {
5543 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
5544 }
5545 }
5546
5547 /* ---- handle open dropdown menu panel first ---- */
5548 if (just_pressed && ctx->open_dropmenu_id >= 0) {
5549 N_GUI_WIDGET* dm_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_dropmenu_id);
5550 if (dm_wgt && dm_wgt->data) {
5551 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)dm_wgt->data;
5552
5553 /* find absolute position of the dropmenu widget (account for window scroll) */
5554 float dm_ox = 0, dm_oy = 0;
5555 _find_widget_window(ctx, dm_wgt->id, &dm_ox, &dm_oy);
5556
5557 ALLEGRO_FONT* dm_font = dm_wgt->font ? dm_wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
5558 float dm_fh = dm_font ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(dm_font) : 16.0f;
5559 float dm_ih = dmd->item_height > dm_fh ? dmd->item_height : dm_fh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
5560 float dm_ax = dm_ox + dm_wgt->x;
5561 float dm_ay = dm_oy + dm_wgt->y + dm_wgt->h;
5562 int dm_vis = (int)dmd->nb_entries;
5563 if (dm_vis > dmd->max_visible) dm_vis = dmd->max_visible;
5564 float dm_panel_h = (float)dm_vis * dm_ih;
5565
5566 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, dm_ax, dm_ay, dm_wgt->w, dm_panel_h)) {
5567 /* check if click is on the scrollbar area (right edge) */
5568 int dm_need_sb = ((int)dmd->nb_entries > dmd->max_visible);
5569 float dm_sb_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
5570 if (dm_sb_size < 10.0f) dm_sb_size = 10.0f;
5571 float dm_item_w = dm_need_sb ? dm_wgt->w - dm_sb_size : dm_wgt->w;
5572
5573 if (dm_need_sb && mx >= dm_ax + dm_item_w) {
5574 /* Clicked on scrollbar — scroll to position, start drag */
5575 dmd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(my, dm_ay, dm_panel_h, dmd->max_visible, (int)dmd->nb_entries, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5576 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = dm_wgt->id;
5577 return 1; /* consumed, keep panel open */
5578 }
5579
5580 /* clicked on item area */
5581 int clicked_idx = dmd->scroll_offset + (int)((my - dm_ay) / dm_ih);
5582 if (clicked_idx >= 0 && (size_t)clicked_idx < dmd->nb_entries) {
5583 N_GUI_DROPMENU_ENTRY* entry = &dmd->entries[clicked_idx];
5584 if (entry->on_click) {
5585 entry->on_click(dm_wgt->id, clicked_idx, entry->tag, entry->user_data);
5586 }
5587 }
5588 dmd->is_open = 0;
5589 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
5590 return 1; /* event consumed by dropdown menu */
5591 } else {
5592 /* clicked outside panel - close the menu */
5593 dmd->is_open = 0;
5594 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
5595 /* if click landed on the button itself, consume event so widget handler doesn't re-open */
5596 float dm_btn_ax = dm_ox + dm_wgt->x;
5597 float dm_btn_ay = dm_oy + dm_wgt->y;
5598 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, dm_btn_ax, dm_btn_ay, dm_wgt->w, dm_wgt->h)) {
5599 return 1;
5600 }
5601 /* fall through to normal processing */
5602 }
5603 } else {
5604 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
5605 }
5606 }
5607
5608 /* iterate windows back-to-front, but for hit testing we want front-to-back
5609 (last in list = front), so we walk backward */
5610 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES ||
5611 event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_DOWN ||
5612 event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_BUTTON_UP) {
5613 /* reset hover for all widgets */
5614 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
5615 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
5616 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
5617 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
5618 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
5619 if (wgt) wgt->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_HOVER;
5620 }
5621 }
5622
5623 /* check if any window has an active drag/resize/scroll (mouse capture) */
5624 LIST_NODE* captured_wnode = NULL;
5625 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode; wnode = wnode->prev) {
5626 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
5627 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
5628 if (win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING | N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING | N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG)) {
5629 captured_wnode = wnode;
5630 break;
5631 }
5632 }
5633
5634 /* find topmost window hit (iterate from end), skip if captured */
5635 LIST_NODE* hit_wnode = captured_wnode;
5636 if (!hit_wnode) {
5637 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode; wnode = wnode->prev) {
5638 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
5639 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
5640
5641 float win_h_check = (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED) ? _win_tbh(win) : win->h;
5642 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, win->x, win->y, win->w, win_h_check)) {
5643 hit_wnode = wnode;
5644 break;
5645 }
5646 }
5647 }
5648
5649 if (hit_wnode) {
5650 event_consumed = 1;
5651 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)hit_wnode->ptr;
5652
5653 /* only process new clicks/interactions when not in a captured operation */
5654 if (!captured_wnode) {
5655 /* bring to front on click */
5656 if (just_pressed) {
5657 n_gui_raise_window(ctx, win->id);
5658 /* re-fetch since node may have moved */
5659 win = n_gui_get_window(ctx, win->id);
5660 if (!win) return 1;
5661
5662 /* clear focus from previously focused widget on a new primary click
5663 * inside a window; textarea clicks will re-set focus below */
5664 if (ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
5665 N_GUI_WIDGET* prev_fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
5666 if (prev_fw) prev_fw->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
5667 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
5668 }
5669 }
5670
5671 /* check auto-scrollbar clicks before resize handle */
5672 int auto_scrollbar_hit = 0;
5673 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR) && !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED) && just_pressed) {
5674 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
5675 float body_h = win->h - _win_tbh(win);
5676 float body_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win);
5677 int need_vscroll = 0, need_hscroll = 0;
5678 _window_update_content_size(win, ctx->default_font);
5679 if (win->content_h > body_h) need_vscroll = 1;
5680 if (win->content_w > win->w) need_hscroll = 1;
5681 if (need_vscroll && win->content_w > (win->w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
5682 if (need_hscroll && win->content_h > (body_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
5683 float content_area_w = win->w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5684 float content_area_h = body_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
5685
5686 /* vertical auto-scrollbar track */
5687 if (need_vscroll) {
5688 float sb_x = win->x + win->w - scrollbar_size;
5689 float sb_y = body_y;
5690 float sb_h = content_area_h;
5691 /* leave room for resize corner when no horizontal scrollbar */
5692 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_hscroll) sb_h -= scrollbar_size;
5693 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, sb_x, sb_y, scrollbar_size, sb_h)) {
5694 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG;
5695 auto_scrollbar_hit = 1;
5696 win->scroll_y = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(my, sb_y, sb_h, content_area_h, win->content_h, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5697 }
5698 }
5699 /* horizontal auto-scrollbar track */
5700 if (need_hscroll && !auto_scrollbar_hit) {
5701 float sb_x = win->x;
5702 float sb_y = win->y + win->h - scrollbar_size;
5703 float sb_w = content_area_w;
5704 /* leave room for resize corner when no vertical scrollbar */
5705 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_vscroll) sb_w -= scrollbar_size;
5706 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, sb_x, sb_y, sb_w, scrollbar_size)) {
5707 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG;
5708 auto_scrollbar_hit = 1;
5709 win->scroll_x = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(mx, sb_x, sb_w, content_area_w, win->content_w, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5710 }
5711 }
5712 }
5713
5714 /* check resize handle (bottom-right corner, 14x14 px) - skip if auto-scrollbar was hit */
5715 if (!auto_scrollbar_hit && (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) {
5716 float grip = ctx->style.grip_size + 2.0f;
5717 float rx = win->x + win->w - grip;
5718 float ry = win->y + win->h - grip;
5719 /* when auto-scrollbars are visible, restrict resize to the corner square only */
5720 int in_resize_area = 0;
5721 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR) {
5722 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
5723 float body_h = win->h - _win_tbh(win);
5724 int need_vscroll = 0, need_hscroll = 0;
5725 _window_update_content_size(win, ctx->default_font);
5726 if (win->content_h > body_h) need_vscroll = 1;
5727 if (win->content_w > win->w) need_hscroll = 1;
5728 if (need_vscroll && win->content_w > (win->w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
5729 if (need_hscroll && win->content_h > (body_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
5730 if (need_vscroll || need_hscroll) {
5731 /* resize corner is only the small square at bottom-right where scrollbars don't reach */
5732 float corner_x = win->x + win->w - scrollbar_size;
5733 float corner_y = win->y + win->h - scrollbar_size;
5734 in_resize_area = just_pressed && _point_in_rect(mx, my, corner_x, corner_y, scrollbar_size, scrollbar_size);
5735 } else {
5736 in_resize_area = just_pressed && _point_in_rect(mx, my, rx, ry, grip, grip);
5737 }
5738 } else {
5739 in_resize_area = just_pressed && _point_in_rect(mx, my, rx, ry, grip, grip);
5740 }
5741 if (in_resize_area) {
5742 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING;
5743 win->drag_ox = win->w - (mx - win->x);
5744 win->drag_oy = win->h - (my - win->y);
5745 }
5746 }
5747
5748 /* title bar: drag / minimize */
5749 if (!(win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING | N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG)) &&
5750 _point_in_rect(mx, my, win->x, win->y, win->w, _win_tbh(win))) {
5751 if (just_pressed && !(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FIXED_POSITION)) {
5752 /* double click could minimize - for now, start drag */
5753 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING;
5754 win->drag_ox = mx - win->x;
5755 win->drag_oy = my - win->y;
5756 }
5757 } else if (!(win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED | N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING | N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG))) {
5758 /* widget area (account for scroll offsets) */
5759 float content_x = win->x - win->scroll_x;
5760 float content_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
5761
5762 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
5763 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
5764 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible || !wgt->enabled) continue;
5765 float ax = content_x + wgt->x;
5766 float ay = content_y + wgt->y;
5767
5768 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h)) {
5769 wgt->state |= N_GUI_STATE_HOVER;
5770
5771 if (just_pressed) {
5772 wgt->state |= N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
5773
5774 /* set focus on any interactive widget type */
5775 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER ||
5776 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX ||
5777 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX ||
5778 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST ||
5779 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX ||
5780 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR ||
5781 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU ||
5782 wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
5783 wgt->state |= N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
5784 ctx->focused_widget_id = wgt->id;
5785 }
5786
5787 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON) {
5788 /* click callback on release */
5789 }
5790 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX) {
5791 N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA* ckd = (N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
5792 ckd->checked = !ckd->checked;
5793 if (ckd->on_toggle) ckd->on_toggle(wgt->id, ckd->checked, ckd->user_data);
5794 }
5795 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER) {
5796 _slider_update_from_mouse(wgt, mx, my, content_x, content_y);
5797 }
5798 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR) {
5799 _scrollbar_update_from_mouse(wgt, mx, my, content_x, content_y, &ctx->style);
5800 }
5801 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
5802 /* clear any label selection when clicking a textarea */
5803 if (ctx->selected_label_id >= 0) {
5804 N_GUI_WIDGET* prev = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->selected_label_id);
5805 if (prev && prev->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && prev->data) {
5806 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* plb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)prev->data;
5807 plb->sel_start = -1;
5808 plb->sel_end = -1;
5809 plb->sel_dragging = 0;
5810 }
5811 ctx->selected_label_id = -1;
5812 }
5813 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* click_td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
5814 click_td->cursor_time = al_get_time();
5815 ALLEGRO_FONT* tf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
5816 if (tf) {
5817 float text_pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
5818 size_t pos = _textarea_pos_from_mouse(click_td, tf, mx, my,
5819 ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h,
5820 text_pad, ctx->style.scrollbar_size);
5821 click_td->cursor_pos = pos;
5822 click_td->sel_start = pos;
5823 click_td->sel_end = pos;
5824 }
5825 }
5826 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
5827 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* click_lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
5828 if (click_lb) {
5829 /* clear previous label selection */
5830 if (ctx->selected_label_id >= 0 && ctx->selected_label_id != wgt->id) {
5831 N_GUI_WIDGET* prev = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->selected_label_id);
5832 if (prev && prev->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && prev->data) {
5833 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* plb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)prev->data;
5834 plb->sel_start = -1;
5835 plb->sel_end = -1;
5836 plb->sel_dragging = 0;
5837 }
5838 }
5839 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
5840 if (lf) {
5841 int char_pos;
5842 if (click_lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
5843 float lpad = ctx->style.label_padding;
5844 float effective_w = wgt->w;
5845 float lww = 0;
5846 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
5847 lww = win->content_w + ctx->style.title_max_w_reserve + lpad;
5848 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
5849 lww = win->w;
5850 if (lww > 0) {
5851 float mfw = lww - wgt->x;
5852 if (mfw > effective_w) effective_w = mfw;
5853 }
5854 float max_text_w = effective_w - lpad * 2;
5855 float content_h = _label_content_height(click_lb->text, lf, max_text_w);
5856 float view_h = wgt->h - lpad;
5857 float sb_sz = (content_h > view_h) ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
5858 float tw2 = max_text_w - sb_sz;
5859 char_pos = _justified_char_at_pos(click_lb->text, lf, tw2,
5860 ax + lpad, ay + lpad / 2.0f, click_lb->scroll_y, mx, my);
5861 } else {
5862 float lww = 0;
5863 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
5864 lww = win->content_w + ctx->style.title_max_w_reserve + ctx->style.label_padding;
5865 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
5866 lww = win->w;
5867 float text_ox = _label_text_origin_x(click_lb, lf, ax, wgt->w, lww, wgt->x, ctx->style.label_padding);
5868 float click_x = mx - text_ox;
5869 char_pos = _label_char_at_x(click_lb, lf, click_x);
5870 }
5871 if (char_pos >= 0) {
5872 click_lb->sel_start = char_pos;
5873 click_lb->sel_end = char_pos;
5874 click_lb->sel_dragging = 1;
5875 ctx->selected_label_id = wgt->id;
5876 }
5877 }
5878 }
5879 }
5880 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX) {
5881 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
5882 cbd->is_open = !cbd->is_open;
5883 if (cbd->is_open) {
5884 ctx->open_combobox_id = wgt->id;
5885 } else {
5886 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
5887 }
5888 }
5889 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX) {
5890 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* lbd = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
5891 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
5892 float lfh = lf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(lf) : 16.0f;
5893 float lih = lbd->item_height > lfh ? lbd->item_height : lfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
5894 int lb_visible = (int)(wgt->h / lih);
5895 int lb_need_sb = ((int)lbd->nb_items > lb_visible) ? 1 : 0;
5896 float lb_sb_w = lb_need_sb ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
5897 /* clamp scroll_offset */
5898 int lb_max_off = (int)lbd->nb_items - lb_visible;
5899 if (lb_max_off < 0) lb_max_off = 0;
5900 if (lbd->scroll_offset > lb_max_off) lbd->scroll_offset = lb_max_off;
5901 if (lbd->scroll_offset < 0) lbd->scroll_offset = 0;
5902 /* skip click if on the scrollbar area */
5903 if (lb_need_sb && mx > ax + wgt->w - lb_sb_w) {
5904 /* scrollbar track click: jump scroll position + start drag */
5905 lbd->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(my, ay, wgt->h, lb_visible, (int)lbd->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5906 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = wgt->id;
5907 } else {
5908 int clicked_idx = lbd->scroll_offset + (int)((my - ay) / lih);
5909 if (clicked_idx >= 0 && (size_t)clicked_idx < lbd->nb_items) {
5910 if (lbd->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE) {
5911 for (size_t si = 0; si < lbd->nb_items; si++) lbd->items[si].selected = 0;
5912 lbd->items[clicked_idx].selected = 1;
5913 if (lbd->on_select) lbd->on_select(wgt->id, clicked_idx, 1, lbd->user_data);
5914 } else if (lbd->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_MULTIPLE) {
5915 lbd->items[clicked_idx].selected = !lbd->items[clicked_idx].selected;
5916 if (lbd->on_select) lbd->on_select(wgt->id, clicked_idx, lbd->items[clicked_idx].selected, lbd->user_data);
5917 }
5918 /* N_GUI_SELECT_NONE: no selection change */
5919 }
5920 }
5921 }
5922 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST) {
5923 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rld = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)wgt->data;
5924 ALLEGRO_FONT* rf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
5925 float rfh = rf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(rf) : 16.0f;
5926 float rih = rld->item_height > rfh ? rld->item_height : rfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
5927 int rl_visible = (int)(wgt->h / rih);
5928 int rl_need_sb = ((int)rld->nb_items > rl_visible) ? 1 : 0;
5929 float rl_sb_w = rl_need_sb ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
5930 /* clamp scroll_offset */
5931 int rl_max_off = (int)rld->nb_items - rl_visible;
5932 if (rl_max_off < 0) rl_max_off = 0;
5933 if (rld->scroll_offset > rl_max_off) rld->scroll_offset = rl_max_off;
5934 if (rld->scroll_offset < 0) rld->scroll_offset = 0;
5935 /* skip click if on the scrollbar area */
5936 if (rl_need_sb && mx > ax + wgt->w - rl_sb_w) {
5937 /* scrollbar track click: jump scroll position + start drag */
5938 rld->scroll_offset = _scrollbar_calc_scroll_int(my, ay, wgt->h, rl_visible, (int)rld->nb_items, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
5939 ctx->scrollbar_drag_widget_id = wgt->id;
5940 } else {
5941 int clicked_idx = rld->scroll_offset + (int)((my - ay) / rih);
5942 if (clicked_idx >= 0 && (size_t)clicked_idx < rld->nb_items) {
5943 rld->selected_index = clicked_idx;
5944 if (rld->on_select) rld->on_select(wgt->id, clicked_idx, rld->user_data);
5945 }
5946 }
5947 }
5948 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
5949 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lbl = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
5950 if (lbl->link[0] && lbl->on_link_click) {
5951 lbl->on_link_click(wgt->id, lbl->link, lbl->user_data);
5952 }
5953 }
5954 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU) {
5955 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)wgt->data;
5956 dmd->is_open = !dmd->is_open;
5957 if (dmd->is_open) {
5958 /* close any other open dropdown/combobox first */
5959 if (ctx->open_combobox_id >= 0) {
5960 N_GUI_WIDGET* old_cb = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_combobox_id);
5961 if (old_cb && old_cb->data) ((N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)old_cb->data)->is_open = 0;
5962 ctx->open_combobox_id = -1;
5963 }
5964 if (ctx->open_dropmenu_id >= 0 && ctx->open_dropmenu_id != wgt->id) {
5965 N_GUI_WIDGET* old_dm = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_dropmenu_id);
5966 if (old_dm && old_dm->data) ((N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)old_dm->data)->is_open = 0;
5967 }
5968 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = wgt->id;
5969 /* call on_open callback to rebuild dynamic entries */
5970 if (dmd->on_open) {
5971 dmd->on_open(wgt->id, dmd->on_open_user_data);
5972 }
5973 } else {
5974 ctx->open_dropmenu_id = -1;
5975 }
5976 }
5977 }
5978 break; /* only top widget gets the event */
5979 }
5980 }
5981
5982 /* frameless windows: drag from empty body area */
5983 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FRAMELESS) && just_pressed &&
5984 !(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FIXED_POSITION) &&
5985 !(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING)) {
5986 win->state |= N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING;
5987 win->drag_ox = mx - win->x;
5988 win->drag_oy = my - win->y;
5989 }
5990 }
5991
5992 } /* end if (!captured_wnode) */
5993
5994 /* window dragging */
5995 if ((win->state & N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING) && ctx->mouse_b1 && !(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FIXED_POSITION)) {
5996 win->x = mx - win->drag_ox;
5997 win->y = my - win->drag_oy;
5998 }
5999 if (just_released && (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING) && !(win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_FIXED_POSITION)) {
6000 win->state &= ~N_GUI_WIN_DRAGGING;
6001 }
6002
6003 /* window resizing */
6004 if ((win->state & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING) && ctx->mouse_b1) {
6005 float new_w = (mx - win->x) + win->drag_ox;
6006 float new_h = (my - win->y) + win->drag_oy;
6007 if (new_w < win->min_w) new_w = win->min_w;
6008 if (new_h < win->min_h) new_h = win->min_h;
6009 win->w = new_w;
6010 win->h = new_h;
6011 }
6012 if (just_released && (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING)) {
6013 win->state &= ~N_GUI_WIN_RESIZING;
6014 }
6015
6016 /* auto-scrollbar dragging */
6017 if ((win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG)) && ctx->mouse_b1) {
6018 float scrollbar_size = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
6019 float body_h = win->h - _win_tbh(win);
6020 float body_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win);
6021 int need_vscroll = 0, need_hscroll = 0;
6022 _window_update_content_size(win, ctx->default_font);
6023 if (win->content_h > body_h) need_vscroll = 1;
6024 if (win->content_w > win->w) need_hscroll = 1;
6025 if (need_vscroll && win->content_w > (win->w - scrollbar_size)) need_hscroll = 1;
6026 if (need_hscroll && win->content_h > (body_h - scrollbar_size)) need_vscroll = 1;
6027 float content_area_w = win->w - (need_vscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
6028 float content_area_h = body_h - (need_hscroll ? scrollbar_size : 0);
6029
6030 if (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG) {
6031 float sb_y = body_y;
6032 float sb_h = content_area_h;
6033 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_hscroll) sb_h -= scrollbar_size;
6034 win->scroll_y = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(my, sb_y, sb_h, content_area_h, win->content_h, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6035 }
6036 if (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG) {
6037 float sb_x = win->x;
6038 float sb_w = content_area_w;
6039 if ((win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE) && !need_vscroll) sb_w -= scrollbar_size;
6040 win->scroll_x = _scrollbar_calc_scroll(mx, sb_x, sb_w, content_area_w, win->content_w, ctx->style.scrollbar_thumb_min);
6041 }
6042 }
6043 if (just_released && (win->state & (N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG))) {
6044 win->state &= ~(N_GUI_WIN_VSCROLL_DRAG | N_GUI_WIN_HSCROLL_DRAG);
6045 }
6046 } else {
6047 /* clicked outside all windows */
6048 if (just_pressed) {
6049 if (ctx->focused_widget_id != -1) {
6050 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
6051 if (fw) fw->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED;
6052 ctx->focused_widget_id = -1;
6053 }
6054 }
6055 }
6056
6057 /* handle active slider/scrollbar drag even outside widget bounds */
6058 if (ctx->mouse_b1 && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES) {
6059 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
6060 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6061 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
6062 float content_x = win->x - win->scroll_x;
6063 float content_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
6064 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
6065 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
6066 if (!wgt) continue;
6067 if (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) {
6068 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER) {
6069 _slider_update_from_mouse(wgt, mx, my, content_x, content_y);
6070 }
6071 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR) {
6072 _scrollbar_update_from_mouse(wgt, mx, my, content_x, content_y, &ctx->style);
6073 }
6074 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
6075 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* drag_lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
6076 if (drag_lb && drag_lb->sel_dragging) {
6077 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
6078 if (lf) {
6079 float lax = content_x + wgt->x;
6080 float lay = content_y + wgt->y;
6081 int char_pos;
6082 if (drag_lb->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
6083 float lpad = ctx->style.label_padding;
6084 float effective_w = wgt->w;
6085 float lww = 0;
6086 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
6087 lww = win->content_w + ctx->style.title_max_w_reserve + lpad;
6088 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
6089 lww = win->w;
6090 if (lww > 0) {
6091 float mfw = lww - wgt->x;
6092 if (mfw > effective_w) effective_w = mfw;
6093 }
6094 float max_text_w = effective_w - lpad * 2;
6095 float content_h2 = _label_content_height(drag_lb->text, lf, max_text_w);
6096 float view_h = wgt->h - lpad;
6097 float sb_sz = (content_h2 > view_h) ? ctx->style.scrollbar_size : 0;
6098 float tw2 = max_text_w - sb_sz;
6099 char_pos = _justified_char_at_pos(drag_lb->text, lf, tw2,
6100 lax + lpad, lay + lpad / 2.0f, drag_lb->scroll_y, mx, my);
6101 } else {
6102 float lww = 0;
6103 if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)
6104 lww = win->content_w + ctx->style.title_max_w_reserve + ctx->style.label_padding;
6105 else if (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_RESIZABLE)
6106 lww = win->w;
6107 float text_ox = _label_text_origin_x(drag_lb, lf, lax, wgt->w, lww, wgt->x, ctx->style.label_padding);
6108 float click_x = mx - text_ox;
6109 char_pos = _label_char_at_x(drag_lb, lf, click_x);
6110 }
6111 if (char_pos >= 0) {
6112 drag_lb->sel_end = char_pos;
6113 }
6114 }
6115 }
6116 }
6117 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
6118 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* drag_td = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
6119 ALLEGRO_FONT* tf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
6120 if (tf && drag_td) {
6121 float ta_ax = content_x + wgt->x;
6122 float ta_ay = content_y + wgt->y;
6123 float text_pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
6124 size_t pos = _textarea_pos_from_mouse(drag_td, tf, mx, my,
6125 ta_ax, ta_ay, wgt->w, wgt->h,
6126 text_pad, ctx->style.scrollbar_size);
6127 drag_td->cursor_pos = pos;
6128 drag_td->sel_end = pos;
6129 drag_td->cursor_time = al_get_time();
6130 }
6131 }
6132 }
6133 }
6134 }
6135 }
6136
6137 /* release active state on mouse up */
6138 if (just_released) {
6139 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
6140 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6141 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
6142 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
6143 if (!wgt) continue;
6144 if (wgt->state & N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE) {
6145 /* fire button callback on release if still hovering */
6146 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON) {
6147 float content_x = win->x - win->scroll_x;
6148 float content_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win) - win->scroll_y;
6149 float ax = content_x + wgt->x;
6150 float ay = content_y + wgt->y;
6151 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h)) {
6152 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
6153 /* Toggle mode: flip toggled state on each click */
6154 if (bd->toggle_mode) {
6155 bd->toggled = !bd->toggled;
6156 }
6157 if (bd->on_click) bd->on_click(wgt->id, bd->user_data);
6158 }
6159 }
6160 /* stop label drag selection on release */
6161 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
6162 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* rel_lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
6163 if (rel_lb) rel_lb->sel_dragging = 0;
6164 }
6165 wgt->state &= ~N_GUI_STATE_ACTIVE;
6166 }
6167 }
6168 }
6169 }
6170 }
6171
6172 /* Tab / Shift+Tab: focus navigation across widgets in the active window.
6173 * Ctrl+Tab in a textarea inserts a literal tab — handled below by the textarea key handler. */
6174 if (!event_consumed && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_CHAR && event.keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_TAB) {
6175 int ctrl = (event.keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_CTRL) ? 1 : 0;
6176 int shift = (event.keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_SHIFT) ? 1 : 0;
6177
6178 /* Ctrl+Tab in a focused textarea inserts a tab character — skip navigation */
6179 int is_ctrl_tab_in_textarea = 0;
6180 if (ctrl && ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
6181 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
6182 if (fw && fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && (fw->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED))
6183 is_ctrl_tab_in_textarea = 1;
6184 }
6185
6186 if (!is_ctrl_tab_in_textarea) {
6187 /* find the window that contains the focused widget (or the topmost window) */
6188 N_GUI_WINDOW* tab_win = NULL;
6189 if (ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
6190 tab_win = _find_focused_window(ctx);
6191 }
6192 if (!tab_win && ctx->windows && ctx->windows->end) {
6193 /* no focus yet — use topmost open window */
6194 for (LIST_NODE* wn = ctx->windows->end; wn; wn = wn->prev) {
6195 N_GUI_WINDOW* w = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wn->ptr;
6196 if (w && (w->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN) && !(w->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) {
6197 tab_win = w;
6198 break;
6199 }
6200 }
6201 }
6202
6203 if (tab_win && tab_win->widgets && tab_win->widgets->nb_items > 0) {
6204 /* build an ordered list of focusable widget ids */
6205 int focusable_ids[512];
6206 int nfocusable = 0;
6207 list_foreach(wgn, tab_win->widgets) {
6208 N_GUI_WIDGET* w = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
6209 if (w && w->visible && w->enabled && _is_focusable_type(w->type) && nfocusable < 512) {
6210 focusable_ids[nfocusable++] = w->id;
6211 }
6212 }
6213 if (nfocusable > 0) {
6214 /* find current position */
6215 int cur_idx = -1;
6216 for (int i = 0; i < nfocusable; i++) {
6217 if (focusable_ids[i] == ctx->focused_widget_id) {
6218 cur_idx = i;
6219 break;
6220 }
6221 }
6222 int next_idx;
6223 if (shift) {
6224 next_idx = (cur_idx <= 0) ? nfocusable - 1 : cur_idx - 1;
6225 } else {
6226 next_idx = (cur_idx < 0 || cur_idx >= nfocusable - 1) ? 0 : cur_idx + 1;
6227 }
6228 n_gui_set_focus(ctx, focusable_ids[next_idx]);
6229 }
6230 }
6231 event_consumed = 1;
6232 }
6233 }
6234
6235 /* keyboard events -> focused textarea */
6236 if (!event_consumed && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_CHAR && ctx->focused_widget_id != -1) {
6237 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
6238 if (fw && fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA && (fw->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED)) {
6239 ALLEGRO_FONT* ta_font = fw->font ? fw->font : ctx->default_font;
6240 float ta_pad = ctx->style.textarea_padding;
6241 float ta_sb = ctx->style.scrollbar_size;
6242 if (_textarea_handle_key(fw, &event, ta_font, ta_pad, ta_sb, ctx)) {
6243 event_consumed = 1;
6244 }
6245 }
6246 }
6247
6248 /* keyboard events -> focused non-textarea widgets (slider, listbox, radiolist, combobox, scrollbar, checkbox) */
6249 if (!event_consumed && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_CHAR && ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
6250 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
6251 if (fw && fw->visible && fw->enabled && (fw->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED) && fw->data) {
6252 int kc = event.keyboard.keycode;
6253
6254 /* ---- slider keyboard ---- */
6255 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER) {
6256 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)fw->data;
6257 double step = sd->step > 0.0 ? sd->step : (sd->max_val - sd->min_val) / 20.0;
6258 if (step <= 0) step = 1.0;
6259 double new_val = sd->value;
6260 int handled = 0;
6261
6262 if (sd->orientation == N_GUI_SLIDER_H) {
6263 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_RIGHT) { new_val += step; handled = 1; }
6264 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_LEFT) { new_val -= step; handled = 1; }
6265 } else {
6266 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP) { new_val += step; handled = 1; }
6267 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN) { new_val -= step; handled = 1; }
6268 }
6269 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) { new_val = sd->min_val; handled = 1; }
6270 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) { new_val = sd->max_val; handled = 1; }
6271
6272 if (handled) {
6273 if (sd->step > 0.0)
6274 new_val = _slider_snap_value(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, sd->step);
6275 else
6276 new_val = _clamp(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
6277 if (new_val != sd->value) {
6278 sd->value = new_val;
6279 if (sd->on_change) sd->on_change(fw->id, sd->value, sd->user_data);
6280 }
6281 event_consumed = 1;
6282 }
6283 }
6284
6285 /* ---- listbox keyboard ---- */
6286 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX) {
6287 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)fw->data;
6288 if (ld->selection_mode != N_GUI_SELECT_NONE && ld->nb_items > 0) {
6289 int handled = 0;
6290 /* find first selected item for single-select navigation */
6291 int cur_sel = -1;
6292 if (ld->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE) {
6293 for (size_t i = 0; i < ld->nb_items; i++) {
6294 if (ld->items[i].selected) { cur_sel = (int)i; break; }
6295 }
6296 }
6297 int new_sel = cur_sel;
6298 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP && cur_sel > 0) { new_sel = cur_sel - 1; handled = 1; }
6299 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < (int)ld->nb_items - 1) { new_sel = cur_sel + 1; handled = 1; }
6300 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < 0) { new_sel = 0; handled = 1; }
6301 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) { new_sel = 0; handled = 1; }
6302 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) { new_sel = (int)ld->nb_items - 1; handled = 1; }
6303
6304 if (handled && ld->selection_mode == N_GUI_SELECT_SINGLE && new_sel != cur_sel) {
6305 for (size_t i = 0; i < ld->nb_items; i++) ld->items[i].selected = 0;
6306 ld->items[new_sel].selected = 1;
6307 if (ld->on_select) ld->on_select(fw->id, new_sel, 1, ld->user_data);
6308 /* auto-scroll to keep selection visible */
6309 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = fw->font ? fw->font : ctx->default_font;
6310 float lfh = lf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(lf) : 16.0f;
6311 float lih = ld->item_height > lfh ? ld->item_height : lfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6312 int visible = (int)(fw->h / lih);
6313 if (new_sel < ld->scroll_offset) ld->scroll_offset = new_sel;
6314 if (new_sel >= ld->scroll_offset + visible) ld->scroll_offset = new_sel - visible + 1;
6315 event_consumed = 1;
6316 }
6317 }
6318 }
6319
6320 /* ---- radiolist keyboard ---- */
6321 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST) {
6322 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)fw->data;
6323 if (rd->nb_items > 0) {
6324 int cur_sel = rd->selected_index;
6325 int new_sel = cur_sel;
6326 int handled = 0;
6327 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP && cur_sel > 0) { new_sel = cur_sel - 1; handled = 1; }
6328 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < (int)rd->nb_items - 1) { new_sel = cur_sel + 1; handled = 1; }
6329 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < 0) { new_sel = 0; handled = 1; }
6330 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) { new_sel = 0; handled = 1; }
6331 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) { new_sel = (int)rd->nb_items - 1; handled = 1; }
6332
6333 if (handled && new_sel != cur_sel) {
6334 rd->selected_index = new_sel;
6335 if (rd->on_select) rd->on_select(fw->id, new_sel, rd->user_data);
6336 /* auto-scroll to keep selection visible */
6337 ALLEGRO_FONT* rf = fw->font ? fw->font : ctx->default_font;
6338 float rfh = rf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(rf) : 16.0f;
6339 float rih = rd->item_height > rfh ? rd->item_height : rfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6340 int visible = (int)(fw->h / rih);
6341 if (new_sel < rd->scroll_offset) rd->scroll_offset = new_sel;
6342 if (new_sel >= rd->scroll_offset + visible) rd->scroll_offset = new_sel - visible + 1;
6343 event_consumed = 1;
6344 }
6345 }
6346 }
6347
6348 /* ---- combobox keyboard (when closed) ---- */
6349 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX) {
6350 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)fw->data;
6351 if (!cd->is_open && cd->nb_items > 0) {
6352 int cur_sel = cd->selected_index;
6353 int new_sel = cur_sel;
6354 int handled = 0;
6355 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP && cur_sel > 0) { new_sel = cur_sel - 1; handled = 1; }
6356 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < (int)cd->nb_items - 1) { new_sel = cur_sel + 1; handled = 1; }
6357 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN && cur_sel < 0) { new_sel = 0; handled = 1; }
6358 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) { new_sel = 0; handled = 1; }
6359 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) { new_sel = (int)cd->nb_items - 1; handled = 1; }
6360
6361 if (handled && new_sel != cur_sel) {
6362 cd->selected_index = new_sel;
6363 if (cd->on_select) cd->on_select(fw->id, new_sel, cd->user_data);
6364 event_consumed = 1;
6365 }
6366 }
6367 }
6368
6369 /* ---- scrollbar keyboard ---- */
6370 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR) {
6371 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sb = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)fw->data;
6372 double max_scroll = sb->content_size - sb->viewport_size;
6373 if (max_scroll > 0) {
6374 double step = max_scroll / 20.0;
6375 if (step <= 0) step = 1.0;
6376 double new_pos = sb->scroll_pos;
6377 int handled = 0;
6378 if (sb->orientation == N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_V) {
6379 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_UP) { new_pos -= step; handled = 1; }
6380 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_DOWN) { new_pos += step; handled = 1; }
6381 } else {
6382 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_LEFT) { new_pos -= step; handled = 1; }
6383 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_RIGHT) { new_pos += step; handled = 1; }
6384 }
6385 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_HOME) { new_pos = 0; handled = 1; }
6386 else if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_END) { new_pos = max_scroll; handled = 1; }
6387
6388 if (handled) {
6389 if (new_pos < 0) new_pos = 0;
6390 if (new_pos > max_scroll) new_pos = max_scroll;
6391 if (new_pos != sb->scroll_pos) {
6392 sb->scroll_pos = new_pos;
6393 if (sb->on_scroll) sb->on_scroll(fw->id, sb->scroll_pos, sb->user_data);
6394 }
6395 event_consumed = 1;
6396 }
6397 }
6398 }
6399
6400 /* ---- checkbox keyboard (Space/Enter to toggle) ---- */
6401 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_CHECKBOX) {
6402 if (kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_SPACE || kc == ALLEGRO_KEY_ENTER) {
6403 N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA* cd = (N_GUI_CHECKBOX_DATA*)fw->data;
6404 cd->checked = !cd->checked;
6405 if (cd->on_toggle) cd->on_toggle(fw->id, cd->checked, cd->user_data);
6406 event_consumed = 1;
6407 }
6408 }
6409 }
6410 }
6411
6412 /* Ctrl+C on label selection: copy selected text from the most recently selected label */
6413 if (!event_consumed && event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_DOWN &&
6414 (event.keyboard.modifiers & ALLEGRO_KEYMOD_CTRL) &&
6415 event.keyboard.keycode == ALLEGRO_KEY_C && ctx->display &&
6416 ctx->selected_label_id >= 0) {
6417 N_GUI_WIDGET* sel_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->selected_label_id);
6418 if (sel_wgt && sel_wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL && sel_wgt->data) {
6419 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* lb = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)sel_wgt->data;
6420 if (lb->sel_start >= 0 && lb->sel_end >= 0 && lb->sel_start != lb->sel_end) {
6421 int slo = lb->sel_start < lb->sel_end ? lb->sel_start : lb->sel_end;
6422 int shi = lb->sel_start < lb->sel_end ? lb->sel_end : lb->sel_start;
6423 size_t tlen = strlen(lb->text);
6424 if ((size_t)slo > tlen) slo = (int)tlen;
6425 if ((size_t)shi > tlen) shi = (int)tlen;
6426 int len = shi - slo;
6427 if (len > 0) {
6428 char clip[N_GUI_TEXT_MAX];
6429 memcpy(clip, &lb->text[slo], (size_t)len);
6430 clip[len] = '\0';
6431 al_set_clipboard_text(ctx->display, clip);
6432 event_consumed = 1;
6433 }
6434 }
6435 }
6436 }
6437
6438 /* keyboard events -> button key bindings.
6439 * Skip when an interactive widget has focus (so navigation keys don't trigger buttons).
6440 * Exception: for single-line textareas, ENTER passes through so it can
6441 * trigger button keybinds (e.g. send button in a chat input). */
6442 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_KEY_DOWN && !event_consumed) {
6443 int widget_focused = 0;
6444 if (ctx->focused_widget_id >= 0) {
6445 N_GUI_WIDGET* fw = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->focused_widget_id);
6446 if (fw && (fw->state & N_GUI_STATE_FOCUSED)) {
6447 if (fw->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
6448 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* ftd = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)fw->data;
6449 /* for single-line textareas, allow ENTER to pass through */
6450 if (ftd && (ftd->multiline || event.keyboard.keycode != ALLEGRO_KEY_ENTER)) {
6451 widget_focused = 1;
6452 }
6453 } else if (_is_focusable_type(fw->type)) {
6454 widget_focused = 1;
6455 }
6456 }
6457 }
6458 if (!widget_focused) {
6459 int kc = event.keyboard.keycode;
6460 int ev_mods = event.keyboard.modifiers & N_GUI_KEY_MOD_MASK;
6461 /* Iterate windows from frontmost (end of list) to backmost (start)
6462 * and stop as soon as a button consumes the event. */
6463 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode && !event_consumed; wnode = wnode->prev) {
6464 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6465 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) {
6466 continue;
6467 }
6468 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
6469 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
6470 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible || !wgt->enabled || wgt->type != N_GUI_TYPE_BUTTON) {
6471 continue;
6472 }
6473 N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA* bd = (N_GUI_BUTTON_DATA*)wgt->data;
6474 if (bd && bd->keycode == kc) {
6475 /* check modifier requirements:
6476 * key_modifiers == 0 means no requirement (any mods match, backward compat)
6477 * key_modifiers != 0 means exact match on the masked modifier bits */
6478 if (bd->key_modifiers != 0 && ev_mods != bd->key_modifiers) {
6479 continue;
6480 }
6481 if (bd->toggle_mode) {
6482 bd->toggled = !bd->toggled;
6483 }
6484 if (bd->on_click) {
6485 bd->on_click(wgt->id, bd->user_data);
6486 }
6487 event_consumed = 1;
6488 break; /* stop scanning other widgets in this window */
6489 }
6490 }
6491 }
6492 }
6493 }
6494
6495 /* mouse wheel scrolling for listbox/radiolist/combobox/dropmenu and auto-scrollbar windows.
6496 * Iterate from topmost window (end of list) to bottommost (start) so that the
6497 * frontmost window under the cursor receives the scroll event first. */
6498 if (event.type == ALLEGRO_EVENT_MOUSE_AXES && event.mouse.dz != 0) {
6499 int scroll_consumed = 0;
6500
6501 /* Check if an open combobox dropdown should consume the scroll */
6502 if (ctx->open_combobox_id >= 0) {
6503 N_GUI_WIDGET* cb_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_combobox_id);
6504 if (cb_wgt && cb_wgt->data) {
6505 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)cb_wgt->data;
6506 if (cbd->is_open && (int)cbd->nb_items > cbd->max_visible) {
6507 cbd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
6508 if (cbd->scroll_offset < 0) cbd->scroll_offset = 0;
6509 int max_off = (int)cbd->nb_items - cbd->max_visible;
6510 if (cbd->scroll_offset > max_off) cbd->scroll_offset = max_off;
6511 scroll_consumed = 1;
6512 }
6513 }
6514 }
6515 /* Check if an open dropmenu panel should consume the scroll */
6516 if (!scroll_consumed && ctx->open_dropmenu_id >= 0) {
6517 N_GUI_WIDGET* dm_wgt = n_gui_get_widget(ctx, ctx->open_dropmenu_id);
6518 if (dm_wgt && dm_wgt->data) {
6519 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)dm_wgt->data;
6520 if (dmd->is_open && (int)dmd->nb_entries > dmd->max_visible) {
6521 dmd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
6522 if (dmd->scroll_offset < 0) dmd->scroll_offset = 0;
6523 int max_off = (int)dmd->nb_entries - dmd->max_visible;
6524 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
6525 if (dmd->scroll_offset > max_off) dmd->scroll_offset = max_off;
6526 scroll_consumed = 1;
6527 }
6528 }
6529 }
6530 if (scroll_consumed) return 1;
6531
6532 for (LIST_NODE* wnode = ctx->windows->end; wnode; wnode = wnode->prev) {
6533 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6534 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN) || (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED)) continue;
6535
6536 float win_h = win->h;
6537 if (!_point_in_rect(mx, my, win->x, win->y, win->w, win_h)) continue;
6538
6539 float content_x = win->x;
6540 float content_y = win->y + _win_tbh(win);
6541
6542 /* first check if a widget wants the scroll */
6543 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
6544 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
6545 if (!wgt || !wgt->visible || !wgt->enabled) continue;
6546 float ax = content_x + wgt->x - win->scroll_x;
6547 float ay = content_y + wgt->y - win->scroll_y;
6548 if (!_point_in_rect(mx, my, ax, ay, wgt->w, wgt->h)) continue;
6549
6550 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LISTBOX) {
6551 N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA* ld = (N_GUI_LISTBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
6552 ld->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
6553 if (ld->scroll_offset < 0) ld->scroll_offset = 0;
6554 ALLEGRO_FONT* lf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
6555 float lfh = lf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(lf) : 16.0f;
6556 float lih = ld->item_height > lfh ? ld->item_height : lfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6557 int visible_count = (int)(wgt->h / lih);
6558 int max_off = (int)ld->nb_items - visible_count;
6559 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
6560 if (ld->scroll_offset > max_off) ld->scroll_offset = max_off;
6561 scroll_consumed = 1;
6562 }
6563 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_RADIOLIST) {
6564 N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA* rd = (N_GUI_RADIOLIST_DATA*)wgt->data;
6565 rd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
6566 if (rd->scroll_offset < 0) rd->scroll_offset = 0;
6567 ALLEGRO_FONT* rf = wgt->font ? wgt->font : ctx->default_font;
6568 float rfh = rf ? (float)al_get_font_line_height(rf) : 16.0f;
6569 float rih = rd->item_height > rfh ? rd->item_height : rfh + ctx->style.item_height_pad;
6570 int visible_count = (int)(wgt->h / rih);
6571 int max_off = (int)rd->nb_items - visible_count;
6572 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
6573 if (rd->scroll_offset > max_off) rd->scroll_offset = max_off;
6574 scroll_consumed = 1;
6575 }
6576 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_TEXTAREA) {
6577 N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA* std = (N_GUI_TEXTAREA_DATA*)wgt->data;
6578 if (std->multiline) {
6579 float scroll_step = ctx->style.scroll_step;
6580 std->scroll_y -= (int)((float)event.mouse.dz * scroll_step);
6581 std->scroll_from_wheel = 1;
6582 /* clamp is done at draw time */
6583 scroll_consumed = 1;
6584 }
6585 }
6586 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SLIDER) {
6587 N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA* sd = (N_GUI_SLIDER_DATA*)wgt->data;
6588 double step = sd->step > 0.0 ? sd->step : (sd->max_val - sd->min_val) / 20.0;
6589 if (step <= 0) step = 1.0;
6590 double new_val = sd->value + (double)event.mouse.dz * step;
6591 if (sd->step > 0.0)
6592 new_val = _slider_snap_value(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val, sd->step);
6593 else
6594 new_val = _clamp(new_val, sd->min_val, sd->max_val);
6595 if (new_val != sd->value) {
6596 sd->value = new_val;
6597 if (sd->on_change) {
6598 sd->on_change(wgt->id, sd->value, sd->user_data);
6599 }
6600 }
6601 scroll_consumed = 1;
6602 }
6603 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_SCROLLBAR) {
6604 N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA* sbd = (N_GUI_SCROLLBAR_DATA*)wgt->data;
6605 double max_scroll = sbd->content_size - sbd->viewport_size;
6606 if (max_scroll > 0) {
6607 double step = max_scroll / 20.0;
6608 if (step <= 0) step = 1.0;
6609 sbd->scroll_pos -= (double)event.mouse.dz * step;
6610 if (sbd->scroll_pos < 0) sbd->scroll_pos = 0;
6611 if (sbd->scroll_pos > max_scroll) sbd->scroll_pos = max_scroll;
6612 if (sbd->on_scroll) {
6613 sbd->on_scroll(wgt->id, sbd->scroll_pos, sbd->user_data);
6614 }
6615 scroll_consumed = 1;
6616 }
6617 }
6618 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_COMBOBOX) {
6619 N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA* cbd = (N_GUI_COMBOBOX_DATA*)wgt->data;
6620 if (cbd->is_open && cbd->nb_items > 0) {
6621 cbd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
6622 if (cbd->scroll_offset < 0) cbd->scroll_offset = 0;
6623 int max_vis = cbd->max_visible > 0 ? cbd->max_visible : 8;
6624 int max_off = (int)cbd->nb_items - max_vis;
6625 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
6626 if (cbd->scroll_offset > max_off) cbd->scroll_offset = max_off;
6627 scroll_consumed = 1;
6628 }
6629 }
6630 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_DROPMENU) {
6631 N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA* dmd = (N_GUI_DROPMENU_DATA*)wgt->data;
6632 if (dmd->is_open && dmd->nb_entries > 0) {
6633 dmd->scroll_offset -= event.mouse.dz;
6634 if (dmd->scroll_offset < 0) dmd->scroll_offset = 0;
6635 int max_vis = dmd->max_visible > 0 ? dmd->max_visible : 8;
6636 int max_off = (int)dmd->nb_entries - max_vis;
6637 if (max_off < 0) max_off = 0;
6638 if (dmd->scroll_offset > max_off) dmd->scroll_offset = max_off;
6639 scroll_consumed = 1;
6640 }
6641 }
6642 if (wgt->type == N_GUI_TYPE_LABEL) {
6643 N_GUI_LABEL_DATA* sld = (N_GUI_LABEL_DATA*)wgt->data;
6644 if (sld->align == N_GUI_ALIGN_JUSTIFIED) {
6645 float scroll_step = ctx->style.scroll_step;
6646 sld->scroll_y -= (float)event.mouse.dz * scroll_step;
6647 /* clamp is done at draw time */
6648 scroll_consumed = 1;
6649 }
6650 }
6651 break;
6652 }
6653
6654 /* if no widget consumed the scroll, let the window auto-scroll */
6655 if (!scroll_consumed && (win->flags & N_GUI_WIN_AUTO_SCROLLBAR)) {
6656 float scroll_step = ctx->style.scroll_step;
6657 win->scroll_y -= (float)event.mouse.dz * scroll_step;
6658 /* clamp is done at draw time */
6659 scroll_consumed = 1;
6660 }
6661 if (scroll_consumed) event_consumed = 1;
6662 break; /* only one window gets scroll */
6663 }
6664
6665 /* if no window consumed the scroll and global scrollbars are available,
6666 * scroll the global viewport */
6667 if (!scroll_consumed && eff_w > 0 && eff_h > 0) {
6668 _compute_gui_bounds(ctx);
6669 if (ctx->gui_bounds_h > eff_h || ctx->gui_bounds_w > eff_w) {
6670 float scroll_step = ctx->style.global_scroll_step;
6671 ctx->global_scroll_y -= (float)event.mouse.dz * scroll_step;
6672 /* clamp is done at draw time */
6673 event_consumed = 1;
6674 }
6675 }
6676 }
6677
6678 return event_consumed;
6679}
6680
6687int n_gui_wants_mouse(N_GUI_CTX* ctx) {
6688 __n_assert(ctx, return 0);
6689 float mx = (float)ctx->mouse_x;
6690 float my = (float)ctx->mouse_y;
6691 /* transform to virtual space when virtual canvas is active */
6692 if (ctx->virtual_w > 0 && ctx->virtual_h > 0 && ctx->gui_scale > 0) {
6693 mx = (mx - ctx->gui_offset_x) / ctx->gui_scale;
6694 my = (my - ctx->gui_offset_y) / ctx->gui_scale;
6695 }
6696 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
6697 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6698 if (!(win->state & N_GUI_WIN_OPEN)) continue;
6699 float win_h = (win->state & N_GUI_WIN_MINIMISED) ? _win_tbh(win) : win->h;
6700 if (_point_in_rect(mx, my, win->x, win->y, win->w, win_h)) {
6701 return 1;
6702 }
6703 }
6704 return 0;
6705}
6706
6707/* =========================================================================
6708 * JSON THEME I/O (requires cJSON)
6709 * ========================================================================= */
6710
6711#ifdef HAVE_CJSON
6712
6714static void _json_add_color(cJSON* parent, const char* name, ALLEGRO_COLOR c) {
6715 unsigned char r, g, b, a;
6716 al_unmap_rgba(c, &r, &g, &b, &a);
6717 cJSON* arr = cJSON_CreateArray();
6718 cJSON_AddItemToArray(arr, cJSON_CreateNumber(r));
6719 cJSON_AddItemToArray(arr, cJSON_CreateNumber(g));
6720 cJSON_AddItemToArray(arr, cJSON_CreateNumber(b));
6721 cJSON_AddItemToArray(arr, cJSON_CreateNumber(a));
6722 cJSON_AddItemToObject(parent, name, arr);
6723}
6724
6726static ALLEGRO_COLOR _json_get_color(cJSON* parent, const char* name, ALLEGRO_COLOR fallback) {
6727 cJSON* arr = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(parent, name);
6728 if (!arr || !cJSON_IsArray(arr) || cJSON_GetArraySize(arr) < 4) return fallback;
6729 int r = (int)cJSON_GetArrayItem(arr, 0)->valuedouble;
6730 int g = (int)cJSON_GetArrayItem(arr, 1)->valuedouble;
6731 int b = (int)cJSON_GetArrayItem(arr, 2)->valuedouble;
6732 int a = (int)cJSON_GetArrayItem(arr, 3)->valuedouble;
6733 return al_map_rgba((unsigned char)r, (unsigned char)g, (unsigned char)b, (unsigned char)a);
6734}
6735
6737static float _json_get_float(cJSON* parent, const char* name, float fallback) {
6738 cJSON* item = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(parent, name);
6739 if (!item || !cJSON_IsNumber(item)) return fallback;
6740 return (float)item->valuedouble;
6741}
6742
6744static int _json_get_int(cJSON* parent, const char* name, int fallback) {
6745 cJSON* item = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(parent, name);
6746 if (!item || !cJSON_IsNumber(item)) return fallback;
6747 return (int)item->valuedouble;
6748}
6749
6756int n_gui_save_theme_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
6757 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
6758 __n_assert(filepath, return -1);
6759
6760 cJSON* root = cJSON_CreateObject();
6761 if (!root) return -1;
6762
6763 /* theme colours */
6764 cJSON* theme = cJSON_CreateObject();
6765 N_GUI_THEME* t = &ctx->default_theme;
6766 _json_add_color(theme, "bg_normal", t->bg_normal);
6767 _json_add_color(theme, "bg_hover", t->bg_hover);
6768 _json_add_color(theme, "bg_active", t->bg_active);
6769 _json_add_color(theme, "border_normal", t->border_normal);
6770 _json_add_color(theme, "border_hover", t->border_hover);
6771 _json_add_color(theme, "border_active", t->border_active);
6772 _json_add_color(theme, "text_normal", t->text_normal);
6773 _json_add_color(theme, "text_hover", t->text_hover);
6774 _json_add_color(theme, "text_active", t->text_active);
6775 _json_add_color(theme, "selection_color", t->selection_color);
6776 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(theme, "border_thickness", t->border_thickness);
6777 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(theme, "corner_rx", t->corner_rx);
6778 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(theme, "corner_ry", t->corner_ry);
6779 cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "theme", theme);
6780
6781 /* style values */
6782 cJSON* sty = cJSON_CreateObject();
6783 N_GUI_STYLE* s = &ctx->style;
6784 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "titlebar_h", s->titlebar_h);
6785 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "min_win_w", s->min_win_w);
6786 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "min_win_h", s->min_win_h);
6787 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "title_padding", s->title_padding);
6788 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "title_max_w_reserve", s->title_max_w_reserve);
6789
6790 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scrollbar_size", s->scrollbar_size);
6791 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_min", s->scrollbar_thumb_min);
6792 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_padding", s->scrollbar_thumb_padding);
6793 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_corner_r", s->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r);
6794 _json_add_color(sty, "scrollbar_track_color", s->scrollbar_track_color);
6795 _json_add_color(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_color", s->scrollbar_thumb_color);
6796
6797 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_size", s->global_scrollbar_size);
6798 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_min", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_min);
6799 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_padding", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_padding);
6800 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r);
6801 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scrollbar_border_thickness", s->global_scrollbar_border_thickness);
6802 _json_add_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_track_color", s->global_scrollbar_track_color);
6803 _json_add_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_color", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_color);
6804 _json_add_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color);
6805
6806 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "grip_size", s->grip_size);
6807 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "grip_line_thickness", s->grip_line_thickness);
6808 _json_add_color(sty, "grip_color", s->grip_color);
6809
6810 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_track_size", s->slider_track_size);
6811 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_track_corner_r", s->slider_track_corner_r);
6812 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_track_border_thickness", s->slider_track_border_thickness);
6813 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_handle_min_r", s->slider_handle_min_r);
6814 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_handle_edge_offset", s->slider_handle_edge_offset);
6815 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_handle_border_thickness", s->slider_handle_border_thickness);
6816 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "slider_value_label_offset", s->slider_value_label_offset);
6817
6818 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "textarea_padding", s->textarea_padding);
6819 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "textarea_cursor_width", s->textarea_cursor_width);
6820 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "textarea_cursor_blink_period", s->textarea_cursor_blink_period);
6821
6822 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_max_size", s->checkbox_max_size);
6823 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_mark_margin", s->checkbox_mark_margin);
6824 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_mark_thickness", s->checkbox_mark_thickness);
6825 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_label_gap", s->checkbox_label_gap);
6826 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "checkbox_label_offset", s->checkbox_label_offset);
6827
6828 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radio_circle_min_r", s->radio_circle_min_r);
6829 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radio_circle_border_thickness", s->radio_circle_border_thickness);
6830 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radio_inner_offset", s->radio_inner_offset);
6831 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radio_label_gap", s->radio_label_gap);
6832
6833 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "listbox_default_item_height", s->listbox_default_item_height);
6834 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "radiolist_default_item_height", s->radiolist_default_item_height);
6835 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "combobox_max_visible", s->combobox_max_visible);
6836 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropmenu_max_visible", s->dropmenu_max_visible);
6837 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "item_text_padding", s->item_text_padding);
6838 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "item_selection_inset", s->item_selection_inset);
6839 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "item_height_pad", s->item_height_pad);
6840
6841 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_arrow_reserve", s->dropdown_arrow_reserve);
6842 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_arrow_thickness", s->dropdown_arrow_thickness);
6843 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_arrow_half_h", s->dropdown_arrow_half_h);
6844 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_arrow_half_w", s->dropdown_arrow_half_w);
6845 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "dropdown_border_thickness", s->dropdown_border_thickness);
6846
6847 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "label_padding", s->label_padding);
6848 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "link_underline_thickness", s->link_underline_thickness);
6849 _json_add_color(sty, "link_color_normal", s->link_color_normal);
6850 _json_add_color(sty, "link_color_hover", s->link_color_hover);
6851
6852 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "scroll_step", s->scroll_step);
6853 cJSON_AddNumberToObject(sty, "global_scroll_step", s->global_scroll_step);
6854 cJSON_AddItemToObject(root, "style", sty);
6855
6856 /* write to file */
6857 char* json_str = cJSON_Print(root);
6858 cJSON_Delete(root);
6859 if (!json_str) return -1;
6860
6861 FILE* fp = fopen(filepath, "w");
6862 if (!fp) {
6863 cJSON_free(json_str);
6864 return -1;
6865 }
6866 fprintf(fp, "%s\n", json_str);
6867 fclose(fp);
6868 cJSON_free(json_str);
6869 return 0;
6870}
6871
6878int n_gui_load_theme_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
6879 __n_assert(ctx, return -1);
6880 __n_assert(filepath, return -1);
6881
6882 FILE* fp = fopen(filepath, "r");
6883 if (!fp) return -1;
6884
6885 fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_END);
6886 long fsize = ftell(fp);
6887 fseek(fp, 0, SEEK_SET);
6888 if (fsize <= 0 || fsize > 1024 * 1024) { /* sanity: max 1 MB */
6889 fclose(fp);
6890 return -1;
6891 }
6892
6893 char* buf = NULL;
6894 Malloc(buf, char, (size_t)fsize + 1);
6895 if (!buf) {
6896 fclose(fp);
6897 return -1;
6898 }
6899 size_t nread = fread(buf, 1, (size_t)fsize, fp);
6900 fclose(fp);
6901 buf[nread] = '\0';
6902
6903 cJSON* root = cJSON_Parse(buf);
6904 FreeNoLog(buf);
6905 if (!root) return -1;
6906
6907 /* parse theme colours */
6908 cJSON* theme = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "theme");
6909 if (theme) {
6910 N_GUI_THEME* t = &ctx->default_theme;
6911 t->bg_normal = _json_get_color(theme, "bg_normal", t->bg_normal);
6912 t->bg_hover = _json_get_color(theme, "bg_hover", t->bg_hover);
6913 t->bg_active = _json_get_color(theme, "bg_active", t->bg_active);
6914 t->border_normal = _json_get_color(theme, "border_normal", t->border_normal);
6915 t->border_hover = _json_get_color(theme, "border_hover", t->border_hover);
6916 t->border_active = _json_get_color(theme, "border_active", t->border_active);
6917 t->text_normal = _json_get_color(theme, "text_normal", t->text_normal);
6918 t->text_hover = _json_get_color(theme, "text_hover", t->text_hover);
6919 t->text_active = _json_get_color(theme, "text_active", t->text_active);
6920 t->selection_color = _json_get_color(theme, "selection_color", t->selection_color);
6921 t->border_thickness = _json_get_float(theme, "border_thickness", t->border_thickness);
6922 t->corner_rx = _json_get_float(theme, "corner_rx", t->corner_rx);
6923 t->corner_ry = _json_get_float(theme, "corner_ry", t->corner_ry);
6924
6925 /* apply to all existing windows and widgets */
6926 list_foreach(wnode, ctx->windows) {
6927 N_GUI_WINDOW* win = (N_GUI_WINDOW*)wnode->ptr;
6928 win->theme = *t;
6929 list_foreach(wgn, win->widgets) {
6930 N_GUI_WIDGET* wgt = (N_GUI_WIDGET*)wgn->ptr;
6931 if (wgt) wgt->theme = *t;
6932 }
6933 }
6934 }
6935
6936 /* parse style values */
6937 cJSON* sty = cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive(root, "style");
6938 if (sty) {
6939 N_GUI_STYLE* s = &ctx->style;
6940 s->titlebar_h = _json_get_float(sty, "titlebar_h", s->titlebar_h);
6941 s->min_win_w = _json_get_float(sty, "min_win_w", s->min_win_w);
6942 s->min_win_h = _json_get_float(sty, "min_win_h", s->min_win_h);
6943 s->title_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "title_padding", s->title_padding);
6944 s->title_max_w_reserve = _json_get_float(sty, "title_max_w_reserve", s->title_max_w_reserve);
6945
6946 s->scrollbar_size = _json_get_float(sty, "scrollbar_size", s->scrollbar_size);
6947 s->scrollbar_thumb_min = _json_get_float(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_min", s->scrollbar_thumb_min);
6948 s->scrollbar_thumb_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_padding", s->scrollbar_thumb_padding);
6949 s->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r = _json_get_float(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_corner_r", s->scrollbar_thumb_corner_r);
6950 s->scrollbar_track_color = _json_get_color(sty, "scrollbar_track_color", s->scrollbar_track_color);
6951 s->scrollbar_thumb_color = _json_get_color(sty, "scrollbar_thumb_color", s->scrollbar_thumb_color);
6952
6953 s->global_scrollbar_size = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_size", s->global_scrollbar_size);
6954 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_min = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_min", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_min);
6955 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_padding", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_padding);
6956 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_corner_r);
6957 s->global_scrollbar_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scrollbar_border_thickness", s->global_scrollbar_border_thickness);
6958 s->global_scrollbar_track_color = _json_get_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_track_color", s->global_scrollbar_track_color);
6959 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_color = _json_get_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_color", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_color);
6960 s->global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color = _json_get_color(sty, "global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color", s->global_scrollbar_thumb_border_color);
6961
6962 s->grip_size = _json_get_float(sty, "grip_size", s->grip_size);
6963 s->grip_line_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "grip_line_thickness", s->grip_line_thickness);
6964 s->grip_color = _json_get_color(sty, "grip_color", s->grip_color);
6965
6966 s->slider_track_size = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_track_size", s->slider_track_size);
6967 s->slider_track_corner_r = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_track_corner_r", s->slider_track_corner_r);
6968 s->slider_track_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_track_border_thickness", s->slider_track_border_thickness);
6969 s->slider_handle_min_r = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_handle_min_r", s->slider_handle_min_r);
6970 s->slider_handle_edge_offset = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_handle_edge_offset", s->slider_handle_edge_offset);
6971 s->slider_handle_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_handle_border_thickness", s->slider_handle_border_thickness);
6972 s->slider_value_label_offset = _json_get_float(sty, "slider_value_label_offset", s->slider_value_label_offset);
6973
6974 s->textarea_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "textarea_padding", s->textarea_padding);
6975 s->textarea_cursor_width = _json_get_float(sty, "textarea_cursor_width", s->textarea_cursor_width);
6976 s->textarea_cursor_blink_period = _json_get_float(sty, "textarea_cursor_blink_period", s->textarea_cursor_blink_period);
6977
6978 s->checkbox_max_size = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_max_size", s->checkbox_max_size);
6979 s->checkbox_mark_margin = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_mark_margin", s->checkbox_mark_margin);
6980 s->checkbox_mark_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_mark_thickness", s->checkbox_mark_thickness);
6981 s->checkbox_label_gap = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_label_gap", s->checkbox_label_gap);
6982 s->checkbox_label_offset = _json_get_float(sty, "checkbox_label_offset", s->checkbox_label_offset);
6983
6984 s->radio_circle_min_r = _json_get_float(sty, "radio_circle_min_r", s->radio_circle_min_r);
6985 s->radio_circle_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "radio_circle_border_thickness", s->radio_circle_border_thickness);
6986 s->radio_inner_offset = _json_get_float(sty, "radio_inner_offset", s->radio_inner_offset);
6987 s->radio_label_gap = _json_get_float(sty, "radio_label_gap", s->radio_label_gap);
6988
6989 s->listbox_default_item_height = _json_get_float(sty, "listbox_default_item_height", s->listbox_default_item_height);
6990 s->radiolist_default_item_height = _json_get_float(sty, "radiolist_default_item_height", s->radiolist_default_item_height);
6991 s->combobox_max_visible = _json_get_int(sty, "combobox_max_visible", s->combobox_max_visible);
6992 s->dropmenu_max_visible = _json_get_int(sty, "dropmenu_max_visible", s->dropmenu_max_visible);
6993 s->item_text_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "item_text_padding", s->item_text_padding);
6994 s->item_selection_inset = _json_get_float(sty, "item_selection_inset", s->item_selection_inset);
6995 s->item_height_pad = _json_get_float(sty, "item_height_pad", s->item_height_pad);
6996
6997 s->dropdown_arrow_reserve = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_arrow_reserve", s->dropdown_arrow_reserve);
6998 s->dropdown_arrow_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_arrow_thickness", s->dropdown_arrow_thickness);
6999 s->dropdown_arrow_half_h = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_arrow_half_h", s->dropdown_arrow_half_h);
7000 s->dropdown_arrow_half_w = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_arrow_half_w", s->dropdown_arrow_half_w);
7001 s->dropdown_border_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "dropdown_border_thickness", s->dropdown_border_thickness);
7002
7003 s->label_padding = _json_get_float(sty, "label_padding", s->label_padding);
7004 s->link_underline_thickness = _json_get_float(sty, "link_underline_thickness", s->link_underline_thickness);
7005 s->link_color_normal = _json_get_color(sty, "link_color_normal", s->link_color_normal);
7006 s->link_color_hover = _json_get_color(sty, "link_color_hover", s->link_color_hover);
7007
7008 s->scroll_step = _json_get_float(sty, "scroll_step", s->scroll_step);
7009 s->global_scroll_step = _json_get_float(sty, "global_scroll_step", s->global_scroll_step);
7010 }
7011
7012 cJSON_Delete(root);
7013 return 0;
7014}
7015
7016#else /* !HAVE_CJSON */
7017
7024int n_gui_save_theme_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
7025 (void)ctx;
7026 (void)filepath;
7027 n_log(LOG_ERR, "n_gui_save_theme_json: cJSON not available (compile with -DHAVE_CJSON)");
7028 return -1;
7029}

7037int n_gui_load_theme_json(N_GUI_CTX* ctx, const char* filepath) {
